Clinical metadata table of high quality patient set
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

hg_cov_tn_df <- hq_dataset_metadata %>%
  distinct(patient, coverage_normal, coverage_tumor) %>%
  reshape2::melt(id.vars = "patient")

hg_cov_tn_plot <- ggplot(hg_cov_tn_df) +
  geom_jitter(aes(x = variable, y = value, fill = variable), shape = 21, na.rm = T) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = variable, y = value, fill = variable), position = "dodge", outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = T) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.03, 0.03), breaks = c(0, 30, 60, 90, round(max(meta_and_cov_df$value, na.rm = T), digits = 0)),
                     limits = c(0, round(max(meta_and_cov_df$value, na.rm = T), digits = 0) + 2)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("N", "T")) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Sample", labels = c("Normal", "Tumor"), values = c("black", "#8000FF")) +
  labs(y = "Coverage") +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "gray75"))

hq_clinical_meta_table <- data.table(
  "Metadata" = c("",
                 "Age", "Median (range)",
                 "Sex", "Male", "Female",
                 "Admixture Cluster", "EUR Dominant", "AFR Dominant", "AMR Dominant", "EAS Dominant", "SAS Dominant", "Highly Admixed",
                 "Self-Identification", "White", "Black or\n\tAfrican American", "Hispanic", "Asian",
                 "IGH Translocation", "t(11;14)", "t(4;14)", "t(14;16)", "t(14;20)", "t(6;14)", "t(8;14)", "Not Detected",
                 "Hyperdiploidy", "yes", "no"),
  "MGUS" = c("", "", NA, "", NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA),
  "SMM" = c("", "", NA, "", NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA),
  "MM" = c("", "", NA, "", NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA),
  "RRMM" = c("", "", NA, "", NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, "", NA, NA))
for(i in 1:length(levels(hq_dataset_metadata$disease_stage)[1:4])) {
  
  # Grab all unique patient records in the metadata per disease stage
  patients_per_stage <- hq_dataset_metadata %>%
                          droplevels() %>%
                          dplyr::filter(disease_stage == levels(hq_dataset_metadata$disease_stage)[i]) %>%
                          dplyr::select(patient, age, sex, super5_cluster_id, self_identified_race, igh_translocation, genomic_hrd_status) %>%
                          unique()
  
  # If patient has multiple samples per disease stage then take only the first record (earliest)
  patients_per_stage <- patients_per_stage[!duplicated(patients_per_stage$patient),]
  
  # Now calculate some metrics to display
  # n per group
  n_record <- paste0("n = ", length(patients_per_stage$patient))
  
  # Age
  median_age <- round(median(as.numeric(patients_per_stage$age), na.rm = T), digits = 0)
  range_age <- round(range(as.numeric(patients_per_stage$age), na.rm = T), digits = 0)
  age_record <- paste0(median_age, " (", range_age[1], "-", range_age[2], ")")
  
  # Sex
  male_sex <- sum(patients_per_stage$sex == "Male", na.rm = T)
  male_pct_sex <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$sex == "Male", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  male_sex_record <- paste0(male_pct_sex, " (", male_sex, ")")
  
  female_sex <- sum(patients_per_stage$sex == "Female", na.rm = T)
  female_pct_sex <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$sex == "Female", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  female_sex_record <- paste0(female_pct_sex, " (", female_sex, ")")
  
  # Admixture cluster assignment
  eur_admix_cluster <- sum(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "EUR Dominant", na.rm = T)
  eur_pct_admix_cluster <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "EUR Dominant", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  eur_admix_cluster_record <- paste0(eur_pct_admix_cluster, " (", eur_admix_cluster, ")")
  
  afr_admix_cluster <- sum(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "AFR Dominant", na.rm = T)
  afr_pct_admix_cluster <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "AFR Dominant", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  afr_admix_cluster_record <- paste0(afr_pct_admix_cluster, " (", afr_admix_cluster, ")")
  
  amr_admix_cluster <- sum(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "AMR Dominant", na.rm = T)
  amr_pct_admix_cluster <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "AMR Dominant", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  amr_admix_cluster_record <- paste0(amr_pct_admix_cluster, " (", amr_admix_cluster, ")")
  
  eas_admix_cluster <- sum(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "EAS Dominant", na.rm = T)
  eas_pct_admix_cluster <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "EAS Dominant", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  eas_admix_cluster_record <- paste0(eas_pct_admix_cluster, " (", eas_admix_cluster, ")")
  
  sas_admix_cluster <- sum(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "SAS Dominant", na.rm = T)
  sas_pct_admix_cluster <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "SAS Dominant", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  sas_admix_cluster_record <- paste0(sas_pct_admix_cluster, " (", sas_admix_cluster, ")")
  
  ha_admix_cluster <- sum(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "Highly Admixed", na.rm = T)
  ha_pct_admix_cluster <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$super5_cluster_id == "Highly Admixed", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  ha_admix_cluster_record <- paste0(ha_pct_admix_cluster, " (", ha_admix_cluster, ")")
  
  # Self-Identification
  w_self_id <- sum(patients_per_stage$self_identified_race == "White", na.rm = T)
  w_pct_self_id <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$self_identified_race == "White", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  w_self_id_record <- paste0(w_pct_self_id, " (", w_self_id, ")")
  
  aa_self_id <- sum(patients_per_stage$self_identified_race == "Black or African American", na.rm = T)
  aa_pct_self_id <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$self_identified_race == "Black or African American", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  aa_self_id_record <- paste0(aa_pct_self_id, " (", aa_self_id, ")")
  
  h_self_id <- sum(patients_per_stage$self_identified_race == "Hispanic", na.rm = T)
  h_pct_self_id <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$self_identified_race == "Hispanic", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  h_self_id_record <- paste0(h_pct_self_id, " (", h_self_id, ")")
  
  a_self_id <- sum(patients_per_stage$self_identified_race == "Asian", na.rm = T)
  a_pct_self_id <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$self_identified_race == "Asian", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  a_self_id_record <- paste0(a_pct_self_id, " (", a_self_id, ")")
  
  # IgH Translocation
  t11_14 <- sum(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(11;14)", na.rm = T)
  t11_14_pct <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(11;14)", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  t11_14_record <- paste0(t11_14_pct, " (", t11_14, ")")
  
  t4_14 <- sum(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(4;14)", na.rm = T)
  t4_14_pct <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(4;14)", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  t4_14_record <- paste0(t4_14_pct, " (", t4_14, ")")
  
  t14_16 <- sum(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(14;16)", na.rm = T)
  t14_16_pct <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(14;16)", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  t14_16_record <- paste0(t14_16_pct, " (", t14_16, ")")
  
  t14_20 <- sum(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(14;20)", na.rm = T)
  t14_20_pct <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(14;20)", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  t14_20_record <- paste0(t14_20_pct, " (", t14_20, ")")
  
  t6_14 <- sum(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(6;14)", na.rm = T)
  t6_14_pct <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(6;14)", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  t6_14_record <- paste0(t6_14_pct, " (", t6_14, ")")
  
  t8_14 <- sum(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(8;14)", na.rm = T)
  t8_14_pct <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "t(8;14)", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  t8_14_record <- paste0(t8_14_pct, " (", t8_14, ")")
  
  ndet <- sum(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "Not Detected", na.rm = T)
  ndet_pct <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$igh_translocation == "Not Detected", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  ndet_record <- paste0(ndet_pct, " (", ndet, ")")
  
  # Hyperdiploidy
  yhrd <- sum(patients_per_stage$genomic_hrd_status == "yes", na.rm = T)
  yhrd_pct <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$genomic_hrd_status == "yes", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  yhrd_record <- paste0(yhrd_pct, " (", yhrd, ")")
  
  nhrd <- sum(patients_per_stage$genomic_hrd_status == "no", na.rm = T)
  nhrd_pct <- round(mean(patients_per_stage$genomic_hrd_status == "no", na.rm = T) * 100, digits = 1)
  nhrd_record <- paste0(nhrd_pct, " (", nhrd, ")")
  
  # Compile clinical metadata table
  # n per group
  hq_clinical_meta_table[1,i+1] <- n_record
  # Age
  hq_clinical_meta_table[3,i+1] <- age_record
  # Sex
  hq_clinical_meta_table[5,i+1] <- male_sex_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[6,i+1] <- female_sex_record
  # Admixture Cluster
  hq_clinical_meta_table[8,i+1] <- eur_admix_cluster_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[9,i+1] <- afr_admix_cluster_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[10,i+1] <- amr_admix_cluster_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[11,i+1] <- eas_admix_cluster_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[12,i+1] <- sas_admix_cluster_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[13,i+1] <- ha_admix_cluster_record
  # Self-Identification
  hq_clinical_meta_table[15,i+1] <- w_self_id_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[16,i+1] <- aa_self_id_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[17,i+1] <- h_self_id_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[18,i+1] <- a_self_id_record
  # IgH Translocation
  hq_clinical_meta_table[20,i+1] <- t11_14_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[21,i+1] <- t4_14_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[22,i+1] <- t14_16_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[23,i+1] <- t14_20_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[24,i+1] <- t6_14_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[25,i+1] <- t8_14_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[26,i+1] <- ndet_record
  # Hyperdiploidy
  hq_clinical_meta_table[28,i+1] <- yhrd_record
  hq_clinical_meta_table[29,i+1] <- nhrd_record
}

# Now create and customize the table aesthetics
hq_clinical_metadata_table <- flextable::flextable(data = hq_clinical_meta_table) %>%
  flextable::prepend_chunks(i = ~ !Metadata %in% c("Age", "Sex", "Admixture Cluster", "Self-Identification",
                                        "IgH Translocation", "Hyperdiploidy"), j = 1, as_chunk("\t")) %>%
  flextable::width(j = 1, width = 1.47) %>%
  flextable::width(j = 2:5, width = 1.1) %>%
  flextable::bold(part = "header") %>%
  flextable::fontsize(size = 13, part = "header") %>%
  flextable::fontsize(size = 11, part = "body") %>%
  flextable::hline_top(part = "header", border = fp_border_default(width = 2, color = "#8000FF")) %>%
  flextable::hline_bottom(part = "header", border = fp_border_default(width = 0, color = "#8000FF")) %>%
  flextable::hline(i = 1, border = fp_border_default(width = 2, color = "#8000FF")) %>%
  flextable::hline_bottom(part = "body", border = fp_border_default(width = 2, color = "#8000FF")) %>%
  flextable::align(part = "header", j = 2:5, align = "right") %>%
  flextable::align(part = "body", j = 2:5, align = "right") %>%
  flextable::hline(i = c(3,6,13,18,26)) %>%
  flextable::bg(bg = "gray97", i = c(3,5,8,10,12,15,17,20,22,24,26,28)) %>%
  flextable::bg(bg = "gray92", i = c(6,9,11,13,16,18,21,23,25,29)) %>%
  flextable::bold(i = c(2,4,7,14,19,27), j = 1) %>%
  flextable::italic(i = c(3,5,8,10,12,15,17,20,22,24,26,28,6,9,11,13,16,18,21,23,25,29), j = 1) %>%
  flextable::italic(i = 1) %>%
  flextable::color(part = "header", j = 1, color = "black")

# flextable::save_as_image(x = clinical_metadata_table, path = paste0(base_data_path, "supp_table1_clinical_metadata_summary.png"), expand = 25, res = 300)
```

**Supplementary Figure 15**

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-15
#| fig-cap: "Summary table that details key genomic and demographic metadata variables for all patients stratified by disease stage. Admixture cluster refers to the assignment of each patient to a continental ancestry grouping inferred from genomic ancestry. Age is describe using the median with the range in parenthesis. The variables sex, admixture cluster, self-identification, IgH translocation, and hyperdiploidy are described using the percentage of patients per disease stage with raw count in parenthesis. MGUS, monoclonal gammopathy of undetermined significance; SMM, smoldering multiple myeloma; MM, multiple myeloma; RRMM, relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma; EUR, European ancestry; AFR, African ancestry; AMR, American ancestry; EAS, East Asian ancestry; SAS, South Asian ancestry."
#| fig-height: 9
#| fig-width: 6
#| out-width: "70%"

supp_fig15 <- hq_clinical_metadata_table
supp_fig15
```

## Identification of SNV and InDel enrichment, Part 1

Let's analyze the mutations
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Read in genes
genes <- get_genes_shortcut(gtf_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.108.gtf.gz"))

# Read in dataset-wide MAF file including all variants (no filtering based on consequence, which happens with maftools::read.maf)
muts <- read_maf_file(maf_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "mgp1000.hq.union.consensus.somatic.snv.indel.maf.gz"))
muts$VAF <- muts$t_alt_count / muts$t_depth

# Gather high-coverage, high-quality samples
muts_in_hq_patients <- muts %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% unique(hq_dataset_metadata$sample))

# Collapse all mutations per patient, remove any duplicated mutations (i.e. shared across timepoints)
# Column 13 is Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode
muts_hq <- muts_in_hq_patients[!duplicated(gUtils::gr2dt(muts_in_hq_patients[,13]))]

# Separate SNVs and InDels
snv_muts_hq <- muts_hq %Q% (VARIANT_CLASS == "SNV")
indel_muts_hq <- muts_hq %Q% (VARIANT_CLASS %in% c("deletion", "insertion"))

# How many SNVs and InDels before removing Silent mutations
print("Total SNVs and InDels before filtering out silent mutations ...")
length(snv_muts_hq)
length(indel_muts_hq)

# Convert mutations to DT
snv_muts_hq_dt <- gUtils::gr2dt(snv_muts_hq)
indel_muts_hq_dt <- gUtils::gr2dt(indel_muts_hq)

#print("SNVs per sample ... ")
#snv_muts_hq_dt %>%
#  dplyr::group_by(Tumor_Sample_Barcode) %>%
#  dplyr::count(name = "total_snvs") %>%
#  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
#  dplyr::reframe("median_snvs_per_sample" = median(total_snvs),
#                 "range_snvs" = range(total_snvs))
#print("Median InDels per sample ... ")
#indel_muts_hq_dt %>%
#  dplyr::group_by(Tumor_Sample_Barcode) %>%
#  dplyr::count(name = "total_indels") %>%
#  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
#  dplyr::reframe("median_indels_per_sample" = median(total_indels),
#                 "range_indels" = range(total_indels))

# simplify mut DT for plotting downstream
snv_muts_hq_dt_for_plot <- snv_muts_hq_dt[,.(seqnames, start, end, Hugo_Symbol, Variant_Classification,
                                             Variant_Type, Consequence, Reference_Allele, Tumor_Seq_Allele2,
                                             VAF, Tumor_Sample_Barcode, Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode)]
indel_muts_hq_dt_for_plot <- indel_muts_hq_dt[,.(seqnames, start, end, Hugo_Symbol, Variant_Classification,
                                                 Variant_Type, Consequence, Reference_Allele, Tumor_Seq_Allele2,
                                                 VAF, Tumor_Sample_Barcode, Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode)]

# Add metadata to mut DT
snv_muts_hq_dt_for_plot <- snv_muts_hq_dt_for_plot %>%
  dplyr::rename("sample" = Tumor_Sample_Barcode, "patient" = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_metadata, by = c("sample", "patient"))

indel_muts_hq_dt_for_plot <- indel_muts_hq_dt_for_plot %>%
  dplyr::rename("sample" = Tumor_Sample_Barcode, "patient" = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_metadata, by = c("sample", "patient"))

muts_hq_dt_for_plot <- gUtils::rrbind(snv_muts_hq_dt_for_plot, indel_muts_hq_dt_for_plot)
```

## The landscape of the non-coding genome in myeloma is characterized by a discrete set of mutationally enriched regions, Part 1

We are searching the entire genome (ocean) for enrichment (trophy fish) beyond coding regions.
Here, fishy fishy ...
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Read in WGS calling BED
eligible_bed <- read_bed_file(bed_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "wgs_calling_regions.hg38.bed"))

# total eligible size to start
message("Eligible genome size start: ", sum(GenomicRanges::width(eligible_bed)))

# First, to focus the analysis and remove potential confounders, specifically those due to low-complexity repeat regions,
# imbalance of calls on sex chromosomes, and immunoglobulin regions (functional and non-functional), the eligible
# region will be subset to remove these regions. This will properly reduce both the background regions to test against (eligible)
# and the hypothesis regions (tiles) before the run to instantiate the Fish obj

# WindowMasker/SDust low-complexity, repeat region filter BED
wm_sdust_mask_bed <- read_bed_file(bed_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "windowMaskerSDust.hg38.bed.gz"),
                                   additional_col_names = "wm_sdust_id")
# WM/SDust mask size
message("WM/SDust mask size start: ", sum(GenomicRanges::width(wm_sdust_mask_bed)))


# IG regions and genes filter BED (https://github.com/ferrannadeu/IgCaller/blob/master/IgCaller_reference_files/hg38/dicts/AllRegionsAndGenes_hg38.bed). This also includes non-functional IG genes (https://www.genenames.org/data/genegroup/#!/group/350)
ig_region_mask_bed <- read_bed_file(bed_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "igFunctionalAndNonFunctionalGenesAndRegions.hg38.bed"),
                                    additional_col_names = "ig_region_id")
# Add 250 padding to both ends of IG regions
ig_region_mask_bed <- ig_region_mask_bed + 250
# IG regions mask size
message("IG regions mask size start: ", sum(GenomicRanges::width(ig_region_mask_bed)))

# Reduce the background eligible BED by the WM/SDust mask, sex chromosomes, IG regions, and exons
eligible_bed <- eligible_bed %_% wm_sdust_mask_bed
eligible_bed <- eligible_bed %_% ig_region_mask_bed
eligible_bed <- eligible_bed %Q% (!seqnames %in% c("chrX", "chrY"))
# final eligible size
message("Final eligible genome size end :", sum(GenomicRanges::width(eligible_bed)))


# # For WGS, the eligible region is a set of 10kbp tiled windows where each successive window is shifted
# # 500bp of the previous (i.e. each tile 10kbp window overlaps the next by 9.5kbp)
# tiles_set_init <- gUtils::gr.tile(gr = seqinfo(eligible_bed), width = 10000)
# 
# # Since we want to shift the 10kbp tiles by 500 each set, we need [(10000 / 500) - 1] number of steps (i.e. window / shift - 1)
# # As the initiating set of tiles will be the same as the 20th set
# tile_set <- GenomicRanges::GRangesList(tiles_set_init)
# 
# for(i in 1:19) {
#   # First, add 500bp to each side of the tile (shifting it) and trim the ends to ensure they don't
#   # exceed the seqlength
#   tiles_step <- suppressWarnings(tile_set[[i]] %+% 500)
#   tiles_step <- #GenomicRanges::trim(tiles_step)
#   tile_set[[i+1]] <- tiles_step
# }
# 
# # Concatenate the tile steps set into single set of tiles, and fix seqinfo
# final_tiles <- GenomicRanges::sort.GenomicRanges(gUtils::grl.unlist(tile_set))
# final_tiles <- gr_refactor_seqs(input_gr = final_tiles)
# 
# # Remove any tiles less than 10kbp
# final_tiles <- final_tiles[!final_tiles@ranges@width < 10000,]
# 
# # Annotate each tile with the nearest gene
# # TODO: gather annotations for super-enhancers, B-cell TF binding sites, etc. as these can be added to
# # tile metadata in same fashion of genes
# final_tiles$nearest_gene <- genes$gene_name[nearest(x = final_tiles, subject = gr.stripstrand(genes))]

final_tiles <- readRDS(file = paste0(base_data_path, "genome_tiles.rds"))
# Collect bait (i.e. covariates) for the best model to catch the trophy fish (drivers)

# From Gajic et al Nat. Comm. 2022
# Covariate set (“covariome”) to comprehensively capture the contribution of background genomic features to the neutral mutation density.
# Replitome - replication timing across 96 cell lines, from Roadmap Epigenomics Project
# Encodome - 15 ChromHMM states across 127 cell lines and tissues, from ENCODE
# Seqome - sequence context (mono, di and tri), 
# These are binned numeric values that were calculated using hg19 data, they will be lifted over for this analysis

#####################
# Replication timing

# replication_timing_hg19 <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "reptome_fish.rds"))
# # Original data is hg19 so let's liftOver
# liftchain <- rtracklayer::import.chain(paste0(base_data_path, "hg19ToHg38.over.chain"))
# replication_timing_hg38 <- rtracklayer::liftOver(x = gUtils::gr.chr(replication_timing_hg19$data), chain = liftchain)
# # Unlist output to get GR
# replication_timing <- gUtils::grl.unlist(replication_timing_hg38)
# # Extract the covariate data GR and convert to good seqinfo
# replication_timing <- gr_refactor_seqs(input_gr = replication_timing)
# # Save copy of hg38 version of full reptome
# #saveRDS(object = replication_timing, file = "reptome_fish.hg38.rds")
# Subset to top 10 PCs
replication_timing <- readRDS(file = paste0(base_data_path, "reptome_fish.hg38.rds"))
replication_timing <- replication_timing[,4:13]
replication_timing_covar <- Cov(data = replication_timing, field = colnames(GenomicRanges::mcols(x = replication_timing)))

###################
# Sequence context

# seq_context_hg19 <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "seqome_fish.rds"))
# # Original data is hg19 so let's liftOver
# seq_context_hg38 <- rtracklayer::liftOver(x = gUtils::gr.chr(seq_context_hg19$data), chain = liftchain)
# # Unlist output to get GR
# seq_context <- gUtils::grl.unlist(seq_context_hg38)
# # Extract the covariate data GR and convert to good seqinfo
# seq_context <- gr_refactor_seqs(input_gr = seq_context)
# # Save copy of hg38 version of full seqome
# #saveRDS(object = seq_context, file = "seqome_fish.hg38.rds")
# Subset to top 10 PCs
seq_context <- readRDS(file = paste0(base_data_path, "seqome_fish.hg38.rds"))
seq_context <- seq_context[,4:13]
seq_context_covar <- Cov(data = seq_context, field = colnames(GenomicRanges::mcols(x = seq_context)))

###################
# ChromHMM states

# chrom_states_hg19 <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "epigenetic_covariate_fish_top200.rds"))
# # Original data is hg19 so let's liftOver
# chrom_states_hg38 <- rtracklayer::liftOver(x = gUtils::gr.chr(chrom_states_hg19$data), chain = liftchain)
# # Unlist output to get GR
# chrom_states <- gUtils::grl.unlist(chrom_states_hg38)
# # Extract the covariate data GR and convert to good seqinfo
# chrom_states <- gr_refactor_seqs(input_gr = chrom_states)
# # Save copy of hg38 version of full encodome
# #saveRDS(object = chrom_states, file = "encodome_fish.hg38.rds")
# Subset to top 10 PCs
chrom_states <- readRDS(file = paste0(base_data_path, "encodome_fish.hg38.rds"))
chrom_states <- chrom_states[,4:13]
chrom_states_covar <- Cov(data = chrom_states, field = colnames(GenomicRanges::mcols(x = chrom_states)))

# With the bait (covariates) loaded, now we can catch the trophy fish!
covars <- c(replication_timing_covar,
            chrom_states_covar,
            seq_context_covar)

# Creating an empty FishHook object
#covars_bait <- Fish(hypotheses = final_tiles, mc.cores = 1)
#covars_bait$merge(covars)

# export to HPC for run
#saveRDS(object = covars_bait, file = "covars_bait.rds")
#saveRDS(object = final_tiles, file = "genome_tiles.rds")
#saveRDS(object = eligible_bed, file = "eligible_region.rds")

# Split events for various models
# Pan-Myeloma 
#saveRDS(object = snv_fish, file = "fishHookModels/panMyeloma/mgp1000_snv_mutations.rds")
#saveRDS(object = indel_fish, file = "fishHookModels/panMyeloma/mgp1000_indel_mutations.rds")

# Separate SNVs and InDels to be used in fishHook non-coding analysis
snv_fish <- snv_muts_hq %Q% (Variant_Classification != "Silent")
indel_fish <- indel_muts_hq %Q% (Variant_Classification != "Silent")

# Disease Stage specific
mgus_snv_fish <- snv_fish %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% unique(hq_dataset_metadata %>%
                                                                  dplyr::filter(disease_stage == "MGUS") %>%
                                                                  dplyr::select(sample) %>%
                                                                  purrr::as_vector()))
mgus_indel_fish <- indel_fish %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% unique(hq_dataset_metadata %>%
                                                                  dplyr::filter(disease_stage == "MGUS") %>%
                                                                  dplyr::select(sample) %>%
                                                                  purrr::as_vector()))
#saveRDS(object = mgus_snv_fish, file = "fishHookModels/diseaseStageSpecific/mgus_snv_mutations.rds")
#saveRDS(object = mgus_indel_fish, file = "fishHookModels/diseaseStageSpecific/mgus_indel_mutations.rds")

smm_snv_fish <- snv_fish %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% unique(hq_dataset_metadata %>%
                                                                  dplyr::filter(disease_stage == "SMM") %>%
                                                                  dplyr::select(sample) %>%
                                                                  purrr::as_vector()))
smm_indel_fish <- indel_fish %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% unique(hq_dataset_metadata %>%
                                                                  dplyr::filter(disease_stage == "SMM") %>%
                                                                  dplyr::select(sample) %>%
                                                                  purrr::as_vector()))
#saveRDS(object = smm_snv_fish, file = "fishHookModels/diseaseStageSpecific/smm_snv_mutations.rds")
#saveRDS(object = smm_indel_fish, file = "fishHookModels/diseaseStageSpecific/smm_indel_mutations.rds")

mm_snv_fish <- snv_fish %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% unique(hq_dataset_metadata %>%
                                                                  dplyr::filter(disease_stage == "MM") %>%
                                                                  dplyr::select(sample) %>%
                                                                  purrr::as_vector()))
mm_indel_fish <- indel_fish %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% unique(hq_dataset_metadata %>%
                                                                  dplyr::filter(disease_stage == "MM") %>%
                                                                  dplyr::select(sample) %>%
                                                                  purrr::as_vector()))
#saveRDS(object = mm_snv_fish, file = "fishHookModels/diseaseStageSpecific/mm_snv_mutations.rds")
#saveRDS(object = mm_indel_fish, file = "fishHookModels/diseaseStageSpecific/mm_indel_mutations.rds")

rr_snv_fish <- snv_fish %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% unique(hq_dataset_metadata %>%
                                                                  dplyr::filter(disease_stage == "RRMM") %>%
                                                                  dplyr::select(sample) %>%
                                                                  purrr::as_vector()))
rr_indel_fish <- indel_fish %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% unique(hq_dataset_metadata %>%
                                                                  dplyr::filter(disease_stage == "RRMM") %>%
                                                                  dplyr::select(sample) %>%
                                                                  purrr::as_vector()))

```

Look at the TMB of the eligible genome and stratify by disease stage and genomic feature
Some metrics on the non-coding genome (all regions)
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Correct the overall evaluated sites for same methodology as before, no Ig or sex chromosomes
snv_fish_final <- snv_fish[gr.in(query = snv_fish, subject = eligible_bed)]
snv_fish_ig <- snv_fish[gr.in(query = snv_fish, subject = ig_region_mask_bed)]

complete_snv_fish_per_sample <- left_join(
  x = gr2dt(gr.findoverlaps(query = muts_in_hq_patients %Q% (VARIANT_CLASS == "SNV"),
                            subject = snv_fish_final,
                            qcol = c("Reference_Allele","Tumor_Seq_Allele2","Tumor_Sample_Barcode","Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode"))) %>%
                                  dplyr::rename("sample" = Tumor_Sample_Barcode, "patient" = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode),
                            y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
                                  dplyr::select(patient,sample,disease_stage,age,sex,igh_translocation,coverage_normal,coverage_tumor,purity,ploidy,super5_cluster_id),
                            by = c("patient","sample")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-c(6,7)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()

indel_fish_final <- indel_fish[gr.in(query = indel_fish, subject = eligible_bed)]
indel_fish_ig <- indel_fish[gr.in(query = indel_fish, subject = ig_region_mask_bed)]

complete_indel_fish_per_sample <- left_join(
  x = gr2dt(gr.findoverlaps(query = muts_in_hq_patients %Q% (VARIANT_CLASS %in% c("insertion","deletion")),
                            subject = indel_fish_final,
                            qcol = c("Reference_Allele","Tumor_Seq_Allele2","Tumor_Sample_Barcode","Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode"))) %>%
                                  dplyr::rename("sample" = Tumor_Sample_Barcode, "patient" = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode),
                            y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
                                  dplyr::select(patient,sample,disease_stage,age,sex,igh_translocation,coverage_normal,coverage_tumor,purity,ploidy,super5_cluster_id),
                            by = c("patient","sample")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-c(6,7)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()

message("Total unique SNVs and InDels after filtering out silent mutations ...")
message("Unique SNVs: ", length(snv_fish_final))
message("InDels: ", length(indel_fish_final))
message("This is set of mutations used in fishHook model.")

complete_snv_fish_metrics <- complete_snv_fish_per_sample %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
  dplyr::count(name = "total_snvs") %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::reframe("median_snvs_per_sample" = median(total_snvs),
                 "range_snvs" = range(total_snvs))
message("median SNVs per sample: ", complete_snv_fish_metrics$median_snvs_per_sample[1])
message("range of SNVs per sample: ", complete_snv_fish_metrics$range_snvs[1], " to ", complete_snv_fish_metrics$range_snvs[2])

complete_indel_fish_metrics <- complete_indel_fish_per_sample %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
  dplyr::count(name = "total_indels") %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::reframe("median_indels_per_sample" = median(total_indels),
                 "range_indels" = range(total_indels))
message("median InDels per sample: ", complete_indel_fish_metrics$median_indels_per_sample[1])
message("range of InDels per sample: ", complete_indel_fish_metrics$range_indels[1], " to ", complete_indel_fish_metrics$range_indels[2])

tmb_fish_eligbile <- rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
                      dplyr::filter(!is.na(age)) %>%
                      dplyr::group_by(sample,disease_stage,age,sex,igh_translocation,coverage_normal,coverage_tumor,purity,ploidy,super5_cluster_id) %>%
                      dplyr::count(name = "total_mutation_count") %>%
                      dplyr::ungroup() %>%
                      dplyr::filter(total_mutation_count > 1000) %>%
                      dplyr::mutate("tumor_mutation_burden" = total_mutation_count / (sum(GenomicRanges::width(eligible_bed)) / 1e6))
tmb_fish_eligbile$age <- as.numeric(tmb_fish_eligbile$age)

# Correct the TMB by age by fitting a linear model
message("Testing linear regression of TMB in high-confidence genome and demographic / molecular covariates")
test_tmb_lm <- lm(data = tmb_fish_eligbile,
             formula = tumor_mutation_burden ~ age + igh_translocation + purity + ploidy)
summary(test_tmb_lm)

#tmb_lm <- lm(data = tmb_fish_eligbile %>%
#                     dplyr::mutate("t4_14" = case_when(igh_translocation == "t(4;14)" ~ 1,
#                                                       igh_translocation != "t(4;14)" ~ 0),
#                                   "male" = case_when(sex == "Male" ~ 1,
#                                                       sex != "Male" ~ 0)),
#             formula = tumor_mutation_burden ~ male + t4_14 + purity + ploidy)
message("Final linear regression model of TMB across disease stages")
tmb_lm <- lm(data = tmb_fish_eligbile %>%
                     dplyr::mutate("t4_14" = case_when(igh_translocation == "t(4;14)" ~ 1,
                                                       igh_translocation != "t(4;14)" ~ 0)),
             formula = tumor_mutation_burden ~ t4_14 + purity + ploidy)
summary(tmb_lm)


# Calculate age-adjusted TMB using the residuals of the linear fitting
tmb_fish_eligbile$tumor_mutation_burden_corrected <- resid(tmb_lm) + mean(tmb_fish_eligbile$tumor_mutation_burden)

#ggplot(tmb_fish_eligbile, aes(x = age)) +
#  geom_point(aes(y = tumor_mutation_burden, color = "Raw TMB")) +
#  geom_point(aes(y = tumor_mutation_burden_corrected, color = "Corrected TMB"), shape = 16, alpha = 0.7) +
#  scale_color_manual(values = c("Raw TMB" = "blue", "Corrected TMB" = "red"))

message("Median TMB across all patients: ", median(tmb_fish_eligbile$tumor_mutation_burden_corrected, na.rm = T))

# Plot the overall TMB by disease stage
dx_median_tmb <- tmb_fish_eligbile %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(disease_stage) %>%
  dplyr::reframe(median_tmb = median(na.omit(tumor_mutation_burden_corrected)),
                   median_age = median(na.omit(age)))

dx_median_tmb_wilcox_output <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = droplevels(tmb_fish_eligbile %>%
                                                                                 dplyr::select(disease_stage, tumor_mutation_burden_corrected)),
                                                             formula = tumor_mutation_burden_corrected ~ disease_stage,
                                                             p.adjust.method = "fdr")
dx_median_tmb_wilcox_output$p_string <- scientific(dx_median_tmb_wilcox_output$p.adj)

tmb_by_dx <- ggplot(data = tmb_fish_eligbile, aes(x = disease_stage, y = tumor_mutation_burden)) +
  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect",
           xmin = c(0.5, 1.5, 2.5, 3.5),
           xmax = c(1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5),
           ymin = 0.1, ymax = 100,
           alpha = 0.25,
           fill = disease_stage_colors) +
  ggbeeswarm::geom_beeswarm(method = "compactswarm", corral = "wrap") +
  labs(y = "TMB (muts. per Mb)",
       x = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = c("0.1", "1.0", "10", "100"), breaks = c(0.1, 1.0, 10, 100), expand = c(0.03, 0.03)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0.95, family = "sans", size = 14),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(family = "sans", size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(family = "sans", size = 15),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "gray75"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA)) +
  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "segment",
           x = c(0.75, 1.75, 2.75, 3.75),
           xend = c(1.25, 2.25, 3.25, 4.25),
           y = dx_median_tmb$median_tmb,
           yend = dx_median_tmb$median_tmb,
           color = "purple2",
           linewidth = 2.25) +
  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "text",
           x = c(1,2,3,4),
           y = 150,
           label = as.character(round(dx_median_tmb$median_tmb, digits = 2)),
           size = 4.5) +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = dx_median_tmb_wilcox_output[c(4:6),],
                             label = "P={p_string}",
                             y.position = c(1.28,1.47,1.69),
                             tip.length = 0.008,
                             label.size = 3.75,
                             vjust = 0.1) +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = dx_median_tmb_wilcox_output[c(1,2),],
                             label = "{p.adj.signif}",
                             y.position = c(0.8,1.06),
                             tip.length = 0.008,
                             label.size = 3.75,
                             vjust = 0.1)

# Convert to simpler representation for mutation type, and take top consequence for each mutation if >1 given
# coding (in exon) vs non-conding (not in exon as by ensembl)
fish_muts_hq <-gr2dt(grbind(snv_fish_final,indel_fish_final)) %>%
                 dplyr::rename("patient" = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode, "sample" = Tumor_Sample_Barcode) %>%
                 dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_metadata,
                                  by = c("patient","sample"))

fish_muts_hq <- fish_muts_hq %>%
  dplyr::mutate("mut_type" = case_when(Variant_Type == "SNP" ~ "SNVs",
                                       Variant_Type %in% c("INS", "DEL") ~ "InDels"),
                "csq" = stringr::str_replace_all(string = str_split(string = fish_muts_hq$Consequence, pattern = ",", simplify = T)[,1] ,
                                                 pattern = "_",
                                                 replacement = " ")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("impact" = case_when(csq %in% c("splice acceptor variant","splice donor variant","stop gained","frameshift variant","stop lost","start lost") ~ "High",
                                     csq %in% c("inframe insertion","inframe deletion","missense variant","protein altering variant") ~ "Moderate",
                                     csq == "splice region variant" ~ "Low",
                                     csq %in% c("coding sequence variant","mature miRNA variant","5 prime UTR variant","3 prime UTR variant",
                                                "non coding transcript exon variant","intron variant","upstream gene variant","downstream gene variant",
                                                "TF binding site variant","regulatory region variant","intergenic variant") ~ "Modifier"),
                "c_vs_nc" = case_when(csq %in% c("splice acceptor variant","splice donor variant","protein altering variant","splice region variant",
                                                 "mature miRNA variant","5 prime UTR variant","3 prime UTR variant","non coding transcript exon variant",
                                                 "intron variant","upstream gene variant","downstream gene variant","TF binding site variant",
                                                 "regulatory region variant","intergenic variant") ~ "Non-coding",
                                      csq %in% c("stop gained","frameshift variant","stop lost","start lost", "inframe insertion","inframe deletion",
                                                 "missense variant","coding sequence variant") ~ "Coding"))

fish_muts_hq$age <- as.numeric(fish_muts_hq$age)

# reorder csq from hig to low
fish_muts_hq$csq <- factor(fish_muts_hq$csq,
                           levels = c("splice acceptor variant","splice donor variant","stop gained","frameshift variant","stop lost","start lost",
                                      "inframe insertion","inframe deletion","missense variant","protein altering variant",
                                      "splice region variant",
                                      "coding sequence variant","mature miRNA variant","5 prime UTR variant","3 prime UTR variant",
                                      "non coding transcript exon variant","intron variant","upstream gene variant","downstream gene variant",
                                      "TF binding site variant","regulatory region variant","intergenic variant"
                                      ))

# reorder impact
fish_muts_hq$impact <- factor(fish_muts_hq$impact,
                           levels = c("High", "Moderate", "Low", "Modifier"))

# order coding vs non-coding
fish_muts_hq$c_vs_nc <- factor(fish_muts_hq$c_vs_nc,
                           levels = c("Coding", "Non-coding"))

# Plot count per consequence
disease_stage_order <- c("MGUS", "SMM", "MM", "RRMM")

# SNVs and InDels together
csq_plot_list <- list()
impact_plot_list <- list()
for(i in 1:length(disease_stage_order)) {
  csq_plt <- ggplot(data = fish_muts_hq %>%
                dplyr::group_by(csq, .drop = F) %>%
                dplyr::filter(disease_stage == disease_stage_order[i]) %>%
                dplyr::count(.drop = FALSE)) +
  ggplot2::geom_col(aes(x = csq, y = n, fill = csq)) +
  ggfittext::geom_bar_text(aes(x = csq, y = n, label = n), contrast = T) +
  labs(title = disease_stage_order[i],
       y = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(transform = "log1p",labels = scales::label_comma(accuracy = 1), breaks = c(1000, 10000, 100000, 1000000)) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = c("splice acceptor variant","splice donor variant","stop gained","frameshift variant","stop lost","start lost",
                              "inframe insertion","inframe deletion","missense variant","protein altering variant",
                              "splice region variant",
                              "coding sequence variant","mature miRNA variant","5 prime UTR variant","3 prime UTR variant",
                              "non coding transcript exon variant","intron variant","upstream gene variant","downstream gene variant",
                              "TF binding site variant","regulatory region variant","intergenic variant")) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Consequence",
                    values = c(rev(paletteer_c("ggthemes::Purple", 8)[3:8]),
                               rev(paletteer_c("ggthemes::Brown", 6)[3:6]),
                               "#317197",
                               rev(paletteer_c("ggthemes::Classic Area Green", 14)[4:14]))) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 13))
  # Add the bar plot
  csq_plot_list <- rlist::list.append(csq_plot_list,
                                      csq_plt)
  
  # now add the pie chart
  impact_pie <- ggpie::ggpie(data = fish_muts_hq %>% dplyr::filter(disease_stage == disease_stage_order[i]),
                             group_key = "impact",
                             count_type = "full",
                             label_info = c("count", "ratio"),
                             label_type = "horizon",
                             label_size = 6,
                             label_pos = "out",
                             label_threshold = 50,
                             label_color = c("#613C5F", "#752825", "#295f80", "#357300")) +
                  scale_fill_manual(name = "Impact\nGroup",
                                    values = c("#613C5F", "#752825", "#295f80", "#357300")) +
                  labs(title = disease_stage_order[i]) +
                  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16))
  # Add the bar plot
  impact_plot_list <- rlist::list.append(impact_plot_list,
                                             impact_pie)
  
}

# Combine the Consequence plots per disease stage
csq_plot_by_dx <- ggarrange(plotlist = csq_plot_list, ncol = 1, nrow = 4, common.legend = T, legend = "bottom")
#annotate_figure(p = csq_plot_by_dx,
#                left = text_grob("Mutations", size = 15, rot = 90, hjust = -0.5))
# export 8.27 x 13 landscape

# Impact pie charts
#ggarrange(plotlist = impact_plot_list, ncol = 2, nrow = 2, common.legend = T, legend = "bottom")
# export 6 x 6 portrait

# data split by coding vs non-coding
c_vs_nc_dt <- fish_muts_hq %>%
                dplyr::group_by(c_vs_nc) %>%
                dplyr::count()

coding_vs_noncoding_barplot <- ggplot(data = c_vs_nc_dt) +
  ggplot2::geom_col(aes(x = c_vs_nc, y = n, fill = c_vs_nc), color = "black") +
  ggfittext::geom_bar_text(aes(x = c_vs_nc, y = n, label = scales::comma(n)), contrast = F) +
  labs(y = "Mutations") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.02,0.02), labels = scales::label_comma(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0,1250000)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = paletteer_d("ggsci::alternating_igv")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent", linewidth = 1))
# export 6 x 6 portrait
#coding_vs_noncoding_barplot

message("Percentage of Non-Coding: ",
        round(c_vs_nc_dt %>%
                dplyr::filter(c_vs_nc == "Non-coding") %>%
                dplyr::reframe("pct" = (n / sum(c_vs_nc_dt$n)) * 100) %>%
                dplyr::select(pct) %>%
                as.numeric(),
              digits = 2))

message("Percentage of Coding: ",
        round(c_vs_nc_dt %>%
                dplyr::filter(c_vs_nc == "Coding") %>%
                dplyr::reframe("pct" = (n / sum(c_vs_nc_dt$n)) * 100) %>%
                dplyr::select(pct) %>%
                as.numeric(),
              digits = 2))

# How many intron and intergenic variants are there
message("Percentage of Intronic Variants: ",
        round(fish_muts_hq %>%
                dplyr::filter(csq %in% c("splice acceptor variant","splice donor variant",
                                         "splice region variant","intron variant")) %>%
                dplyr::count() %>%
                dplyr::reframe("pct" = (n / nrow(fish_muts_hq)) * 100) %>%
                dplyr::select(pct) %>%
                as.numeric(),
              digits = 2))
message("Count of Intronic Variants: ",
        fish_muts_hq %>%
          dplyr::filter(csq %in% c("splice acceptor variant","splice donor variant",
                                   "splice region variant","intron variant")) %>%
          dplyr::count() %>%
          dplyr::select(n) %>%
          as.numeric())


message("Percentage of Intergenic Variants: ",
        round(fish_muts_hq %>%
                dplyr::filter(csq %in% c("upstream gene variant","downstream gene variant",
                           "TF binding site variant","regulatory region variant",
                           "intergenic variant")) %>%
                dplyr::count() %>%
                dplyr::reframe("pct" = (n / nrow(fish_muts_hq)) * 100) %>%
                dplyr::select(pct) %>%
                as.numeric(),
              digits = 2))
message("Count of Intronic Variants: ",
        fish_muts_hq %>%
          dplyr::filter(csq %in% c("upstream gene variant","downstream gene variant",
                           "TF binding site variant","regulatory region variant",
                           "intergenic variant")) %>%
          dplyr::count() %>%
          dplyr::select(n) %>%
          as.numeric())

message("Percentage of 3' UTR Variants: ",
        round(fish_muts_hq %>%
                dplyr::filter(csq == "3 prime UTR variant") %>%
                dplyr::count() %>%
                dplyr::reframe("pct" = (n / nrow(fish_muts_hq)) * 100) %>%
                dplyr::select(pct) %>%
                as.numeric(),
              digits = 2))

message("Count of 3' UTR Variants: ",
        fish_muts_hq %>%
          dplyr::filter(csq == "3 prime UTR variant") %>%
          dplyr::count() %>%
          dplyr::select(n) %>%
          as.numeric())

message("Percentage of 5' UTR Variants: ",
        round(fish_muts_hq %>%
                dplyr::filter(csq == "5 prime UTR variant") %>%
                dplyr::count() %>%
                dplyr::reframe("pct" = (n / nrow(fish_muts_hq)) * 100) %>%
                dplyr::select(pct) %>%
                as.numeric(),
              digits = 2))

message("Count of 5' UTR Variants: ",
        fish_muts_hq %>%
          dplyr::filter(csq == "5 prime UTR variant") %>%
          dplyr::count() %>%
          dplyr::select(n) %>%
          as.numeric())
```

**Supplementary Figure 1**

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-1a
#| fig-cap: "**a.** Broad grouping of variants into either coding or non-coding regions. Coding regions were defined as any variant that fell within the coding sequence (CDS) of a protein-coding gene. All others were considered non-coding."
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 3.5
#| out-width: "70%"

supp_fig1a <- coding_vs_noncoding_barplot
supp_fig2c <- annotate_figure(p = csq_plot_by_dx,
                left = text_grob("Mutations", size = 15, rot = 90, hjust = -0.5))
supp_fig1a
```

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-1c
#| fig-cap: "**c.** Annotated consequence of all variants stratified by disease stage. The color of each consequence represents the impact grouping: purple/pink for high impact, red/orange for medium impact, blue for low impact, and green for modifier. SMM, smoldering multiple myeloma; MM, multiple myeloma; RRMM, relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma."
#| fig-height: 9
#| fig-width: 7
#| out-width: "70%"

supp_fig2c
```

TMB calculation for intronic, intergenic, and coding regions
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# # Load full gene annotation GTF
# full_genes_gtf <- devgru::read_gtf_file(gtf_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.108.gtf.gz"))

#                                     "lncRNA","miRNA","protein_coding","TR_C_gene","TR_D_gene",

#                                    dplyr::select(transcript_id) %>%
#                                    dplyr::first() %>%
#                                    as.character()
# }
# 
# # Subset each GR obj to only include the representative transcripts
# per_representative_transcript_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(genes_of_interest %>%
#                                                                         dplyr::filter(transcript_id %in% representative_transcript &
#                                                                                       type == "transcript")))
# per_representative_transcript_exon_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(genes_of_interest %>%
#                                                                   dplyr::filter(transcript_id %in% representative_transcript &
#                                                                                 type == "exon")))
# per_representative_transcript_utr_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(genes_of_interest %>%
#                                                                   dplyr::filter(transcript_id %in% representative_transcript &
#                                                                                 type %in% c("five_prime_utr","three_prime_utr"))))
# 
# # Now build the CDS for each representative transcript per gene
# # subtract out 5' UTR and 3' UTR
# per_representative_transcript_cds <- data.table()
# for(i in 1:n_distinct(per_representative_transcript_utr_gr$gene_name)) {
#   per_representative_transcript_cds <- rrbind(per_representative_transcript_cds,
#                     gr2dt(gr.setdiff(query = per_representative_transcript_exon_gr %Q% (gene_name == unique(per_representative_transcript_utr_gr$gene_name)[i]),
#                                      subject = per_representative_transcript_utr_gr %Q% (gene_name == unique(per_representative_transcript_utr_gr$gene_name)[i]),
#                                      ignore.strand = T)))
# }
# 
# # Need to add in the set of genes that do not have any UTR to the CDS segments
# per_representative_transcript_cds_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(rrbind(per_representative_transcript_cds,
#                                              gr2dt(per_representative_transcript_exon_gr %Q% (!gene_name %in% unique(per_representative_transcript_utr_gr$gene_name))))))
# 
# # To find the intronic regions subtract the exonic regions from the transcript
# per_representative_transcript_intron <- data.table()
# for(i in 1:n_distinct(per_representative_transcript_exon_gr$gene_name)) {
#   per_representative_transcript_intron <- rrbind(per_representative_transcript_intron,
#                     gr2dt(gr.setdiff(query = per_representative_transcript_gr %Q% (gene_name == unique(per_representative_transcript_exon_gr$gene_name)[i]),
#                                      subject = per_representative_transcript_exon_gr %Q% (gene_name == unique(per_representative_transcript_exon_gr$gene_name)[i]),
#                                      ignore.strand = T)))
# }
# 
# # Replace the type designation to intron then convert to GR obj
# per_representative_transcript_intron$type <- "intron"
# per_representative_transcript_intron_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(per_representative_transcript_intron))
# 
# # The final complete gene body set is the CDS + UTR + intron
# complete_gene_body_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(grbind(per_representative_transcript_cds_gr,
#                                                  per_representative_transcript_intron_gr,
#                                                  per_representative_transcript_utr_gr))
# # Convert to DT to build the final GB DT
# complete_gene_body <- gr2dt(complete_gene_body_gr)
# 
# # Final GDT / GGR
# # GRCh38 coordinates in GR obj format (seqnames, start, end, strand)
# # Genomic context of the gene body segment (type)
# # Prioritize gene annotations by gene name (gene_name,gene_id,gene_biotype,gene_source,transcript_id,transcript_name)
# # Some additional classifications for plotting (orientation,coding_v_noncoding,exonic_v_intronic)
# final_gene_dt <- complete_gene_body %>%
#                         dplyr::select(seqnames,start,end,type,gene_name,gene_id,gene_biotype,gene_source,transcript_id,transcript_name) %>%
#                         dplyr::left_join(y = gr2dt(per_representative_transcript_gr) %>% dplyr::select(transcript_id,strand),
#                                          by = "transcript_id") %>%
#                         dplyr::mutate("coding_v_noncoding" = case_when(type == "exon" ~ "coding",
#                                                                        type != "exon" ~ "non_coding"),
#                                       "exonic_v_intronic" = case_when(type %in% c("exon","five_prime_utr","three_prime_utr") ~ "exonic",
#                                                                       type == "intron" ~ "intronic"),
#                                       "orientation" = case_when(strand == "+" ~ 1,
#                                                                 strand == "-" ~ 0)) %>%
#                         dplyr::rename("segment" = type) %>%
#                         dplyr::select(seqnames,start,end,strand,segment,
#                                       gene_name,gene_id,gene_biotype,
#                                       gene_source,transcript_id,transcript_name,
#                                       orientation,coding_v_noncoding,exonic_v_intronic)
# 
# final_gene_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(final_gene_dt))

# Save / load the final GGR
#saveRDS(object = final_gene_gr, file = paste0(base_data_path, "completeGeneSegments.rds"))
complete_gene_segments_gr <- readRDS(file = paste0(base_data_path, "completeGeneSegments.rds"))

# Set the region TMB denominator
cds_regions <- complete_gene_segments_gr %Q% (coding_v_noncoding == "coding" & gene_biotype == "protein_coding")
cds_tmb_denom <- sum(GenomicRanges::width(cds_regions[gr.in(query = cds_regions, subject = eligible_bed)])) / 1e6

five_prime_utr_regions <- complete_gene_segments_gr %Q% (segment == "five_prime_utr" & gene_biotype == "protein_coding")
five_prime_utr_tmb_denom <- sum(GenomicRanges::width(five_prime_utr_regions[gr.in(query = five_prime_utr_regions, subject = eligible_bed)])) / 1e6

three_prime_utr_regions <- complete_gene_segments_gr %Q% (segment == "three_prime_utr" & gene_biotype == "protein_coding")
three_prime_utr_tmb_denom <- sum(GenomicRanges::width(three_prime_utr_regions[gr.in(query = three_prime_utr_regions, subject = eligible_bed)])) / 1e6

intron_regions <- complete_gene_segments_gr %Q% (segment == "intron" & gene_biotype == "protein_coding")
intron_tmb_denom <- sum(GenomicRanges::width(intron_regions[gr.in(query = intron_regions, subject = eligible_bed)])) / 1e6

intergenic_regions <- eligible_bed %_% complete_gene_segments_gr
intergenic_tmb_denom <- sum(GenomicRanges::width(intergenic_regions)) / 1e6


# With the regions of interest set, now calculate the TMB for each
cds_tmb <- fish_muts_hq %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(y = rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
                         dplyr::select(seqnames,start,Reference_Allele,Tumor_Seq_Allele2,sample,patient),
                    by = c("seqnames","start","Reference_Allele","Tumor_Seq_Allele2","sample","patient")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(patient,sample,disease_stage,age,sex,igh_translocation,purity,ploidy,super5_cluster_id) %>%
  dplyr::filter(c_vs_nc == "Coding") %>%
  dplyr::count() %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate("tmb" = n / cds_tmb_denom,
                 "genomic_context" = "CDS")

five_prime_utr_tmb <- fish_muts_hq %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(y = rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
                         dplyr::select(seqnames,start,Reference_Allele,Tumor_Seq_Allele2,sample,patient),
                    by = c("seqnames","start","Reference_Allele","Tumor_Seq_Allele2","sample","patient")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(patient,sample,disease_stage,age,sex,igh_translocation,purity,ploidy,super5_cluster_id) %>%
  dplyr::filter(csq == "5 prime UTR variant") %>%
  dplyr::count() %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate("tmb" = n / five_prime_utr_tmb_denom,
                 "genomic_context" = "5' UTR")

three_prime_utr_tmb <- fish_muts_hq %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(y = rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
                         dplyr::select(seqnames,start,Reference_Allele,Tumor_Seq_Allele2,sample,patient),
                    by = c("seqnames","start","Reference_Allele","Tumor_Seq_Allele2","sample","patient")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(patient,sample,disease_stage,age,sex,igh_translocation,purity,ploidy,super5_cluster_id) %>%
  dplyr::filter(csq == "3 prime UTR variant") %>%
  dplyr::count() %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate("tmb" = n / three_prime_utr_tmb_denom,
                 "genomic_context" = "3' UTR")

intron_tmb <- fish_muts_hq %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(y = rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
                         dplyr::select(seqnames,start,Reference_Allele,Tumor_Seq_Allele2,sample,patient),
                    by = c("seqnames","start","Reference_Allele","Tumor_Seq_Allele2","sample","patient")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(patient,sample,disease_stage,age,sex,igh_translocation,purity,ploidy,super5_cluster_id) %>%
  dplyr::filter(csq %in% c("splice acceptor variant","splice donor variant",
                           "splice region variant","intron variant")) %>%
  dplyr::count() %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate("tmb" = n / intron_tmb_denom,
                 "genomic_context" = "Intron")

intergenic_tmb <- fish_muts_hq %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(y = rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
                         dplyr::select(seqnames,start,Reference_Allele,Tumor_Seq_Allele2,sample,patient),
                    by = c("seqnames","start","Reference_Allele","Tumor_Seq_Allele2","sample","patient")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(patient,sample,disease_stage,age,sex,igh_translocation,purity,ploidy,super5_cluster_id) %>%
  dplyr::filter(csq %in% c("upstream gene variant","downstream gene variant",
                           "TF binding site variant","regulatory region variant",
                           "intergenic variant")) %>%
  dplyr::count() %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate("tmb" = n / intergenic_tmb_denom,
                 "genomic_context" = "Intergenic")

# Plot the TMB per sequence classification
genomic_context_tmb <- rrbind(cds_tmb, five_prime_utr_tmb, three_prime_utr_tmb,
                              intron_tmb, intergenic_tmb) %>%
                        dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex) & !is.na(age) &  !is.na(igh_translocation) & !is.na(purity) & !is.na(ploidy))

# Correct the TMB by age by fitting a linear model
message("Testing linear regression of TMB and demographic / molecular covariates")
test_genomic_lm <- lm(data = genomic_context_tmb,
             formula = tmb ~ age + igh_translocation + purity + ploidy)
summary(test_genomic_lm)

# Looks to be over fit with all this, will remove 'male' as the sex chromosomes are already removed
message("Final linear regression model of TMB across genomic regions")
genomic_tmb_lm <- lm(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
                     dplyr::mutate("t14_16" = case_when(igh_translocation == "t(14;16)" ~ 1,
                                                       igh_translocation != "t(14;16)" ~ 0)),
             formula = tmb ~ age + t14_16 + purity)
#genomic_tmb_lm <- lm(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
#                     dplyr::mutate("t14_16" = case_when(igh_translocation == "t(14;16)" ~ 1,
#                                                       igh_translocation != "t(14;16)" ~ 0),
#                                   "male" = case_when(sex == "Male" ~ 1,
#                                                       sex != "Male" ~ 0)),
#             formula = tmb ~ male + age + t14_16 + purity)
summary(genomic_tmb_lm)

# Calculate age-adjusted TMB using the residuals of the linear fitting
genomic_context_tmb$tmb_corrected <- resid(genomic_tmb_lm) + mean(genomic_context_tmb$tmb)

genomic_context_median_tmb <- genomic_context_tmb %>%
  dplyr::filter(tmb_corrected > 0) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(genomic_context) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("median_tmb" = median(na.omit(tmb_corrected)))

genomic_context_tmb$genomic_context <- factor(genomic_context_tmb$genomic_context,
                                              levels = c("CDS","3' UTR","Intron","5' UTR","Intergenic"))

genomic_context_tmb_wilcox_output <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb,
                                                                   formula = tmb_corrected ~ genomic_context)
genomic_context_tmb_wilcox_output$p_string <- scientific(genomic_context_tmb_wilcox_output$p.adj)

tmb_by_genomic_region <- ggplot(genomic_context_tmb, aes(x = genomic_context, y = tmb_corrected)) +
  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect",
           xmin = c(0.5, 1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5),
           xmax = c(1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5, 5.5),
           ymin = 0.01, ymax = 100,
           alpha = 0.25,
           fill = paletteer_d("ggsci::hallmarks_light_cosmic")[1:5]) +
  ggbeeswarm::geom_beeswarm(method = "compactswarm", corral = "wrap") +
  labs(y = "TMB (muts. per Mb)",
       x = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = c("0.01", "0.1", "1.0", "10", "100"), breaks = c(0.01, 0.1, 1.0, 10, 100), expand = c(0.03, 0.03)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0.95, family = "sans", size = 14),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(family = "sans", size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(family = "sans", size = 15),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "gray75"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA)) +
  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "segment",
           x = c(0.65, 1.65, 2.65, 3.65, 4.65),
           xend = c(1.35, 2.35, 3.35, 4.35, 5.35),
           y = genomic_context_median_tmb$median_tmb[c(3,1,5,2,4)],
           yend = genomic_context_median_tmb$median_tmb[c(3,1,5,2,4)],
           color = "green",
           linewidth = 2.25) +
  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "text",
           x = c(1,2,3,4,5),
           y = 150,
           label = as.character(round(genomic_context_median_tmb$median_tmb[c(3,1,5,2,4)], digits = 2)),
           size = 4.5) +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = genomic_context_tmb_wilcox_output[1,],
                             label = "P={p.adj}",
                             y.position = 0.84,
                             tip.length = 0.008,
                             label.size = 3.75,
                             vjust = 0.1) +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = genomic_context_tmb_wilcox_output[c(2:4),],
                             label = "P={p_string}",
                             y.position = c(1.13,1.40,1.64),
                             tip.length = 0.008,
                             label.size = 3.75,
                             vjust = 0.1)

# SPLiT BY DISEASE STAGE
genomic_context_median_tmb_by_dx <- genomic_context_tmb %>%
  dplyr::filter(tmb_corrected > 0) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(genomic_context,disease_stage) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("median_tmb" = median(na.omit(tmb_corrected)))

cds_tmb_by_dx_wilcox <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
                                       dplyr::filter(genomic_context == "CDS") %>%
                                       droplevels(),
                              formula = tmb_corrected ~ disease_stage)

three_prime_utr_tmb_by_dx_wilcox <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
                                       dplyr::filter(genomic_context == "3' UTR") %>%
                                       droplevels(),
                              formula = tmb_corrected ~ disease_stage)

five_prime_utr_tmb_by_dx_wilcox <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
                                       dplyr::filter(genomic_context == "5' UTR") %>%
                                       droplevels(),
                              formula = tmb_corrected ~ disease_stage)

intron_tmb_by_dx_wilcox <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
                                       dplyr::filter(genomic_context == "Intron") %>%
                                       droplevels(),
                              formula = tmb_corrected ~ disease_stage)

intergenic_tmb_by_dx_wilcox <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
                                       dplyr::filter(genomic_context == "Intergenic") %>%
                                       droplevels(),
                              formula = tmb_corrected ~ disease_stage)

#regional_median_tmb_wilcox_output$p_string <- scientific(regional_median_tmb_wilcox_output$p.adj)
   
tmb_by_genomic_context_by_dx <- ggplot(genomic_context_tmb, aes(x = genomic_context, y = tmb_corrected, colour = disease_stage)) +
  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect",
           xmin = c(0.5, 1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5),
           xmax = c(1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5, 5.5),
           ymin = 0.01, ymax = 10,
           alpha = 0.25,
           fill = paletteer_d("ggsci::hallmarks_light_cosmic")[1:5]) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(y = "Tumor mutational burden (muts. per Mb)",
       x = NULL) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = c("0.01", "0.1", "1.0", "10"), breaks = c(0.01, 0.1, 1.0, 10), expand = c(0.03, 0.03)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Disease\nStage", values = disease_stage_colors) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0.95, family = "sans", size = 14),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(family = "sans", size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(family = "sans", size = 16),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "gray75"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA)) +
  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "segment",
           x = 4.1,
           xend = 4.3,
           y = 9.15,
           yend = 9.15,
           linewidth = 0.50) +
  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "text",
           x = 4.2,
           y = 11.5,
           size = 4.5,
           angle = 0,
           label = paste0("P=", five_prime_utr_tmb_by_dx_wilcox[6,]$p.adj))
```

Now look at results of Pan-Myeloma fishHook model
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Looking at fishHook model output
# Analysis of model output
snv_sushi_results <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/panMyeloma/mgp1000_snv_results.sushi.rds"))
indel_sushi_results <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/panMyeloma/mgp1000_indel_results.sushi.rds"))

# Visualize in a genome-wide fashion like GWAS for tiles
snv_sushi_results$mut_type <- "SNV"
indel_sushi_results$mut_type <- "InDel"

sushi_combo <- gr_refactor_seqs(grbind(dt2gr(snv_sushi_results), dt2gr(indel_sushi_results)))
sushi_for_plot <- gr_absolute_ranges(input_gr = sushi_combo, cpus = 2)

sushi_for_plot$mut_type <- factor(sushi_for_plot$mut_type,
                                  levels = c("SNV", "InDel"))

#sushi_for_plot$true_gene <- complete_gene_segments_gr$gene_name[nearest(x = sushi_for_plot,
#                                                            subject = gUtils::gr.stripstrand(complete_gene_segments_gr))]

# After manual inspection of nearest protein coding genes and expanded overlapping genes
# we updated the assignment of genes for the following MERs
# TSPOAP1          ====>   MIR142
# CSDE1            ====>   NRAS
# BLOC1S5-TXNDC5.  ====>   TXNDC5
# FRMD8            ====>   NEAT1

# QQ plots
# SNVs
# First grab disease specific set and order by most FDR significance
panmy_snv_fishhook <- gr2dt(sushi_for_plot) %>%
  dplyr::filter(mut_type == "SNV") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(fdr) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("true_gene_label" = case_when(nearest_gene == "TSPOAP1" ~ "MIR142",
                                              nearest_gene == "CSDE1" ~ "NRAS",
                                              nearest_gene == "BLOC1S5-TXNDC5" ~ "TXNDC5",
                                              nearest_gene == "FRMD8" ~ "NEAT1",
                                              .default = nearest_gene))

# Top 10 genes
panmy_snv_top_fishhook_genes <- panmy_snv_fishhook %>%
  dplyr::filter(fdr < 0.05) %>%
  dplyr::select(true_gene_label) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  as.character()

# Get index of all tiles per top gene
panmy_snv_top_gene_idx <- which(c(panmy_snv_fishhook %>%
                              dplyr::select(true_gene_label) %>%
                              purrr::as_vector() %>%
                              as.character()) %in% panmy_snv_top_fishhook_genes)

# Build the color vector for each dot, highlight labels of interest and black for the rest
panmy_snv_color_idx <- data.table("idx" = seq(1,nrow(panmy_snv_fishhook))) %>%
                   dplyr::mutate("color_idx" = case_when(idx %in% panmy_snv_top_gene_idx ~ "cyan",
                                                         !idx %in% panmy_snv_top_gene_idx ~ "black"))

# Get the gene labels, only 1 for each set of top tiles
panmy_snv_gene_manhattan_labs <- panmy_snv_fishhook %>%
  dplyr::mutate("top_gene_idx" = !duplicated(true_gene_label)) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("label" = case_when(true_gene_label %in% panmy_snv_top_fishhook_genes &
                                        top_gene_idx == T ~ true_gene_label,
                                     !true_gene_label %in% panmy_snv_top_fishhook_genes ~ NA))

# fishHook QQ plot
panmy_snv_fish_qq <- geom_fishhook_qq(fishhook_results = panmy_snv_fishhook,
                                      plot_title = "Pan-Myeloma",
                                      hightlight_vector = panmy_snv_color_idx$color_idx,
                                      label_vector = panmy_snv_gene_manhattan_labs$label,
                                      manual_lambda = 1.09,
                                      label_x_nudge = 15)

# InDels
panmy_indel_fishhook <- gr2dt(sushi_for_plot) %>%
  dplyr::filter(mut_type == "InDel") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(fdr) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("true_gene_label" = case_when(nearest_gene == "BLOC1S5-TXNDC5" ~ "TXNDC5",
                                              nearest_gene == "BMP6" ~ "TXNDC5",
                                              .default = nearest_gene))

panmy_indel_top_fishhook_genes <- panmy_indel_fishhook %>%
  dplyr::filter(fdr < 0.05) %>%
  dplyr::select(true_gene_label) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  as.character()

panmy_indel_top_gene_idx <- which(c(panmy_indel_fishhook %>%
                              dplyr::select(true_gene_label) %>%
                              purrr::as_vector() %>%
                              as.character()) %in% panmy_indel_top_fishhook_genes)

panmy_indel_color_idx <- data.table("idx" = seq(1,nrow(panmy_indel_fishhook))) %>%
                   dplyr::mutate("color_idx" = case_when(idx %in% panmy_indel_top_gene_idx ~ "cyan",
                                                         !idx %in% panmy_indel_top_gene_idx ~ "black"))

panmy_indel_gene_manhattan_labs <- panmy_indel_fishhook %>%
  dplyr::mutate("top_gene_idx" = !duplicated(true_gene_label)) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("label" = case_when(true_gene_label %in% panmy_indel_top_fishhook_genes &
                                        top_gene_idx == T ~ true_gene_label,
                                     !true_gene_label %in% panmy_indel_top_fishhook_genes ~ NA))

# fishHook QQ plot
panmy_indel_fish_qq <- geom_fishhook_qq(fishhook_results = panmy_indel_fishhook,
                                      plot_title = "Pan-Myeloma",
                                      hightlight_vector = panmy_indel_color_idx$color_idx,
                                      label_vector = panmy_indel_gene_manhattan_labs$label,
                                      manual_lambda = 1.01,
                                      label_x_nudge = -2.5)

# Full genome view of SNV and InDel tiles
fishtiles <- ggplot(data = gr2dt(sushi_for_plot)) +
  scattermore::geom_scattermore(aes(x = start_abs_linear, y = -log10(fdr), color = mut_type), alpha = 0.5, pointsize = 3.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkred") +
  labs(y = expression("-log"[10]*"("*italic("FDR")*")")) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1, last(linearized_hg38_end_breaks[1:22])),
                     labels = names(hg_seqlengths()[1:22]),
                     breaks = linearized_hg38_midpoint_breaks[1:22],
                     expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,max(-log10(sushi_for_plot$fdr)) + 7), expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Mutation Type", values = c("#191970", "#EEA9B8")) +
  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect",
           xmin = c(1, linearized_hg38_end_breaks[1:21]),
           xmax = linearized_hg38_end_breaks[1:22],
           ymin = 0,
           ymax = max(-log10(sushi_for_plot$fdr)) + 7,
           alpha = 0.18,
           fill = linearized_hg38_strip_fill[1:22]) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 0.95),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))
# export 6 x 11.69 landscape
```

Check tiles across disease stage specific models
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

dx_sushi_combo <- data.table()
for(i in 1:length(disease_stage_order)) {
  # Read in the disease specific results
  dx_snv_sushi_results <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/diseaseStageSpecific/", disease_stage_order[i], "_snv_results.sushi.rds"))
  dx_indel_sushi_results <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/diseaseStageSpecific/", disease_stage_order[i], "_indel_results.sushi.rds"))
  
  # Add disease stage to DT
  dx_snv_sushi_results$disease_stage <- disease_stage_order[i]
  dx_indel_sushi_results$disease_stage <- disease_stage_order[i]
  
  # Add mutation type
  dx_snv_sushi_results$mut_type <- "SNV"
  dx_indel_sushi_results$mut_type <- "InDel"
  
  # Combine the data for plotting
  dx_sushi_combo <- gUtils::rrbind(dx_sushi_combo,
                                   dx_snv_sushi_results,
                                   dx_indel_sushi_results)
}

# Convert DT to GR
dx_sushi_combo_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(dx_sushi_combo))

# Add absolute range
#dx_sushi_for_plot <- gr_absolute_ranges(input_gr = dx_sushi_combo_gr, cpus = 2)
dx_sushi_for_plot <- gr2dt(dx_sushi_combo_gr)
dx_sushi_for_plot$disease_stage <- factor(dx_sushi_for_plot$disease_stage,
                                          levels = disease_stage_order)
dx_sushi_for_plot$mut_type <- factor(dx_sushi_for_plot$mut_type,
                                     levels = c("SNV", "InDel"))
```

Generate fishHook SNV QQ plots
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

message("fishHook SNV QQ plots")
# Annotate the top genes
# MGUS
# First grab disease specific set and order by most FDR significance
mgus_snv_fishhook <- dx_sushi_for_plot %>%
  dplyr::filter(disease_stage == "MGUS" & mut_type == "SNV") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(fdr) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("true_gene_label" = case_when(nearest_gene == "TSPOAP1" ~ "MIR142",
                                              nearest_gene == "CSDE1" ~ "NRAS",
                                              nearest_gene == "BLOC1S5-TXNDC5" ~ "TXNDC5",
                                              nearest_gene == "FRMD8" ~ "NEAT1",
                                              nearest_gene == "BMP6" ~ "TXNDC5",
                                              .default = nearest_gene))

# Top 10 genes
mgus_snv_top_fishhook_genes <- mgus_snv_fishhook %>%
  dplyr::filter(fdr < 0.05) %>%
  dplyr::select(true_gene_label) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  as.character()

# Get index of all tiles per top gene
mgus_snv_top_gene_idx <- which(c(mgus_snv_fishhook %>%
                              dplyr::select(true_gene_label) %>%
                              purrr::as_vector() %>%
                              as.character()) %in% mgus_snv_top_fishhook_genes)

# Build the color vector for each dot, highlight labels of interest and black for the rest
mgus_snv_color_idx <- data.table("idx" = seq(1,nrow(mgus_snv_fishhook))) %>%
                   dplyr::mutate("color_idx" = case_when(idx %in% mgus_snv_top_gene_idx ~ "cyan",
                                                         !idx %in% mgus_snv_top_gene_idx ~ "black"))

# Get the gene labels, only 1 for each set of top tiles
mgus_snv_gene_manhattan_labs <- mgus_snv_fishhook %>%
  dplyr::mutate("top_gene_idx" = !duplicated(true_gene_label)) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("label" = case_when(true_gene_label %in% mgus_snv_top_fishhook_genes &
                                        top_gene_idx == T ~ true_gene_label,
                                     !true_gene_label %in% mgus_snv_top_fishhook_genes ~ NA))

# fishHook QQ plot
mgus_snv_fish_qq <- geom_fishhook_qq(fishhook_results = mgus_snv_fishhook,
                                     plot_title = "SNVs",
                                     hightlight_vector = mgus_snv_color_idx$color_idx,
                                     label_vector = mgus_snv_gene_manhattan_labs$label,
                                     label_x_nudge = -2,
                                     manual_lambda = 1.00)

###############
```
