```{r}
                                                 ref = "ref",
                                                 alt = "alt",
                                                 bsg = BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)

# Generate a 96 class SBS profile
rrmm_mer_sig_96_p <- plot_sbs96(rrmm_mer_sig_96) +
                       labs(title = "RRMM MERs") +
                       theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))

# Translate data for use in mmsig
rrmm_mer_sig_96$Total<- rowSums(rrmm_mer_sig_96)
rrmm_mer_sig_96_transpose<- as.data.frame.matrix(t(rrmm_mer_sig_96))

# Fit the signatures
# Complete set of all MER mutations
rrmm_mer_sig_96_out <- mm_fit_signatures(muts.input = rrmm_mer_sig_96_transpose,
                                    sig.input = sig_ref_cosmic_v3_2_hg38,
                                    input.format = "classes",
                                    sample.sigt.profs = NULL,
                                    strandbias = FALSE,
                                    bootstrap = FALSE,
                                    genome = "hg38",
                                    dbg = FALSE,
                                    force_include = NULL)

rrmm_mer_sigs_t <- reshape2::melt(data = rrmm_mer_sig_96_out$estimate %>%
                                              tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "sample") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(-mutations) %>%
                                              as.data.table(),
                                    id.vars = "sample",
                                    variable.name = "signature",
                                    value.name = "rel_contrib")

rrmm_mer_sigs_t$signature <- factor(rrmm_mer_sigs_t$signature,
                                      levels = mmsig_signames_updated)

rrmm_mer_mmsig_bar_p <- ggplot(rrmm_mer_sigs_t, aes(x = sample, y = rel_contrib, fill = signature)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Signature", values = mmsig_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "RRMM",
       y = "Relative Contribution") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))

# export 4 x 11 landscape

message("SBS Signatures found in MERs:")
round(t(rrmm_mer_sig_96_out$estimate[-10]) * 100, digits = 2)

# Convert from relative to absolute for the signatures
rrmm_mer_abs_sig_contrib <- as.data.frame(t(rrmm_mer_sig_96_out$estimate[-10])) %>%
                        tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "signatures") %>%
                        dplyr::mutate("abs_burden" = round(RRMM * (rrmm_mer_sig_96$Total / n_distinct(raw_rrmm_mer_sig_muts$sample)), digits = 0),
                                      "group" = "RRMM")
#ggplot(rrmm_mer_abs_sig_contrib) +
#  ggplot2::geom_col(aes(x = signatures, y = abs_burden))
```

Convert relative burden of MER signatures to absolute
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Need to include difference in relative change to sims
non_mer_sim_sigs_t <- as.data.frame(t(mean_non_mer_sim_mmsig_sbs[,-10])) %>% 
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "signature") %>%
  dplyr::rename("rel_contrib" = V1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("sample" = "Simulated\nNon-MERs")

mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta <- rbind(mgus_mer_sigs_t,
      smm_mer_sigs_t,
      mm_mer_sigs_t,
      rrmm_mer_sigs_t) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = non_mer_sim_sigs_t %>%
                        dplyr::mutate("init_val" = rel_contrib + .Machine$double.eps) %>%
                        dplyr::select(signature,init_val),
                   by = "signature") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("abs_change_from_sim" = round(((rel_contrib + .Machine$double.eps) - init_val) * 100, digits = 2)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta$sample <- factor(mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta$sample,
                                                 levels = disease_stage_order)

mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta$signature <- factor(mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta$signature,
                                                 levels = mmsig_signames_updated)

mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta_plot <- ggplot(mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta, aes(x = sample, y = abs_change_from_sim, fill = signature)) +
  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect",
           xmin = c(0.5, 1.5, 2.5, 3.5),
           xmax = c(1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5),
           ymin = -20, ymax = 40,
           alpha = 0.15,
           fill = disease_stage_colors) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.75) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Signature", values = mmsig_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.03,0.03), labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1, scale = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Difference in contribution relative to non-MERs") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))

# Look at differences between MERs and non-MERs
message("SBSblood in MERs compared to non-MERs:")
mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta %>%
  dplyr::filter(signature == "SBSblood")
mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta %>%
  dplyr::filter(signature == "SBSblood") %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_diff_pct" = mean(abs_change_from_sim))

message("SBS9 (AID) in MERs compared to non-MERs:")
mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta %>%
  dplyr::filter(signature == "SBS9") 
mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta %>%
  dplyr::filter(signature == "SBS9") %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_diff_pct" = mean(abs_change_from_sim))

message("SBS1 (clock-like) in MERs compared to non-MERs:")
mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta %>%
  dplyr::filter(signature == "SBS1")
mer_vs_non_mer_sig_pct_delta %>%
  dplyr::filter(signature == "SBS1") %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_diff_pct" = mean(abs_change_from_sim))

# Calculate the absolute burden in MERs vs Non-MERs
non_mer_sim_abs_sig_contrib <- as.data.frame(t(mean_non_mer_sim_mmsig_sbs[,-10])) %>% 
                                 tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "signatures") %>%
                                 dplyr::mutate("abs_burden" = round(V1 * (mean_non_mer_sim_mmsig_sbs$mutations / mean(trunc_complete_sim_sbs$n_patients)), digits = 0),
                                               "group" = "Simulated\nNon-MERs")

# if raw difference from sim vs disease stage is necessary (i.e. negative values)
sig_abs_burden_comparison <- tibble::as_tibble(rbind(mgus_mer_abs_sig_contrib[c(1,3,4)],
                                                     smm_mer_abs_sig_contrib[,c(1,3,4)],
                                                     mm_mer_abs_sig_contrib[,c(1,3,4)],
                                                     rrmm_mer_abs_sig_contrib[,c(1,3,4)],
                                                     non_mer_sim_abs_sig_contrib[,c(1,3,4)]))

#sig_abs_burden_comparison$group <- factor(sig_abs_burden_comparison$group,
#                                          levels = c("MGUS","SMM","MM","RRMM"))

sig_abs_burden_comparison$group <- factor(sig_abs_burden_comparison$group,
                                          levels = c("MGUS","SMM","MM","RRMM","Simulated\nNon-MERs"))

sig_abs_burden_comparison$signatures <- factor(sig_abs_burden_comparison$signatures,
                                               levels = mmsig_signames_updated)

sig_abs_burden_barplot <- ggplot(sig_abs_burden_comparison, aes(x = group, y = abs_burden, fill = signatures)) +
  ggplot2::geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Signature", values = mmsig_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.03,0.03), limits = c(0,45)) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Absolute Burden") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))

#ggplot(sig_abs_burden_comparison, aes(x = group, y = abs_foldchange_from_sim, fill = signatures)) +
#  annotate(geom = "rect",
#           xmin = c(0.5, 1.5, 2.5, 3.5),
#          xmax = c(1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5),
#           ymin = -5, ymax = 5,
#           alpha = 0.15,
#           fill = disease_stage_colors) +
#  ggplot2::geom_col(position = "dodge") +
#  scale_fill_manual(name = "Signature", values = mmsig_colors) +
#  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.03,0.03), limits = c(0,15)) +
#  labs(x = NULL,
#       y = "Mutations") +
#  theme(legend.position = "right",
#        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
#        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))

# Look at fold change in snv burden differences between MERs and non-MERs
sig_abs_burden_fc_comparison <- rbind(mgus_mer_abs_sig_contrib[,c(1,3,4)],
                                  smm_mer_abs_sig_contrib[,c(1,3,4)],
                                  mm_mer_abs_sig_contrib[,c(1,3,4)],
                                  rrmm_mer_abs_sig_contrib[,c(1,3,4)]) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = non_mer_sim_abs_sig_contrib %>%
                        dplyr::mutate("init_val" = abs_burden + .Machine$double.eps) %>%
                        dplyr::select(signatures,init_val),
                   by = "signatures") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(group) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("abs_foldchange_from_sim" = ((abs_burden + .Machine$double.eps) - init_val) / init_val) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()


message("SBSblood in MERs compared to non-MERs:")
sig_abs_burden_fc_comparison %>%
  dplyr::filter(signatures == "SBSblood")
sig_abs_burden_fc_comparison %>%
  dplyr::filter(signatures == "SBSblood") %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_diff_fc" = mean(abs_foldchange_from_sim))

message("SBS9 in MERs compared to non-MERs:")
sig_abs_burden_fc_comparison %>%
  dplyr::filter(signatures == "SBS9")
sig_abs_burden_fc_comparison %>%
  dplyr::filter(signatures == "SBS9") %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_diff_fc" = mean(abs_foldchange_from_sim))
```

```{r}
# Run the workflow
denovo_id83a_decomp_plot <- create_decomposition_figure(
  denovo_txt = paste0(base_data_path, "sigProfilerSBSandIDsigs/mers/ID83/Suggested_Solution/ID83_De-Novo_Solution/Signatures/ID83_De-Novo_Signatures.txt"),
  decomposition_csv = paste0(base_data_path, "sigProfilerSBSandIDsigs/mers/ID83/Suggested_Solution/COSMIC_ID83_Decomposed_Solution/De_Novo_map_to_COSMIC_ID83.csv"),
  cosmic_reference = paste0(base_data_path, "sigProfilerSBSandIDsigs/mers/ID83/Suggested_Solution/COSMIC_ID83_Decomposed_Solution/Signatures/COSMIC_ID83_Signatures.txt"),
  sig_type = "ID"
)
```

## The genome topography at MERs is in an accessible and active conformation

SigProfilerTopography analysis output
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

sigpro_topography_output <- data.table::fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "Step1_Signature_Biosample_DNAElement_PValue.txt"),
                                              sep = "\t",
                                              header = T)
pan_myeloma_topography <- sigpro_topography_output %>%
  dplyr::filter(signature == "aggregatedsubstitutions" & biosample != "K562") %>%
  dplyr::mutate("topography" = str_remove(string = dna_element, pattern = "[ENCFF|RefEpigenome].*_"))
  
pan_myeloma_topography$biosample <- pan_myeloma_topography$biosample %>% dplyr::recode_factor(`Myeloma` = "Myeloma\nPatients")

pan_myeloma_topography$biosample <- factor(pan_myeloma_topography$biosample,
                                           levels = c("Myeloma\nPatients","MM1S","KMS11"))

pan_myeloma_topography$topography <- factor(pan_myeloma_topography$topography,
                                            levels = c("CTCF","H4K20me1","DNase","ATAC",
                                                       "H3K36me3","H3K27me3","H3K4me3","H3K4me1","H3K27ac"))

occupancy_fc_heatmap <- ggplot(data = pan_myeloma_topography,
       aes(x = biosample, y = topography, fill = fold_change,
           label = paste0(p_star(p_value),
                          "\n",
                          round(fold_change, digits = 2)))) +
  geom_tile() +
  labs(caption = p_signif_codes) +
  ggfittext::geom_fit_text(contrast = T) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name = "Fold Change\n(Real vs. Simulated)",
                       midpoint = 1.0,
                       low = "#2E2A2B",
                       high = "#CF4E9C",
                       mid = "white") +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        plot.caption = element_text(size = 10),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))
# export 7 x 9 portrait
```

Epigenomics occupancy profiles for MM patients
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Cycle through epigenomic marks, collect signal from observed mutations and
# each simulation run
epigenomic_mark <- c("H3K27ac", "H3K4me1", "H3K4me3", "H3K27me3", "H3K36me3", "ATAC")
occupancy_enrichment_profile_list <- list()
for(i in 1:length(epigenomic_mark)) {
  # Read in observed signal
  obs_occupancy_profile <- data.table("mean_signal" = data.table::fread(file = paste0(base_data_path,
                                                                                 "epigenomicOccupancy/observed/Myeloma/PanMyeloma-MER_RefEpigenome_Myeloma_",
                                                                                 epigenomic_mark[i],
                                                                                 "_AverageSignalArray.txt")) %>%
                                               purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                               as.numeric(),
                                      "region" = "MERs",
                                      "pos" = seq(-1000,1000,1))
  
  # Read in each simulated signal
  total_sim_occupancy_profile <- data.table()
  for(j in 1:5) {
    per_sim_occupancy_profile <- data.table("signal" = data.table::fread(file = paste0(base_data_path,
                                                                                 "epigenomicOccupancy/simulated/Myeloma/PanMyeloma-MER_",
                                                                                 "sim",
                                                                                 j,
                                                                                 "_RefEpigenome_Myeloma_",
                                                                                 epigenomic_mark[i],
                                                                                 "_AverageSignalArray.txt")) %>%
                                               purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                               as.numeric(),
                                      "region" = "Simulated Non-MERs",
                                      "pos" = seq(-1000,1000,1))
    total_sim_occupancy_profile <- rrbind(total_sim_occupancy_profile,
                                          per_sim_occupancy_profile)
  }
  
  sim_avg_sd_occupancy_profile <- total_sim_occupancy_profile %>%
                                  dplyr::group_by(region,pos) %>%
                                  dplyr::reframe("mean_signal" = mean(signal),
                                                 "sd_signal" = sd(signal))
  
  occupancy_enrichment_profile_plot <- ggplot() +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.8) +
        geom_ribbon(data = sim_avg_sd_occupancy_profile,
                    aes(x = pos, ymin = mean_signal - sd_signal, ymax = mean_signal + sd_signal), fill = "gray70", alpha = 0.5) +
        geom_line(data = rrbind(sim_avg_sd_occupancy_profile[,-4],
                                obs_occupancy_profile),
                  aes(x = pos, y = mean_signal, color = region),
                  linewidth = 1.25) +
        labs(title = epigenomic_mark[i],
             x = "Interval around SNV (bp)",
             y = "Mean Signal") +
        scale_color_manual(name = "Region", values = c("#9467BD", "#91D1C2")) +
        scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
        theme(legend.position = "none",
              plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
              panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))
  
  occupancy_enrichment_profile_list[[i]] <- occupancy_enrichment_profile_plot
}

epigenomic_occupancy_enrichment_plots <- patchwork::wrap_plots(occupancy_enrichment_profile_list, ncol = 2)
```

**Figure 3**

```{r}
#| label: main-fig-3a
#| fig-cap: "**a.** Occupancy enrichment of MER SNVs across a Pan-Myeloma collection of chromatin immunoprecipitation sequencing (ChIP-seq) data from histone modifications and CCCTC-binding factor (CTCF) sites as well as assay for transposase-accessible chromatin sequencing (ATAC-seq) data and DNase I hypersensitive sites. Each tile is colored by the fold-change of the observed mutations versus simulated mutations, and the asterisks represent statistical significance as displayed at the bottom. The mean signal across four patients was used for the myeloma patients' group. MM1S and KMS11 are myeloma cell lines."
#| fig-height: 9
#| fig-width: 6
#| out-width: "70%"

fig3_ab <- patchwork::wrap_plots(plotlist = list(occupancy_fc_heatmap,
                                                  epigenomic_occupancy_enrichment_plots),
                                  widths = c(0.25,0.5))
occupancy_fc_heatmap
```

```{r}
#| label: main-fig-3b
#| fig-cap: "**b.** H3K27ac, H3K4me1, H3K4me3, H3K27me3, H3K36me3, and ATAC occupancy enrichment profile in myeloma patients. The solid blue line is the signal across observed mutations and dashed gray line from simulated mutations with 95% confidence interval shaded."
#| fig-height: 9
#| fig-width: 6
#| out-width: "70%"

epigenomic_occupancy_enrichment_plots
```

Epigenomics occupancy profiles for KMS11 cell line
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

kms11_epigenomic_mark <- c("H3K27ac", "H3K4me1", "H3K4me3", "H3K27me3", "H3K36me3", "H4K20me1", "CTCF")
kms11_encode_id <- c("ENCFF874LYU","ENCFF452IWV","ENCFF400AMJ","ENCFF293AAL","ENCFF838NMF","ENCFF683CGI","ENCFF496TKW")
kms11_occupancy_enrichment_profile_list <- list()
for(i in 1:length(kms11_epigenomic_mark)) {
  # Read in observed signal
  kms11_obs_occupancy_profile <- data.table("mean_signal" = data.table::fread(file = paste0(base_data_path,
                                                                                 "epigenomicOccupancy/observed/KMS11/PanMyeloma-MER_",
                                                                                 kms11_encode_id[i],
                                                                                 "_KMS11_",
                                                                                 kms11_epigenomic_mark[i],
                                                                                 "_AverageSignalArray.txt")) %>%
                                               purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                               as.numeric(),
                                      "region" = "MERs",
                                      "pos" = seq(-1000,1000,1))
  
  # Read in each simulated signal
  kms11_total_sim_occupancy_profile <- data.table()
  for(j in 1:5) {
    kms11_per_sim_occupancy_profile <- data.table("signal" = data.table::fread(file = paste0(base_data_path,
                                                                                 "epigenomicOccupancy/simulated/KMS11/PanMyeloma-MER_",
                                                                                 "sim",
                                                                                 j,
                                                                                 "_",
                                                                                 kms11_encode_id[i],
                                                                                 "_KMS11_",
                                                                                 kms11_epigenomic_mark[i],
                                                                                 "_AverageSignalArray.txt")) %>%
                                               purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                               as.numeric(),
                                      "region" = "Simulated Non-MERs",
                                      "pos" = seq(-1000,1000,1))
    kms11_total_sim_occupancy_profile <- rrbind(kms11_total_sim_occupancy_profile,
                                          kms11_per_sim_occupancy_profile)
  }
  
  kms11_sim_avg_sd_occupancy_profile <- kms11_total_sim_occupancy_profile %>%
                                  dplyr::group_by(region,pos) %>%
                                  dplyr::reframe("mean_signal" = mean(signal),
                                                 "sd_signal" = sd(signal))
  
  kms11_occupancy_enrichment_profile_plot <- ggplot() +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.8) +
        geom_ribbon(data = kms11_sim_avg_sd_occupancy_profile,
                    aes(x = pos, ymin = mean_signal - sd_signal, ymax = mean_signal + sd_signal), fill = "gray70", alpha = 0.5) +
        geom_line(data = rrbind(kms11_sim_avg_sd_occupancy_profile[,-4],
                                kms11_obs_occupancy_profile),
                  aes(x = pos, y = mean_signal, color = region),
                  linewidth = 1.25) +
        labs(title = kms11_epigenomic_mark[i],
             x = "Interval around SNV (bp)",
             y = "Mean Signal") +
        scale_color_manual(name = "Region", values = c("#9467BD", "#43A245")) +
        scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
        theme(legend.position = "none",
              plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
              panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))
  
  kms11_occupancy_enrichment_profile_list[[i]] <- kms11_occupancy_enrichment_profile_plot
}

kms11_epigenomic_occupancy_enrichment_plots <- patchwork::wrap_plots(kms11_occupancy_enrichment_profile_list, ncol = 2)
```

Epigenomics occupancy profiles for MM1.S cell line
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

mm1s_epigenomic_mark <- c("H3K4me1", "H3K4me3", "H3K27me3", "H3K36me3", "DNase", "H4K20me1", "CTCF")
mm1s_encode_id <- c("ENCFF653YKZ","ENCFF825UPB","ENCFF577YXE","ENCFF121HFO","ENCFF148MKR","ENCFF362XCO","ENCFF539QXX")
mm1s_occupancy_enrichment_profile_list <- list()
for(i in 1:length(mm1s_epigenomic_mark)) {
  # Read in observed signal
  mm1s_obs_occupancy_profile <- data.table("mean_signal" = data.table::fread(file = paste0(base_data_path,
                                                                                 "epigenomicOccupancy/observed/MM1S/PanMyeloma-MER_",
                                                                                 mm1s_encode_id[i],
                                                                                 "_MM1S_",
                                                                                 mm1s_epigenomic_mark[i],
                                                                                 "_AverageSignalArray.txt")) %>%
                                               purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                               as.numeric(),
                                      "region" = "MERs",
                                      "pos" = seq(-1000,1000,1))
  
  # Read in each simulated signal
  mm1s_total_sim_occupancy_profile <- data.table()
  for(j in 1:5) {
    mm1s_per_sim_occupancy_profile <- data.table("signal" = data.table::fread(file = paste0(base_data_path,
                                                                                 "epigenomicOccupancy/simulated/MM1S/PanMyeloma-MER_",
                                                                                 "sim",
                                                                                 j,
                                                                                 "_",
                                                                                 mm1s_encode_id[i],
                                                                                 "_MM1S_",
                                                                                 mm1s_epigenomic_mark[i],
                                                                                 "_AverageSignalArray.txt")) %>%
                                               purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                               as.numeric(),
                                      "region" = "Simulated Non-MERs",
                                      "pos" = seq(-1000,1000,1))
    mm1s_total_sim_occupancy_profile <- rrbind(mm1s_total_sim_occupancy_profile,
                                          mm1s_per_sim_occupancy_profile)
  }
  
  mm1s_sim_avg_sd_occupancy_profile <- mm1s_total_sim_occupancy_profile %>%
                                  dplyr::group_by(region,pos) %>%
                                  dplyr::reframe("mean_signal" = mean(signal),
                                                 "sd_signal" = sd(signal))
  
  mm1s_occupancy_enrichment_profile_plot <- ggplot() +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.8) +
        geom_ribbon(data = mm1s_sim_avg_sd_occupancy_profile,
                    aes(x = pos, ymin = mean_signal - sd_signal, ymax = mean_signal + sd_signal), fill = "gray70", alpha = 0.5) +
        geom_line(data = rrbind(mm1s_sim_avg_sd_occupancy_profile[,-4],
                                mm1s_obs_occupancy_profile),
                  aes(x = pos, y = mean_signal, color = region),
                  linewidth = 1.25) +
        labs(title = mm1s_epigenomic_mark[i],
             x = "Interval around SNV (bp)",
             y = "Mean Signal") +
        scale_color_manual(name = "Region", values = c("#9467BD", "#91331F")) +
        scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
        theme(legend.position = "none",
              plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
              panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))
  
  mm1s_occupancy_enrichment_profile_list[[i]] <- mm1s_occupancy_enrichment_profile_plot
}

mm1s_epigenomic_occupancy_enrichment_plots <- patchwork::wrap_plots(mm1s_occupancy_enrichment_profile_list, ncol = 2)
```

## Distribution of MERs across functional genomic elements of the genome

Let's look at overlap of MERs with different typese of functional genomic features
including CDS, UTRs, E/SEs, Promoters, lncRNA, miRNA, Fragile Sites, and Normal Lymphocyte MERs
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# There are some elements that were splintered after conversion to hg38 with ensembl
# MM1S hg18 --> hg38
liftchain_hg18 <- rtracklayer::import.chain(paste0(base_data_path, "hg18ToHg38.over.chain"))
liftchain_hg19 <- rtracklayer::import.chain(paste0(base_data_path, "hg19ToHg38.over.chain"))

mm_enhancer_elements_hg18 <- dt2gr(fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "MM1SEnhancerAndSuperEnhancers.hg18.bed"),
                                         sep = "\t",
                                         header = F,
                                         col.names = c("seqnames","start","end","enhancer_id","enhancer_type")))
mm_enhancer_elements_hg18$tissue <- "PC"

mm_enhancer_elements_hg38 <- rtracklayer::liftOver(x = mm_enhancer_elements_hg18, chain = liftchain_hg18)
# Unlist output to get GR
mm_enhancer_elements_hg38 <- gUtils::grl.unlist(mm_enhancer_elements_hg38)
mm_enhancer_elements_hg38 <- gr_refactor_seqs(mm_enhancer_elements_hg38[,-c(4,5)])

# GC/DLBCL hg19 --> hg38
gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg19 <- dt2gr(fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "GCandPostGCEnhancersAndSuperEnhancers.hg19.bed"),
                                         sep = "\t",
                                         header = F,
                                         col.names = c("seqnames","start","end","tissue_original","enhancer_type")))
gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg19$tissue <- "GCB"
gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg19$enhancer_id <- paste0(gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg19$tissue_original, rep("_", length(gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg19)), gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg19$enhancer_type, rep("_", length(gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg19)), seq(1, length(gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg19)))


gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg38 <- rtracklayer::liftOver(x = gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg19, chain = liftchain_hg19)
# Unlist output to get GR
gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg38 <- gUtils::grl.unlist(gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg38)
gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg38 <- gr_refactor_seqs(gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg38[,-c(1,5,6)])

# Combine the sets of elements
enhancer_elements <- gUtils::grbind(mm_enhancer_elements_hg38, gc_dlbcl_enhancer_elements_hg38)

# # Still some splintered elements (by small bp), let's fix here
# splintered_ee_id <- unique(enhancer_elements[duplicated(enhancer_elements$enhancer_id)]$enhancer_id)
# stitched_ee <- data.table::data.table()
# for(i in 1:length(splintered_ee_id)) {
#   splintered_ee <- enhancer_elements %Q% (enhancer_id == splintered_ee_id[i])
#   
#   if(length(splintered_ee@seqnames@values) == 1) {
#     collapsed_ee <- gr_refactor_seqs(GenomicRanges::GRanges(seqnames = splintered_ee@seqnames@values[1],
#                                            IRanges(start = splintered_ee@ranges@start[1],
#                                                    end = splintered_ee@ranges@start[length(splintered_ee@ranges@start)] + splintered_ee@ranges@width[length(splintered_ee@ranges@width)] - 1)))
#     
#     collapsed_ee$enhancer_id <- unique(splintered_ee$enhancer_id)
#     collapsed_ee$enhancer_type <- unique(splintered_ee$enhancer_type)
#     collapsed_ee$tissue <- unique(splintered_ee$tissue)
#     stitched_ee <- gUtils::grbind(stitched_ee, collapsed_ee)
#   }
# }
# 
# # Now combine the stitched with the others that were not splintered after conversion to hg38
# non_splintered_ee <- enhancer_elements %Q% (!enhancer_id %in% splintered_ee_id)
#complete_ee <- gUtils::grbind(stitched_ee, non_splintered_ee)

# Write out the complete EE list as a BED
#fwrite(x = gr2dt(complete_ee)[,c(1:3,6:8)],
#       file = "enhancerElements.hg38.bed",
#       sep = "\t",
#       row.names = F,
#       col.names = T)

complete_ee <- read_bed_file(bed_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "enhancerElements.hg38.bed"),
                             has_header = T)

# Look at distribution of mutations across elements
all_muts_per_ee <- gr.findoverlaps(query = muts_hq,
                                   subject = complete_ee,
                                   qcol = c("VARIANT_CLASS", "Reference_Allele", "Tumor_Seq_Allele2", "VAF",
                                            "Tumor_Sample_Barcode", "Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode", "SYMBOL"),
                                   scol = c("enhancer_id", "enhancer_type", "tissue"))

# Quickly visualize the percentage of mutations within E/SE
total_pct_muts_in_ee <- data.table::data.table("enhancer_type" = c("SE", "E", "Other"),
                                               "pct_muts" = c(length(all_muts_per_ee %Q% (enhancer_type == "SE")) / length(muts_hq),
                                                              length(all_muts_per_ee %Q% (enhancer_type == "E")) / length(muts_hq),
                                                              length(gr.setdiff(query = muts_hq, subject = all_muts_per_ee)) / length(muts_hq)))
```

Gather all other elements for the overlap analysis
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# The functional genomic elements that will be assessed for overlap with MERs, as defined by PCAWG non-coding paper
# Coding Sequences - Exons of all protein-coding genes (from Ensembl v108)
# 5' UTRs - 5' UTRs of all protein-coding genes (from Ensembl v108)
# 3' UTRs - 3' UTRs of all protein-coding genes (from Ensembl v108)
# Promoters - Promoters for protein-coding genes (EPIraction - ENCODE ENCFF801AIE / Ensembl v106, will harmonize based on gene name)
# Enhancers/Super-Enhancers - GCB and PC sets from Bal et al and Loven et al
# Normal Lymphocyte MERs - MERs identified in HSCs, Naive B, and Memory B cells (Machado et al)
# Fragile Sites - HumCFS adapted from JaBbA analysis (Kumar et al)
# Long non-coding RNA - lncRNAs adapted from PCAWG (Rheinbay et al)
# Micro RNA - miRNAs adapted from (Rheinbay et al)

########## lncRNA ###########
lncrna_elements_raw <- gene_body_hg38 %Q% (gene_biotype == "lncRNA")

# Now filter the raw set based on PCAWG recommendations
# no sense overlap (i.e. no overlap on same strand)
lncrna_cds_overlap_to_exclude <- lncrna_elements_raw[gr.in(query = lncrna_elements_raw,
                                                             subject = gene_body_hg38 %Q% (gene_biotype == "protein_coding"),
                                                             ignore.strand = F)]

# lncRNA genes below 200 bp in length
lncrna_small_genes_to_exclude <- gr2dt(lncrna_elements_raw) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(gene_name) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("tot_width" = sum(width)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(tot_width < 200) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene_name) %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  as.character()

# filter to get final set
lncrna_elements_gr <- lncrna_elements_raw %Q% (!gene_name %in% c(lncrna_cds_overlap_to_exclude$gene_name, lncrna_small_genes_to_exclude))

########## miRNA ###########
mirna_elements_gr <- gene_body_hg38 %Q% (gene_biotype == "miRNA")

########## Promoters ###########
# Read in per chrom set
promoter_sites_gr <- GenomicRanges::trim(read_bed_file(bed_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "functionalGenomicElements/promoters.hg38.bed"),
                                                      additional_col_names = "gene_name")) %Q% (gene_name %in% unique(genes$gene_name))
#sum(GenomicRanges::width(promoter_sites_gr)) / 1e6
promoter_sites_gr$prom_id <- paste0("prom_",promoter_sites_gr$gene_name)

########## CDS ###########
cds_elements_gr <- cds_regions

########## 5' UTR ###########
five_prime_utr_elements_gr <- five_prime_utr_regions

########## 3' UTR ###########
three_prime_utr_elements_gr <- three_prime_utr_regions

########## Introns ###########
intron_elements_gr <- intron_regions

########## Intergenic ###########
intergenic_elements_gr <- intergenic_regions
```

Normal lymphocyte mutationally enriched regions
Extracting the mutations for the fishHook models
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

liftchain_hg19 <- rtracklayer::import.chain(paste0(base_data_path, "hg19ToHg38.over.chain"))

# Read in SNVs from normal lymphs
normal_sites <- fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "som2_indel_SNV_allDF_v2.machado_normalLymphocytes.txt.gz"),
                      sep = "\t",
                      header = T)[,-1]
# Convert to GR and then to hg38
normal_sites_gr <- dt2gr(normal_sites)
normal_sites_hg38 <- rtracklayer::liftOver(x = gr.chr(normal_sites_gr), chain = liftchain_hg19)
# Unlist output to get GR
normal_sites_hg38 <- gUtils::grl.unlist(normal_sites_hg38)
normal_sites_hg38 <- gr_refactor_seqs(normal_sites_hg38)


lymphocyte_metadata <- fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "colonyinfo_AX001_KX001_KX002_KX003_TX001_TX002_CB001.txt"),
                             sep = "\t",
                             header = T)

hsc_colonies <- lymphocyte_metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(Cell.type2 == "HSC") %>%
  dplyr::select(colony) %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  unique()

naive_b_colonies <- lymphocyte_metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(Cell.type2 == "Naive B") %>%
  dplyr::select(colony) %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  unique()

memory_b_colonies <- lymphocyte_metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(Cell.type2 == "Memory B") %>%
  dplyr::select(colony) %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  unique()

###########
# HSCs

hsc_muts <- normal_sites_hg38 %Q% (ID %in% hsc_colonies) %Q% (!seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY"))

#hsc_maflite <- data.table::data.table("Chromosome" = gr2dt(hsc_muts)$seqnames,
#                                      "Start_Position" = gr2dt(hsc_muts)$start,
#                                      "Reference_Allele" = gr2dt(hsc_muts)$ref,
#                                      "Tumor_Seq_Allele2" = gr2dt(hsc_muts)$mut,
#                                      "Tumor_Sample_Barcode" = gr2dt(hsc_muts)$ID)

#fwrite(x = hsc_maflite,
#       file = paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/lymphocyteLineage/hsc.machado_normalLymphocytes.snv.indel.lite.maf"),
#       sep = "\t",
#       row.names = F,
#       col.names = T)

###########
# Naive B cells

naive_b_muts <- normal_sites_hg38 %Q% (ID %in% naive_b_colonies) %Q% (!seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY"))

#naive_b_maflite <- data.table::data.table("Chromosome" = gr2dt(naive_b_muts)$seqnames,
#                                      "Start_Position" = gr2dt(naive_b_muts)$start,
#                                      "Reference_Allele" = gr2dt(naive_b_muts)$ref,
#                                      "Tumor_Seq_Allele2" = gr2dt(naive_b_muts)$mut,
#                                      "Tumor_Sample_Barcode" = gr2dt(naive_b_muts)$ID)

#fwrite(x = naive_b_maflite,
#       file = paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/lymphocyteLineage/naive_b.machado_normalLymphocytes.snv.indel.lite.maf"),
#       sep = "\t",
#       row.names = F,
#       col.names = T)

###########
# Memory B cells

memory_b_muts <- normal_sites_hg38 %Q% (ID %in% memory_b_colonies) %Q% (!seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY"))

#memory_b_maflite <- data.table::data.table("Chromosome" = gr2dt(memory_b_muts)$seqnames,
#                                      "Start_Position" = gr2dt(memory_b_muts)$start,
#                                      "Reference_Allele" = gr2dt(memory_b_muts)$ref,
#                                      "Tumor_Seq_Allele2" = gr2dt(memory_b_muts)$mut,
#                                      "Tumor_Sample_Barcode" = gr2dt(memory_b_muts)$ID)

#fwrite(x = memory_b_maflite,
#       file = paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/lymphocyteLineage/memory_b.machado_normalLymphocytes.snv.indel.lite.maf"),
#       sep = "\t",
#       row.names = F,
#       col.names = T)

#normal_lymphocyte_muts <- normal_sites_hg38 %Q% (ID %in% b_tissueage_colories) %Q% (!seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY"))
#
#normal_lymphocyte_maflite <- data.table::data.table("Chromosome" = gr2dt(normal_lymphocyte_muts)$seqnames,
#                                                    "Start_Position" = gr2dt(normal_lymphocyte_muts)$start,
#                                                    "Reference_Allele" = gr2dt(normal_lymphocyte_muts)$ref,
#                                                    "Tumor_Seq_Allele2" = gr2dt(normal_lymphocyte_muts)$mut,
#                                                    "Tumor_Sample_Barcode" = gr2dt(normal_lymphocyte_muts)$ID)

#fwrite(x = normal_lymphocyte_maflite,
#       file = "~/Downloads/som2_indel_SNV_allDF_v2.machado_normalLymphocytes.snv.indel.lite.maf",
#       sep = "\t",
#       row.names = F,
#       col.names = T)


# Pick up here with the MAF file and prep for use in fishHook model
normal_lymphocyte_muts_for_model <- read_maf_file(maf_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "som2_indel_SNV_allDF_v2.machado_normalLymphocytes.hq.snv.indel.maf.gz"))

# Subset the MAF by cell subset
hsc_muts_for_model <- normal_lymphocyte_muts_for_model %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% hsc_colonies) %Q% (!seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY"))

naive_b_muts_for_model <- normal_lymphocyte_muts_for_model %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% naive_b_colonies) %Q% (!seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY"))

memory_b_muts_for_model <- normal_lymphocyte_muts_for_model %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% memory_b_colonies) %Q% (!seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY"))

# Separate SNVs and InDels
# HSC
snv_hsc_muts <- hsc_muts_for_model %Q% (VARIANT_CLASS == "SNV")
snv_hsc_fish <- snv_hsc_muts %Q% (Variant_Classification != "Silent")

#saveRDS(object = snv_hsc_fish, file = paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/lymphocyteLineage/hsc_snv_mutations.rds"))

# Naive B
snv_naive_b_muts <- naive_b_muts_for_model %Q% (VARIANT_CLASS == "SNV")
snv_naive_b_fish <- snv_naive_b_muts %Q% (Variant_Classification != "Silent")

#saveRDS(object = snv_naive_b_fish, file = paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/lymphocyteLineage/naive_b_snv_mutations.rds"))

# Memory B
snv_memory_b_muts <- memory_b_muts_for_model %Q% (VARIANT_CLASS == "SNV")
snv_memory_b_fish <- snv_memory_b_muts %Q% (Variant_Classification != "Silent")

#saveRDS(object = snv_memory_b_fish, file = paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/lymphocyteLineage/memory_b_snv_mutations.rds"))

snv_normal_lymphocyte_muts <- normal_lymphocyte_muts_for_model %Q% (VARIANT_CLASS == "SNV")
indel_normal_lymphocyte_muts <- normal_lymphocyte_muts_for_model %Q% (VARIANT_CLASS %in% c("deletion", "insertion"))

snv_normal_lymphocyte_fish <- snv_normal_lymphocyte_muts %Q% (Variant_Classification != "Silent")
indel_normal_lymphocyte_fish <- indel_normal_lymphocyte_muts %Q% (Variant_Classification != "Silent")

#saveRDS(object = snv_normal_lymphocyte_fish, file = paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/lymphocyteLineage/normal_lymphocyte_snv_mutations.rds"))
#saveRDS(object = indel_normal_lymphocyte_fish, file = paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/lymphocyteLineage/normal_lymphocyte_indel_mutations.rds"))
```

Building the consensus regions
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

snv_normal_lymphocyte_sushi_results <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/lymphocyteLineage/normal_lymphocyte_snv_results.sushi.rds"))
indel_normal_lymphocyte_sushi_results <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/lymphocyteLineage/normal_lymphocyte_indel_results.sushi.rds"))

# Visualize in a genome-wide fashion like GWAS for tiles
snv_normal_lymphocyte_sushi_results$mut_type <- "SNV"
indel_normal_lymphocyte_sushi_results$mut_type <- "InDel"

# first, subset to only tiles with FDR < 0.05 then sort by genomic coordinate
sig_snv_lymph_sushi <- snv_normal_lymphocyte_sushi_results[fdr < 0.05][order(seqnames, start)]
sig_indel_lymph_sushi <- indel_normal_lymphocyte_sushi_results[fdr < 0.05][order(seqnames, start)]

# How many final tiles
message("FDR Significant SNV enriched tiles in Normal Lymphocytes: ", nrow(sig_snv_lymph_sushi))
message("FDR Significant InDel enriched tiles in Normal Lymphocytes: ", nrow(sig_indel_lymph_sushi))

# Create a set of stitched overlapping tiles to reduce to consensus segments
stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er <- gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::gr.reduce(gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::dt2gr(sig_snv_lymph_sushi)))[,c()])
stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er$nearest_gene <- genes$gene_name[nearest(x = stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er,
                                                          subject = gUtils::gr.stripstrand(genes))]

stitched_lymph_ncindel_er <- gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::gr.reduce(gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::dt2gr(sig_indel_lymph_sushi)))[,c()])
stitched_lymph_ncindel_er$nearest_gene <- genes$gene_name[nearest(x = stitched_lymph_ncindel_er,
                                                            subject = gUtils::gr.stripstrand(genes))]


# Lets loop through each stitched mutation enriched region and grab number of tiles and combined p-value
# SNVs
lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site <- data.table::data.table("k_tiles" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er)),
                                                   "q_value" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er)),
                                                   "effect_size_mean" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er)),
                                                   "count_density_mean" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er)),
                                                   "pred_count_density_mean" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er)),
                                                   "eligible_size_mean" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er)))

for(i in 1:length(stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er)) {
  tile_set_to_stitch <- gr.findoverlaps(subject = stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er[i,],
                                        query = gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::dt2gr(sig_snv_lymph_sushi)),
                                        type = "within",
                                        qcol = c("fdr","effectsize","count.density","count.pred.density","eligible"))
  
  # Calculate the mean FDR p-value, effect size, count density, predicted count density and the eligible region
  new_qval <- poolr::bonferroni(p = tile_set_to_stitch$fdr)
  
  lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$k_tiles[i] <- length(tile_set_to_stitch)
  lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$q_value[i] <- as.numeric(new_qval$p)
  lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$effect_size_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$effectsize)
  lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$count_density_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$count.density)
  lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$pred_count_density_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$count.pred.density)
  lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$eligible_size_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$eligible)
}

# Add the final metadata to the consensus sites
stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er$k_tiles <- lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$k_tiles
stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er$q_value <- lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$q_value
stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er$effect_size_mean <- lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$effect_size_mean
stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er$count_density_mean <- lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$count_density_mean
stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er$pred_count_density_mean <- lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$pred_count_density_mean
stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er$eligible_size_mean <- lymph_ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$eligible_size_mean
stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er$mut_uniq_id <- paste0("lymph_snv_er", seq(1,length(stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er)))

# InDels
lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site <- data.table::data.table("k_tiles" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncindel_er)),
                                                 "q_value" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncindel_er)),
                                                 "effect_size_mean" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncindel_er)),
                                                 "count_density_mean" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncindel_er)),
                                                 "pred_count_density_mean" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncindel_er)),
                                                 "eligible_size_mean" = rep(NA, length(stitched_lymph_ncindel_er)))

for(i in 1:length(stitched_lymph_ncindel_er)) {
  tile_set_to_stitch <- gr.findoverlaps(subject = stitched_lymph_ncindel_er[i,],
                                        query = gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::dt2gr(sig_indel_lymph_sushi)),
                                        type = "within",
                                        qcol = c("fdr","effectsize","count.density","count.pred.density","eligible"))
  
  # Calculate the mean FDR p-value, effect size, count density, predicted count density and the eligible region
  new_qval <- poolr::bonferroni(p = tile_set_to_stitch$fdr)
  
  lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$k_tiles[i] <- length(tile_set_to_stitch)
  lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$q_value[i] <- as.numeric(new_qval$p)
  lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$effect_size_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$effectsize)
  lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$count_density_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$count.density)
  lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$pred_count_density_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$count.pred.density)
  lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$eligible_size_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$eligible)
}

# Add the final metadata to the consensus sites
stitched_lymph_ncindel_er$k_tiles <- lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$k_tiles
stitched_lymph_ncindel_er$q_value <- lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$q_value
stitched_lymph_ncindel_er$effect_size_mean <- lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$effect_size_mean
stitched_lymph_ncindel_er$count_density_mean <- lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$count_density_mean
stitched_lymph_ncindel_er$pred_count_density_mean <- lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$pred_count_density_mean
stitched_lymph_ncindel_er$eligible_size_mean <- lymph_ncindel_fish_data_per_site$eligible_size_mean
stitched_lymph_ncindel_er$mut_uniq_id <- paste0("indel_er", seq(1,length(stitched_lymph_ncindel_er)))

# Combine the lymphoctye enriched regions to get the normal lymphocyte MERs
lymphocyte_mers <- gr2dt(gr_refactor_seqs(grbind(stitched_lymph_ncsnv_er, stitched_lymph_ncindel_er))) %>%
                     dplyr::arrange(q_value)
```

Look at the breakdown of MERs based on overlap with protein-coding gene bodies
(CDS / 3' UTRs / 5' UTRs / Introns)
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# All MER muts GR
muts_per_mer_gr <- muts_per_mer %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = mers %>% dplyr::select(mut_uniq_id,mer_id,mer_gene_label),
                   by = "mut_uniq_id") %>%
  dt_to_gr()

# Loop through all MERs and find the overlap of each mutation in relation to protein coding gene bodies
gene_body_overlap_pct <- data.table::data.table("mer_id" = mers$mer_id,
                                                "mer_gene_label" = mers$mer_gene_label,
                                                "cds_overlap_pct" = 0.0,
                                                "three_prime_utr_overlap_pct" = 0.0,
                                                "five_prime_utr_overlap_pct" = 0.0,
                                                "intron_overlap_pct" = 0.0)

for(i in 1:n_distinct(gene_body_overlap_pct$mer_id)) {
  # Get the total number of mutations at the MER
  per_mer_muts <- muts_per_mer_gr %Q% (mer_id == unique(gene_body_overlap_pct$mer_id)[i])
  mer_mut_denom <- length(per_mer_muts)
  
  # Find where each mutation in the MER overlaps and calculate the percentage
  # CDS
  mer_mut_cds_overlap <- gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::gr.findoverlaps(query = GenomicRanges::reduce(cds_elements_gr),
                                                                  subject = per_mer_muts,
                                                                  scol = c("mer_gene_label", "mer_id")))
  gene_body_overlap_pct$cds_overlap_pct[i] <- round(length(mer_mut_cds_overlap) / mer_mut_denom * 100, digits = 2)
  # remove the eligible muts, muts cannot be in two regions (InDels)
  if(length(mer_mut_cds_overlap) > 0) {
    per_mer_muts <- per_mer_muts[-mer_mut_cds_overlap$subject.id]
  }
  
  # 3' UTR
  mer_mut_three_prime_utr_overlap <- gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::gr.findoverlaps(query = GenomicRanges::reduce(three_prime_utr_elements_gr) %_%
                                                                                        cds_elements_gr,
                                                                              subject = per_mer_muts,
                                                                              scol = c("mer_gene_label", "mer_id")))
  gene_body_overlap_pct$three_prime_utr_overlap_pct[i] <- round(length(mer_mut_three_prime_utr_overlap) / mer_mut_denom * 100, digits = 2)
  # remove the eligible muts, muts cannot be in two regions (InDels)
  if(length(mer_mut_three_prime_utr_overlap) > 0) {
    per_mer_muts <- per_mer_muts[-mer_mut_three_prime_utr_overlap$subject.id]
  }
  
  # 5' UTR
  mer_mut_five_prime_utr_overlap <- gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::gr.findoverlaps(query = GenomicRanges::reduce(five_prime_utr_elements_gr) %_%
                                                                                      cds_regions %_%
                                                                                      three_prime_utr_regions,
                                                                             subject = per_mer_muts,
                                                                             scol = c("mer_gene_label", "mer_id")))
  gene_body_overlap_pct$five_prime_utr_overlap_pct[i] <- round(length(mer_mut_five_prime_utr_overlap) / mer_mut_denom * 100, digits = 2)
  # remove the eligible muts, muts cannot be in two regions (InDels)
  if(length(mer_mut_five_prime_utr_overlap) > 0) {
    per_mer_muts <- per_mer_muts[-mer_mut_five_prime_utr_overlap$subject.id]
  }
  
  # Intronic
  mer_mut_intron_overlap <- gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::gr.findoverlaps(query = GenomicRanges::reduce(intron_elements_gr) %_%
                                                                               cds_elements_gr %_%
                                                                               five_prime_utr_elements_gr %_%
                                                                               three_prime_utr_elements_gr,
                                                                     subject = per_mer_muts,
                                                                     scol = c("mer_gene_label", "mer_id")))
  gene_body_overlap_pct$intron_overlap_pct[i] <- round(length(mer_mut_intron_overlap) / mer_mut_denom * 100, digits = 2)
}

# gene body
gene_body_mers <- gene_body_overlap_pct %>%
  dplyr::group_by(mer_id,mer_gene_label) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("gene_body_pct" = round(sum(cds_overlap_pct,intron_overlap_pct,
                                               five_prime_utr_overlap_pct,three_prime_utr_overlap_pct),
                                           digits = 1)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(gene_body_pct)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("rank" = row_number(),
                "intergenic_pct" = round(100 - gene_body_pct, digits = 2))

# For initial plotting to see the breakdown high-level ordering based on gene body or intergenic
gene_body_mers$rank <- factor(gene_body_mers$rank,
                              levels = gene_body_mers$rank)

gene_body_mers_ordered <- gene_body_mers %>%
                            dplyr::select(-gene_body_pct) %>%
                            reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("mer_id","mer_gene_label","rank"),
                                            variable.name = "enhancer_type",
                                            value.name = "pct")

gene_body_mers_ordered$enhancer_type <- factor(gene_body_mers_ordered$enhancer_type,
                                      levels = c("cds_overlap_pct","five_prime_utr_overlap_pct",
                                                 "three_prime_utr_overlap_pct","intron_overlap_pct",
                                                 "intergenic_pct"))

gene_body_mer_barplot <- ggplot(gene_body_mers_ordered) +
  geom_col(aes(x = rank, y = pct, fill = enhancer_type), width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Features",
                    values = alpha(paletteer_d("ggsci::hallmarks_light_cosmic")[c(1,4,2,3,5)], alpha = 0.7),
                    labels = c("CDS","5' UTR","3' UTR","Intron","Intergenic")) +
  labs(y = "Overlap with feature",
       x = "MERs") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1, scale = 1), expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA))

# Now cluster the MERs based on overlap with gene body features
#clustered_gene_body_mers_dendro <- factoextra::fviz_nbclust(x = gene_body_mers %>%
#                           dplyr::select(mer_id,cds_overlap_pct, three_prime_utr_overlap_pct,
#                                         five_prime_utr_overlap_pct, intron_overlap_pct, intergenic_pct) %>%
#                           tibble::column_to_rownames("mer_id"),
#                         FUN = factoextra::hcut,
#                         method = "wss")

mer_gene_body_feature_clusters <- factoextra::hcut(x = gene_body_mers %>%
                                                        dplyr::select(mer_id,cds_overlap_pct, three_prime_utr_overlap_pct,
                                                                      five_prime_utr_overlap_pct, intron_overlap_pct,
                                                                      intergenic_pct) %>%
                                                        tibble::column_to_rownames("mer_id"),
                                                   k = 4,
                                                   stand = F)
#factoextra::fviz_dend(mer_gene_body_feature_clusters, show_labels = T)

# Attach the MER ID to the cluster assignment
gene_body_mer_cluster_assignemnt <- data.table::data.table("mer_id" = names(mer_gene_body_feature_clusters$cluster),
                                                           "cluster_id" = mer_gene_body_feature_clusters$cluster)

# Visualize the composite of each gene body MER cluster
clustered_gene_body_mers_comp_boxplot <- gene_body_mers_ordered %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gene_body_mer_cluster_assignemnt,
                   by = "mer_id") %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = enhancer_type, y = pct, fill = enhancer_type)) +
  facet_wrap(facets = ~ cluster_id, nrow = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Features",
                    values = alpha(paletteer_d("ggsci::hallmarks_light_cosmic")[c(1,4,2,3,5)], alpha = 0.7),
                    labels = c("CDS","5' UTR","3' UTR","Intron","Intergenic")) +
  labs(y = "Overlap with feature",
       x = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("CDS","5' UTR","3' UTR","Intron","Intergenic")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1, scale = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA))

table(gene_body_mer_cluster_assignemnt$cluster_id)

# cluster 1 - Intronic MERs   (n=96)
# cluster 2 - CDS MERs        (n=9)
# cluster 3 - UTR MERs        (n=31)
# cluster 4 - Intergenic MERs (n=171)

gene_body_mers %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gene_body_mer_cluster_assignemnt,
                    by = "mer_id") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(cluster_id) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_intron_overlap" = mean(intron_overlap_pct)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(mean_intron_overlap))

gene_body_mers %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gene_body_mer_cluster_assignemnt,
                   by = "mer_id") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(cluster_id) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_cds_overlap" = mean(cds_overlap_pct)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(mean_cds_overlap))

gene_body_mers %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gene_body_mer_cluster_assignemnt,
                   by = "mer_id") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(cluster_id) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_three_prime_utr_overlap" = mean(three_prime_utr_overlap_pct)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(mean_three_prime_utr_overlap))

gene_body_mers %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gene_body_mer_cluster_assignemnt,
                   by = "mer_id") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(cluster_id) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_five_prime_utr_overlap" = mean(five_prime_utr_overlap_pct)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(mean_five_prime_utr_overlap))

gene_body_mers %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gene_body_mer_cluster_assignemnt,
                   by = "mer_id") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(cluster_id) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("median_intergenic_overlap" = median(intergenic_pct)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(median_intergenic_overlap))

# Create labels for each cluster
gene_body_mers <- gene_body_mers %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gene_body_mer_cluster_assignemnt,
                   by = "mer_id") %>%
  dplyr::mutate("cluster_label" = dplyr::case_when(cluster_id == 1 ~ "Intronic",
                                                   cluster_id == 2 ~ "CDS",
                                                   cluster_id == 3 ~ "UTR",
                                                   cluster_id == 4 ~ "Intergenic"))
# Create the MER overlap base
mers_overlap <- mers %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gene_body_mers %>%
                     dplyr::select(mer_id,cds_overlap_pct,three_prime_utr_overlap_pct,
                                   five_prime_utr_overlap_pct,intron_overlap_pct,
                                   intergenic_pct,gene_body_pct,cluster_label),
                   by = "mer_id")

message("Protein-coding gene body MERs: ",
        mers_overlap %>%
          dplyr::filter(cluster_label != "Intergenic") %>%
          dplyr::count() %>%
          as.numeric(), " (",
        round(mers_overlap %>%
          dplyr::filter(cluster_label != "Intergenic") %>%
          dplyr::count() %>%
          as.numeric() / 307 * 100, digits = 1), "%)")

message("Intergenic MERs: ",
        mers_overlap %>%
          dplyr::filter(cluster_label == "Intergenic") %>%
          dplyr::count() %>%
          as.numeric(), " (",
        round(mers_overlap %>%
          dplyr::filter(cluster_label == "Intergenic") %>%
          dplyr::count() %>%
          as.numeric() / 307 * 100, digits = 1), "%)")
```

Analyze the gene body MERs more in-depth
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true

#mers_overlap %>%

# Visualize the composition of overlap after final cluster labeling
gene_body_mers$cluster_label <- factor(gene_body_mers$cluster_label,
                                       levels = c("CDS",
                                                  "UTR",
                                                  "Intronic",
                                                  "Intergenic"))
# get order of MERs
gene_body_mer_order <- gene_body_mers %>%

gene_body_mers$mer_id <- factor(gene_body_mers$mer_id,
                                levels = gene_body_mer_order)

gene_body_mers_ordered <- gene_body_mers %>%
                            dplyr::select(-gene_body_pct,-rank,-mer_gene_label,-cluster_id) %>%
                            reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("mer_id","cluster_label"),
                                            variable.name = "enhancer_type",

gene_body_mer_barplot <- ggplot(gene_body_mers_ordered) +
  geom_col(aes(x = mer_id, y = pct, fill = enhancer_type), width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Features",
                    values = alpha(paletteer_d("ggsci::hallmarks_light_cosmic")[c(1,4,2,3,5)], alpha = 0.7),
                    labels = c("CDS","3' UTR","5' UTR","Intron","Intergenic")) +
  labs(y = "Overlap with feature",
       x = "MERs") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1, scale = 1), expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA))

gene_body_mer_boxplot <- ggplot(gene_body_mers_ordered) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = enhancer_type, y = pct, fill = enhancer_type)) +
  facet_wrap(facets = ~ cluster_label, nrow = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Features",
                    values = alpha(paletteer_d("ggsci::hallmarks_light_cosmic")[c(1,4,2,3,5)], alpha = 0.7),
                    labels = c("CDS","3' UTR","5' UTR","Intron","Intergenic")) +
  labs(y = "Overlap with feature",
       x = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("CDS","3' UTR","5' UTR","Intron","Intergenic")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1, scale = 1)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA))

#gene_body_mer_barplot + gene_body_mer_boxplot + plot_layout(ncol = 2, nrow = 1, axis_titles = "collect_y", widths = c(0.6,0.4))
```

Assess the intersection of driver genes with protein-coding gene body MERs
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Read in driver gene list
mm_driver_genes <- fread(paste0(base_data_path, "mgpDriverGenes.txt"),
                         header = F,
                         col.names = "gene")

# Overlap of MERs and driver genes
driver_gene_mer_class <- mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label %in% mm_driver_genes$gene) %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label,cluster_label,mer_id)

# CDS
driver_gene_cds_mers <- driver_gene_mer_class %>%
  dplyr::filter(cluster_label == "CDS") %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  as.character()

message("Driver gene CDS MERs: ", paste0(driver_gene_cds_mers, collapse = ", "))

mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label %in% driver_gene_cds_mers) %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label,cds_overlap_pct,mer_id)

mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label %in% driver_gene_cds_mers) %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label,cds_overlap_pct,mer_id) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("muts_cds_pct_range" = range(cds_overlap_pct))

# UTR
driver_gene_utr_mers <- driver_gene_mer_class %>%
  dplyr::filter(cluster_label == "UTR") %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  as.character()

message("Driver gene UTR MERs: ", paste0(driver_gene_utr_mers, collapse = ", "))

mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label %in% driver_gene_utr_mers) %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label,three_prime_utr_overlap_pct,five_prime_utr_overlap_pct,mer_id)

mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label %in% driver_gene_utr_mers) %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label,three_prime_utr_overlap_pct,five_prime_utr_overlap_pct,mer_id) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("muts_three_prime_pct_range" = range(three_prime_utr_overlap_pct),
                   "muts_five_prime_pct_range" = range(five_prime_utr_overlap_pct))

# Intronic
driver_gene_intron_mers <- driver_gene_mer_class %>%
  dplyr::filter(cluster_label == "Intronic") %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  as.character()

message("Driver gene Intronic MERs: ", paste0(driver_gene_intron_mers, collapse = ", "))

mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label %in% driver_gene_intron_mers) %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label,intron_overlap_pct,mer_id) 

mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label %in% driver_gene_intron_mers) %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label,intron_overlap_pct,mer_id) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("muts_intron_pct_range" = range(intron_overlap_pct))

# Intergenic
driver_gene_intergenic_mers <- driver_gene_mer_class %>%
  dplyr::filter(cluster_label == "Intergenic") %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  as.character()

message("Driver gene Intergenic MERs: ", driver_gene_intergenic_mers)

mers_overlap <- mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::mutate("driver_status" = case_when(mer_id %in% driver_gene_mer_class$mer_id ~ "driver_gene",
                                            !mer_id %in% driver_gene_mer_class$mer_id ~ NA))

mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label == driver_gene_intergenic_mers) %>%
  dplyr::select(mer_gene_label,intergenic_pct,mer_id)
```

VAF of nc mutations and missense mutations in driver genes
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

mm_driver_nc_mer_muts <- muts_per_mer %>%
  dplyr::filter(nearest_gene %in% c("EGR1","CCND1","LTB","ZFP36L1") &
                  Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode %in% c("NIH012B","52148-DNA-N","NIH041B",
                                                     "IID_H201428_N01_01_WG01","27522_Skin_10X_N",
                                                     "382803-N","50050-DNA-N","370474-N",
                                                     "78208-DNA-N","97033-DNA-N",
                                                     "IID_H196061_N01_01_WG01","IID_H201447_N01_01_WG01",
                                                     "MMRC0335_V0D57G_N","NIH010B","NIH035B",
                                                     "PD26434b_N","PD47563b_N","596699-N"))

mm_driver_nc_mer_muts$Variant_Classification <- factor(mm_driver_nc_mer_muts$Variant_Classification,
                                                       levels = c("Missense_Mutation","Intron","3'Flank","5'Flank","5'UTR","Splice_Region"),
                                                       labels = c("Missense Mutation","Intron","3'Flank","5'Flank","5'UTR","Splice Region"))

variant_class_colors <- c("#E31A1C","#2C3E50","#18BC9C","#CCBE93","#1F78B4","#FF7F00")

# EGR1
egr1_window <- "chr5:138465600-138466200"

gene_track_egr1 <- geom_gene_track(window_of_interest = egr1_window,
                                           flank = 0,
                                           genes_of_interest = "EGR1",
                                           gene_name_side = "five_prime",
                                           gene_label_nudge = 50,
                                           gene_label_size = 4) +
                    labs(y = "EGR1") +
                    theme(axis.title.y = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 15))

scale_track_egr1 <- geom_locus_scale(window_of_interest = egr1_window,
                                     flank = 0)

mutation_track_egr1 <- mm_driver_nc_mer_muts %>%
  dplyr::filter(nearest_gene == "EGR1" &
                  Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode == c("NIH012B")) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_point(aes(x = start, y = Tumor_Sample_Barcode, color = Variant_Classification, size = VAF)) +
  scale_size_binned(breaks = c(0,0.25,0.5,0.75,1), range = c(1,4), limits = c(0,1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Variant\nClassification", values = variant_class_colors[c(1,2,5)]) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(name = get_locus_axis(input_window = egr1_window, input_flank = 0)$name,
                              labels = get_locus_axis(input_window = egr1_window, input_flank = 0)$labels,
                              limits = get_locus_axis(input_window = egr1_window, input_flank = 0)$limits,
                              expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
  ggplot2::theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                 panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
                 axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                 axis.ticks.y = element_line(linewidth = 2.5, color = "black"),
                 axis.ticks.length.y = unit(2, units = "mm"),
                 plot.margin = unit(c(0.1,0.1,0.1,0.1), "mm"),
                 axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
                 axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                 axis.text.x = element_blank(),
                 axis.line.x = element_blank(),
                 axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
                 legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 legend.position = "none")
  
egr1_locus_view <- patchwork::wrap_plots(list(scale_track_egr1,
                                              mutation_track_egr1,
                                              gene_track_egr1),
                      ncol = 1,
                      guides = "collect",
                      heights = c(0.07,0.09,0.07))
```

**Supplementary Figure 7**

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-7a
#| fig-cap: "**a.** Examples of missense mutations co-occurring with non-coding mutations within a similar molecular time window in MM driver genes EGR1. Each locus view shows, from the top, the genomic coordinate of the locus in view with a scale, mutations linearly displayed with their color representing the classification of the variant and the size scaled to the allele frequency, and lastly the gene body where red arrows are exons, UTRs are solid black segments, and introns are thin black lines. The driver mutations appear to occur because of the same mechanism as non-coding mutations in a single clustered event."
#| fig-height: 7
#| fig-width: 5
#| out-width: "70%"

supp_fig7 <- ggarrange(plotlist = list(egr1_locus_view, ccnd1_locus_view, ltb_locus_view, zfp36l1_locus_view),
                         ncol = 1,
                         common.legend = T,
                         align = "v")
```
