```{r}
  dplyr::filter(mainclass %in% c("DBS","Kataegis","Omikli","Other")) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("total_pct_clustered" = sum(pct_per_class))

# Dual GCB/PC E/SE-MERs
dual_e_se_mers_non_clustered_muts <- gr.findoverlaps(query = e_se_mers_gr %Q% (tissue == "GCB,PC"),
                                                    subject = uniq_hq_sigpro_clusters_non_clustered_gr,
                                                    qcol = c("mer_id","mer_gene_label","tissue","enhancer_type"),
                                                    scol = c("patient","sample","ref","alt"))
dual_e_se_mers_non_clustered_muts$mainclass <- "Non-clustered"

dual_e_se_mers_clustered_muts <- gr.findoverlaps(query = e_se_mers_gr %Q% (tissue == "GCB,PC"),
                                                subject = uniq_hq_sigpro_clusters_muts_gr,
                                                qcol = c("mer_id","mer_gene_label","tissue","enhancer_type"),
                                                scol = c("patient","sample","ref","alt","mainclass"))
n_distinct(dual_e_se_mers_clustered_muts$mer_id)

dual_e_se_mers_cluster_composition <- gr2dt(grbind(dual_e_se_mers_non_clustered_muts, dual_e_se_mers_clustered_muts)) %>%
                                       dplyr::group_by(mainclass,tissue) %>%
                                       dplyr::count(name = "mut_count") %>%
                                       dplyr::ungroup() %>%
                                       dplyr::mutate("pct_per_class" = round(mut_count / sum(mut_count) * 100, digits = 3))

dual_e_se_mers_cluster_composition$mainclass <- factor(dual_e_se_mers_cluster_composition$mainclass,
                                                       levels = c("Non-clustered","DBS","MBS","Omikli","Kataegis","Other"))
dual_e_se_mers_cluster_composition %>%
  dplyr::filter(mainclass %in% c("DBS","Kataegis","Omikli","Other")) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("total_pct_clustered" = sum(pct_per_class))

# PC E/SE-MERs
pc_e_se_mers_non_clustered_muts <- gr.findoverlaps(query = e_se_mers_gr %Q% (tissue == "PC"),
                                                    subject = uniq_hq_sigpro_clusters_non_clustered_gr,
                                                    qcol = c("mer_id","mer_gene_label","tissue","enhancer_type"),
                                                    scol = c("patient","sample","ref","alt"))
pc_e_se_mers_non_clustered_muts$mainclass <- "Non-clustered"

pc_e_se_mers_clustered_muts <- gr.findoverlaps(query = e_se_mers_gr %Q% (tissue == "PC"),
                                                subject = uniq_hq_sigpro_clusters_muts_gr,
                                                qcol = c("mer_id","mer_gene_label","tissue","enhancer_type"),
                                                scol = c("patient","sample","ref","alt","mainclass"))
n_distinct(pc_e_se_mers_clustered_muts$mer_id)

pc_e_se_mers_cluster_composition <- gr2dt(grbind(pc_e_se_mers_non_clustered_muts, pc_e_se_mers_clustered_muts)) %>%
                                       dplyr::group_by(mainclass,tissue) %>%
                                       dplyr::count(name = "mut_count") %>%
                                       dplyr::ungroup() %>%
                                       dplyr::mutate("pct_per_class" = round(mut_count / sum(mut_count) * 100, digits = 3))

pc_e_se_mers_cluster_composition$mainclass <- factor(pc_e_se_mers_cluster_composition$mainclass,
                                                     levels = c("Non-clustered","DBS","MBS","Omikli","Kataegis","Other"))
pc_e_se_mers_cluster_composition %>%
  dplyr::filter(mainclass %in% c("DBS","Kataegis","Omikli","Other")) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("total_pct_clustered" = sum(pct_per_class))

# GCB
gcb_e_se_mers_cluster_comp_plot <- ggplot(gcb_e_se_mers_cluster_composition) +
  geom_col(aes(x = tissue, y = pct_per_class, fill = mainclass), width = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Relative\nContribution (%)") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Clustered\nEvent\nSubclass", values = clustered_events_colors[c(1:2,4:6)]) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

# Dual
dual_e_se_mers_cluster_comp_plot <- ggplot(dual_e_se_mers_cluster_composition) +
  geom_col(aes(x = tissue, y = pct_per_class, fill = mainclass), width = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Relative\nContribution (%)") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Clustered\nEvent\nSubclass", values = clustered_events_colors[c(1:2,4:6)]) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank())

# PC
pc_e_se_mers_cluster_comp_plot <- ggplot(pc_e_se_mers_cluster_composition) +
  geom_col(aes(x = tissue, y = pct_per_class, fill = mainclass), width = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Relative\nContribution (%)") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Clustered\nEvent\nSubclass", values = clustered_events_colors[c(1:2,4:6)]) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank())
```

Link the clustered mutation spectrum to mutational signatures in E/SE-MERs
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# First, given that there are now duplicated mutations per MER (from different samples/patients etc.), remove them here
e_se_mer_sig_muts <- muts_per_grouped_mer_for_plot[VARIANT_CLASS == "SNV", .(tissue, seqnames, start, Reference_Allele, Tumor_Seq_Allele2)]
e_se_mer_sig_muts <- e_se_mer_sig_muts[!duplicated(e_se_mer_sig_muts)]

# Now prepare the data for mmsig
# Correct the column names for input to mmsig
colnames(e_se_mer_sig_muts) <- c("sample","chr","pos","ref","alt")

# ALL GCB
gcb_e_se_mer_sig_96 <- deconstructSigs::mut.to.sigs.input(mut.ref = e_se_mer_sig_muts %>% dplyr::filter(sample == "GCB"),
                                                          sample.id = "sample",
                                                          chr = "chr",
                                                          pos = "pos",
                                                          ref = "ref",
                                                          alt = "alt",
                                                          bsg = BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)

# Dual GCB/PC
dual_e_se_mer_sig_96 <- deconstructSigs::mut.to.sigs.input(mut.ref = e_se_mer_sig_muts %>% dplyr::filter(sample == "GCB,PC"),
                                                           sample.id = "sample",
                                                           chr = "chr",
                                                           pos = "pos",
                                                           ref = "ref",
                                                           alt = "alt",
                                                           bsg = BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)

# ALL PC
pc_e_se_mer_sig_96 <- deconstructSigs::mut.to.sigs.input(mut.ref = e_se_mer_sig_muts %>% dplyr::filter(sample == "PC"),
                                                         sample.id = "sample",
                                                         chr = "chr",
                                                         pos = "pos",
                                                         ref = "ref",
                                                         alt = "alt",
                                                         bsg = BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)


# Generate a 96 class SBS profile
#plot_sbs96(grouped_mer_sig_96)
gcb_e_se_mer_96class_plot <- plot_sbs96(gcb_e_se_mer_sig_96)
dual_e_se_mer_96class_plot <- plot_sbs96(dual_e_se_mer_sig_96)
pc_e_se_mer_96class_plot <- plot_sbs96(pc_e_se_mer_sig_96)

# Translate data for use in mmsig
# GCB
gcb_e_se_mer_sig_96$Total <- rowSums(gcb_e_se_mer_sig_96)
gcb_e_se_mer_sig_96_transpose <- as.data.frame.matrix(t(gcb_e_se_mer_sig_96))

# Dual
dual_e_se_mer_sig_96$Total <- rowSums(dual_e_se_mer_sig_96)
dual_e_se_mer_sig_96_transpose <- as.data.frame.matrix(t(dual_e_se_mer_sig_96))

# PC
pc_e_se_mer_sig_96$Total <- rowSums(pc_e_se_mer_sig_96)
pc_e_se_mer_sig_96_transpose <- as.data.frame.matrix(t(pc_e_se_mer_sig_96))


# Fit the signatures
# GCB
gcb_e_se_mer_sig_96_out <- mm_fit_signatures(muts.input = gcb_e_se_mer_sig_96_transpose,
                                            sig.input = sig_ref_cosmic_v3_2_hg38,
                                            input.format = "classes",
                                            sample.sigt.profs = NULL,
                                            strandbias = FALSE,
                                            bootstrap = TRUE,
                                            iterations = 10,
                                            genome = "hg38",
                                            dbg = FALSE,
                                            force_include = NULL)

gcb_e_se_mer_sig_t <- reshape2::melt(data = gcb_e_se_mer_sig_96_out$estimate %>%
                                              tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "sample") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(-mutations) %>%
                                              as.data.table(),
                                    id.vars = "sample",
                                    variable.name = "signature",
                                    value.name = "rel_contrib")

gcb_e_se_mer_sig_t$signature <- factor(gcb_e_se_mer_sig_t$signature,
                                      levels = c("SBS1", "SBSblood", "SBS8", "SBS9", "SBS84",
                                                 "SBS18", "SBS99", "SBS2", "SBS13"))

gcb_e_se_mmsig_barplot <- ggplot(gcb_e_se_mer_sig_t, aes(x = sample, y = rel_contrib, fill = signature)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Signature", values = mmsig_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "E/SE-MER Group",
       y = "Relative\nContribution") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))

message("AID-associated SBS in GCB E/SE-MERs: ")
gcb_e_se_mer_sig_t %>% dplyr::filter(signature %in% c("SBS9","SBS84")) %>% dplyr::reframe("sum" = sum(rel_contrib))

# Dual
dual_e_se_mer_sig_96_out <- mm_fit_signatures(muts.input = dual_e_se_mer_sig_96_transpose,
                                            sig.input = sig_ref_cosmic_v3_2_hg38,
                                            input.format = "classes",
                                            sample.sigt.profs = NULL,
                                            strandbias = FALSE,
                                            bootstrap = TRUE,
                                            iterations = 10,
                                            genome = "hg38",
                                            dbg = FALSE,
                                            force_include = NULL)

dual_e_se_mer_sig_t <- reshape2::melt(data = dual_e_se_mer_sig_96_out$estimate %>%
                                              tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "sample") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(-mutations) %>%
                                              as.data.table(),
                                    id.vars = "sample",
                                    variable.name = "signature",
                                    value.name = "rel_contrib")

dual_e_se_mer_sig_t$signature <- factor(dual_e_se_mer_sig_t$signature,
                                      levels = c("SBS1", "SBSblood", "SBS8", "SBS9", "SBS84",
                                                 "SBS18", "SBS99", "SBS2", "SBS13"))

dual_e_se_mmsig_barplot <- ggplot(dual_e_se_mer_sig_t, aes(x = sample, y = rel_contrib, fill = signature)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Signature", values = mmsig_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "E/SE-MER Group",
       y = "Relative\nContribution") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))

message("AID-associated SBS in Dual GCB/PC E/SE-MERs: ")
dual_e_se_mer_sig_t %>% dplyr::filter(signature %in% c("SBS9","SBS84")) %>% dplyr::reframe("sum" = sum(rel_contrib))

# PC
pc_e_se_mer_sig_96_out <- mm_fit_signatures(muts.input = pc_e_se_mer_sig_96_transpose,
                                            sig.input = sig_ref_cosmic_v3_2_hg38,
                                            input.format = "classes",
                                            sample.sigt.profs = NULL,
                                            strandbias = FALSE,
                                            bootstrap = TRUE,
                                            iterations = 10,
                                            genome = "hg38",
                                            dbg = FALSE,
                                            force_include = NULL)

pc_e_se_mer_sig_t <- reshape2::melt(data = pc_e_se_mer_sig_96_out$estimate %>%
                                              tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "sample") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(-mutations) %>%
                                              as.data.table(),
                                    id.vars = "sample",
                                    variable.name = "signature",
                                    value.name = "rel_contrib")

pc_e_se_mer_sig_t$signature <- factor(pc_e_se_mer_sig_t$signature,
                                      levels = c("SBS1", "SBSblood", "SBS8", "SBS9", "SBS84",
                                                 "SBS18", "SBS99", "SBS2", "SBS13"))

pc_e_se_mmsig_barplot <- ggplot(pc_e_se_mer_sig_t, aes(x = sample, y = rel_contrib, fill = signature)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Signature", values = mmsig_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "E/SE-MER Group",
       y = "Relative\nContribution") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))

message("AID-associated SBS in PC E/SE-MERs: ")
pc_e_se_mer_sig_t %>% dplyr::filter(signature %in% c("SBS9","SBS84")) %>% dplyr::reframe("sum" = sum(rel_contrib))

message("SBSblood in PC E/SE-MERs: ")
pc_e_se_mer_sig_t %>% dplyr::filter(signature == "SBSblood") %>% dplyr::select(rel_contrib)
```

Mutational signature of clustered mutations in E/SE-MERs
```{r}
#| tidy: true

#| message: false

clust_gcb_e_se_mer_sig_muts <- gr2dt(gcb_e_se_mers_clustered_muts) %>%
                                dplyr::select(tissue,seqnames, start, ref, alt)

clust_gcb_e_se_mer_sig_muts <- clust_gcb_e_se_mer_sig_muts[!duplicated(clust_gcb_e_se_mer_sig_muts)]

# Now prepare the data for mmsig

# ALL GCB

                                                              sample.id = "sample",
                                                              chr = "chr",

                                dplyr::select(tissue,seqnames, start, ref, alt)

clust_pc_e_se_mer_sig_muts <- clust_pc_e_se_mer_sig_muts[!duplicated(clust_pc_e_se_mer_sig_muts)]

# Now prepare the data for mmsig

                                                              sample.id = "sample",

# Translate data for use in mmsig

                                                   sig.input = sig_ref_cosmic_v3_2_hg38,

                                      levels = c("SBS1", "SBSblood", "SBS8", "SBS9", "SBS84",

        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))


# Dual
clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_muts <- gr2dt(dual_e_se_mers_clustered_muts) %>%
                                dplyr::select(tissue,seqnames, start, ref, alt)

clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_muts <- clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_muts[!duplicated(clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_muts)]

# Now prepare the data for mmsig
# Correct the column names for input to mmsig
colnames(clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_muts) <- c("sample","chr","pos","ref","alt")

# ALL dual
clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_96 <- deconstructSigs::mut.to.sigs.input(mut.ref = clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_muts,
                                                              sample.id = "sample",
                                                              chr = "chr",
                                                              pos = "pos",
                                                              ref = "ref",
                                                              alt = "alt",
                                                              bsg = BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)

# Generate a 96 class SBS profile
clust_dual_e_se_mer_96class_plot <- plot_sbs96(clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_96)

# Translate data for use in mmsig
clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_96$Total <- rowSums(clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_96)
clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_96_transpose <- as.data.frame.matrix(t(clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_96))

# Fit the signatures
clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_96_out <- mm_fit_signatures(muts.input = clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_96_transpose,
                                                   sig.input = sig_ref_cosmic_v3_2_hg38,
                                                   input.format = "classes",
                                                   genome = "hg38")

clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_t <- reshape2::melt(data = clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_96_out$estimate %>%
                                              tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "sample") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(-mutations) %>%
                                              as.data.table(),
                                    id.vars = "sample",
                                    variable.name = "signature",
                                    value.name = "rel_contrib")

clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_t$signature <- factor(clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_t$signature,
                                      levels = c("SBS1", "SBSblood", "SBS8", "SBS9", "SBS84",
                                                 "SBS18", "SBS99", "SBS2", "SBS13"))

clust_dual_e_se_mmsig_barplot <- ggplot(clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_t, aes(x = sample, y = rel_contrib, fill = signature)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Signature", values = mmsig_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "E/SE-MER Group",
       y = "Relative\nContribution") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))

# AID associated
message("AID-associated SBS in GCB E/SE-MERs: ")
clust_gcb_e_se_mer_sig_t %>% dplyr::filter(signature %in% c("SBS9","SBS84")) %>% dplyr::reframe("sum" = sum(rel_contrib) * 100)

message("AID-associated SBS in Dual GCB/PC E/SE-MERs: ")
clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_t %>% dplyr::filter(signature %in% c("SBS9","SBS84")) %>% dplyr::reframe("sum" = sum(rel_contrib) * 100)

message("AID-associated SBS in PC E/SE-MERs: ")
clust_pc_e_se_mer_sig_t %>% dplyr::filter(signature %in% c("SBS9","SBS84")) %>% dplyr::reframe("sum" = sum(rel_contrib) * 100)

message("SBSblood in GCB E/SE-MERs: ")
clust_gcb_e_se_mer_sig_t %>% dplyr::filter(signature == "SBSblood") %>% dplyr::select(rel_contrib) * 100

message("SBSblood in Dual GCB/PC E/SE-MERs: ")
clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_t %>% dplyr::filter(signature == "SBSblood") %>% dplyr::select(rel_contrib) * 100
```

**Supplementary Figure 9**

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-9a
#| fig-cap: "**a.** Percentage of mutations that are involved in a clustered mutation event for each sample, stratified by disease stage. The red bar represents the median percentage per group. MGUS, monoclonal gammopathy of undetermined significance; SMM, smoldering multiple myeloma; MM, multiple myeloma; RRMM, relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma; DBS, doublet-base substitution; MBS, multi-base substitution."
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 7
#| out-width: "70%"

supp_fig9 <- clustered_pct_by_dx_snake_plot / clustered_muts_composition_barplot + plot_layout(nrow = 2, guides = "collect", axis_titles = "collect_x")
clustered_pct_by_dx_snake_plot
```

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-9b
#| fig-cap: "**b.** Composition of each subclass of clustered event that contribute to the total amount of clustered events per sample. The samples are organized in the same order as depicted in (**a.**)."
#| fig-height: 4

#| out-width: "70%"

clustered_muts_composition_barplot
```

## E/SE-MERs are linked to recurrent structural variants and complex rearrangements

Find the occupancy of SV hotspots by SVs detected in HQ data
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Read in chromosome contig information by arm
chr_arm_lengths <- fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "chromosome_per_arm_coordinates.hg38.txt"),
                         sep = "\t",
                         header = T)

##############################################
# split SV BEDPE into data table of breakpoints
# start by reading in bedpe of all SVs from mgp1000 as junctions
# Set seqinfo named vector of hg38 chrom names and lengths
ref_seq_info <- c(248956422, 242193529, 198295559, 190214555, 181538259, 170805979,
                  159345973, 145138636, 138394717, 133797422, 135086622, 133275309,
                  114364328, 107043718, 101991189, 90338345, 83257441, 80373285,
                  58617616, 64444167, 46709983, 50818468, 156040895, 57227415)
names(ref_seq_info) <- paste0("chr", c(seq(1,22,1), "X", "Y"))
# #total_sv_junc <- gGnome::jJ(rafile = paste0(base_data_path, "mgp1000.hq.union.consensus.somatic.sv.bedpe"),
# #                            chr.convert = F,
# #                            hg = "hg38",
# #                            keep.features = T,
# #                            seqlengths = ref_seq_info)
# 
# # There is an enrichment of FP DELs that are small and found within the MSKCC dataset
# # They pass the consensus of 2 or more callers but appear to only be called due to lack of read depth
# # but inspection of these sites show little to no read support across the junction
# # and a number of reads with badly aligned clipped ends
# # Filter those out here
# mskcc_darakrd_hq_samples <- hq_dataset_metadata %>%
#                               dplyr::filter(cohort == "MSKCC_DaraKRd") %>%
#                               dplyr::select(sample) %>%
#                               purrr::as_vector() %>%
#                               as.character()
# 
# mskcc_darakrd_fp_small_dels <- total_sv_junc |>
#   plyranges::mutate("span" = start2 - start1) |>
#   plyranges::filter(type == "DEL" &
#                       span < 100 &
#                       sample %in% mskcc_darakrd_hq_samples)
# #mskcc_darakrd_fp_small_dels <- total_sv_junc[which(total_sv_junc$dt$name == "DEL" & total_sv_junc$span < 200 & total_sv_junc$dt$`NA..3` %in% mskcc_darakrd_hq_samples)]
# 
# total_sv_juncs_fpfilter_gi <- gGnome::setdiff(x = total_sv_junc, y = mskcc_darakrd_fp_small_dels)
# total_sv_juncs_fpfilter <- gi_to_grl(gi = total_sv_juncs_fpfilter_gi, keep_metadata = T)
# 
# # split into BP format with BP_order which is 1 or 2 for each BP column
# total_sv_bp_unlisted <- gUtils::grl.unlist(total_sv_juncs_fpfilter)
# #total_sv_bp_unlisted <- gUtils::grl.unlist(total_sv_juncs_fpfilter$grl)
# total_sv_bp_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(total_sv_bp_unlisted)
# total_sv_bp_gr <- gr_absolute_ranges(input_gr = total_sv_bp_gr, cpus = 2)
# total_sv_bp_dt <- gUtils::gr2dt(total_sv_bp_gr)
# 
# # reorg DT a bit before renaming
# # might add disease stage here for spliting analysis like wee might do for fishhook
# total_sv_bp_dt <- total_sv_bp_dt[,-c("width","score","id")]
# #total_sv_bp_dt <- total_sv_bp_dt[,-c(5,7,9)]
# colnames(total_sv_bp_dt)[1:10] <- c("seqnames", "start", "end", "strand", "class", "support", "patient", "sample", "sv_id", "bp_order")
# 
# # filter to only calls by 2 or more
# hq_total_sv_bp_dt <- total_sv_bp_dt %>% dplyr::filter(!support %in% c("manta","svaba","delly","igcaller"))
# 
# # Gather high-coverage, high-quality samples
# hq_total_sv_bp_dt <- hq_total_sv_bp_dt %>% dplyr::filter(patient %in% unique(hq_dataset_metadata$patient) & !seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY"))
# 
# # Collapse all BPs per patient (i.e. remove possible inflation due to same BP repeated across samples)
# hq_total_sv_bp_dt <- hq_total_sv_bp_dt[!duplicated(hq_total_sv_bp_dt[,c(1:2,4:7)])]
# hq_total_sv_bp_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(hq_total_sv_bp_dt))

#saveRDS(object = hq_total_sv_bp_dt, file = paste0(base_data_path, "hq_total_sv_bp_dt.rds"))
hq_total_sv_bp_dt <- readRDS(file = paste0(base_data_path, "hq_total_sv_bp_dt.rds"))
#saveRDS(object = hq_total_sv_bp_gr, file = paste0(base_data_path, "hq_total_sv_bp_gr.rds"))
hq_total_sv_bp_gr <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "hq_total_sv_bp_gr.rds"))

message("Total HQ SVs: ",length(hq_total_sv_bp_gr))

# Some simple metrics on SVs per patient
hq_sv_by_class_per_patient <- hq_total_sv_bp_dt %>%
  dplyr::select(patient,sample,sv_id,class) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(patient,class) %>%
  dplyr::count(name = "sv_count") %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

hq_sv_total_per_patient <- hq_sv_by_class_per_patient %>%
  dplyr::group_by(patient) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("total_sv" = sum(sv_count))

message("Median HQ SVs per patient: ", median(hq_sv_total_per_patient$total_sv))
message("Range of HQ SVs per patient: ", paste0(range(hq_sv_total_per_patient$total_sv), collapse = " - "))

# look at relationship between TMB and SV count
hq_sv_total_per_sample <- hq_total_sv_bp_dt %>%
  dplyr::select(sample,sv_id) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
  dplyr::count(name = "sv_count") %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

hq_sv_total_and_tmb_per_sample <- hq_sv_total_per_sample %>%
                                    dplyr::left_join(y = tmb_fish_eligbile %>%
                                                          dplyr::select(sample,tumor_mutation_burden),
                                                     by = "sample")

# plot linear relationship between TMB and SV count
#ggplot(hq_sv_total_and_tmb_per_sample) +
#  geom_point(aes(x = tumor_mutation_burden, y = sv_count), na.rm = T) +
#  geom_smooth(aes(x = tumor_mutation_burden, y = sv_count), method = "lm", na.rm = T, formula = y ~ x)
message("SVs and TMB - Linear Regression")
glance(hq_sv_total_and_tmb_per_sample %>%
        lm(data = ., formula = sv_count ~ tumor_mutation_burden))

summary(hq_sv_total_and_tmb_per_sample %>%
          lm(data = ., formula = sv_count ~ tumor_mutation_burden))

# look at relationship between muts in MERs and SV count
message("SVs and MERs - Linear Regression")
hq_sv_total_and_mer_muts_per_sample <- hq_sv_total_per_sample %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = muts_per_mer_for_plot %>%
                        dplyr::select(sample, mer_id) %>%
                        dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
                        dplyr::count(mer_id) %>%
                        dplyr::ungroup() %>%
                        dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
                        dplyr::reframe("total_per_mer" = sum(n)),
                   by = "sample")

# Log transformed
#ggplot(hq_sv_total_and_mer_muts_per_sample) +
#  geom_point(aes(x = log10(total_per_mer), y = log10(sv_count)), na.rm = T) +
#  geom_smooth(aes(x = log10(total_per_mer), y = log10(sv_count)), method = "lm", na.rm = T, formula = y ~ x)

sv_and_mer_muts_corr <- ggplot(hq_sv_total_and_mer_muts_per_sample) +
  geom_point(aes(x = total_per_mer, y = sv_count), na.rm = T, size = 3, color = "#79A8A4") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = total_per_mer, y = sv_count), method = "lm", na.rm = T, formula = y ~ x, linewidth = 1.5, color = "cyan", alpha = 0.75) +
  ggpubr::stat_regline_equation(aes(x = total_per_mer, y = sv_count), label.x = 150, label.y = 425, size = 4.5) +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(aes(x = total_per_mer, y = sv_count), label.x = 150, label.y = 400, size = 4.5, p.accuracy = 0.0001) +
  labs(x = "Total MER mutations",
       y = "Total SVs") +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent", linewidth = 1))

# look at relationship between kataegis muts and SV count
message("SVs and Kataegis - Linear Regression")
hq_sv_total_and_kataegis_muts_per_sample <- hq_sv_total_per_sample %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = hq_sigpro_clusters_muts %>%
                        dplyr::filter(mainclass == "Kataegis") %>%
                        dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
                        dplyr::count(name = "kataegis_mut_count") %>%
                        dplyr::ungroup(),
                   by = "sample")

sv_and_kataegis_muts_corr <- ggplot(hq_sv_total_and_kataegis_muts_per_sample) +
  geom_point(aes(x = kataegis_mut_count, y = sv_count), na.rm = T, size = 3, color = "#AD8082") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = kataegis_mut_count, y = sv_count), method = "lm", na.rm = T, formula = y ~ x, linewidth = 1.5, color = "cyan", alpha = 0.75) +
  ggpubr::stat_regline_equation(aes(x = kataegis_mut_count, y = sv_count), label.x = 50, label.y = 400, size = 4.5) +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(aes(x = kataegis_mut_count, y = sv_count), label.x = 50, label.y = 375, size = 4.5, p.accuracy = 0.0001) +
  labs(x = "Total Kataegis mutations",
       y = "Total SVs") +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent", linewidth = 1))

glance(hq_sv_total_and_kataegis_muts_per_sample %>%
          lm(data = ., formula = sv_count ~ kataegis_mut_count))

# look at relationship between omikli muts and SV count
message("SVs and Omikli - Linear Regression")
hq_sv_total_and_omikli_muts_per_sample <- hq_sv_total_per_sample %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = hq_sigpro_clusters_muts %>%
                        dplyr::filter(mainclass == "Omikli") %>%
                        dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
                        dplyr::count(name = "omikli_mut_count") %>%
                        dplyr::ungroup(),
                   by = "sample")

sv_and_omikli_muts_corr <- ggplot(hq_sv_total_and_omikli_muts_per_sample) +
  geom_point(aes(x = omikli_mut_count, y = sv_count), na.rm = T, size = 3, color = "#DEC18C") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = omikli_mut_count, y = sv_count), method = "lm", na.rm = T, formula = y ~ x, linewidth = 1.5, color = "cyan", alpha = 0.75) +
  ggpubr::stat_regline_equation(aes(x = omikli_mut_count, y = sv_count), label.x = 750, label.y = 425, size = 4.5) +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(aes(x = omikli_mut_count, y = sv_count), label.x = 750, label.y = 400, size = 4.5, p.accuracy = 0.0001) +
  labs(x = "Total Omikli mutations",
       y = "Total SVs") +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent", linewidth = 1))
  
glance(hq_sv_total_and_omikli_muts_per_sample %>%
          lm(data = ., formula = sv_count ~ omikli_mut_count))
```

Look at omikli and kataegis events at CCND1
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

driver_genes <- get_gene_set(path_to_file = paste0(base_data_path, "geneSets/mgpDriverGenes.txt"),
                             file_format = "txt",
                             has_header = F,
                             gene_set_name = "MM Drivers")
colnames(driver_genes)[1] <- "GENE_SYMBOL"

# Clustered events in TRX region
# CCND1 t(11;14)
ccnd1_clustered_mut_scars <- gUtils::gr.findoverlaps(query = uniq_hq_clustered_non_ig_regions_gr,
                                                     subject = gUtils::parse.gr("chr11:68460752-69654474"),
                                                     qcol = c("sample", "patient", "mainclass", "group", "mut_count", "vaf_median"))

ccnd1_mer_clustered <- gUtils::gr.findoverlaps(query = ccnd1_clustered_mut_scars,
                                              subject = e_se_mers_gr,
                                              qcol = c("sample", "patient", "mainclass", "group", "mut_count", "vaf_median"),
                                              scol = c("mer_id","mer_gene_label","tissue","enhancer_type"))


ccnd1_clustered_mut_scars_dt <- gr2dt(ccnd1_mer_clustered) %>%
                                  dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_metadata %>% dplyr::select(patient,sample,disease_stage,igh_translocation),
                                                   by = c("patient","sample"))

ccnd1_mer_kataegis <- ccnd1_clustered_mut_scars_dt %>%
  dplyr::filter(mainclass == "Kataegis") %>%
  dplyr::select(seqnames,start,end,patient,mainclass,disease_stage,igh_translocation) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

ccnd1_mer_omikli <- ccnd1_clustered_mut_scars_dt %>%
  dplyr::filter(mainclass == "Omikli") %>%
  dplyr::select(seqnames,start,end,patient,mainclass,disease_stage,igh_translocation) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

rbind(ccnd1_mer_kataegis, ccnd1_mer_omikli) %>%
  dplyr::select(patient, mainclass, disease_stage,igh_translocation) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

rbind(ccnd1_mer_kataegis, ccnd1_mer_omikli) %>%
  dplyr::select(patient, mainclass, disease_stage,igh_translocation) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::select(disease_stage) %>%
  table()

message("Kataegis at CCND1 E/SE-MER across disease stages: ")
ccnd1_mer_kataegis %>%
  dplyr::select(patient,mainclass,disease_stage,igh_translocation) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::select(disease_stage) %>%
  table()

#ccdn1_kataegis_mers_dist <- data.table()
```

Evaluate the overlap and composition of SV BPs to hotspots
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

#############
# SV HOTSPOTS

# Calculate the percentage of patients with SVs within the hotspot
commpass_sv_hotspots_hg38_gr$pct_patients_with_SV.hg19 <- round(commpass_sv_hotspots_hg38_gr$patients_with_SV / 752 * 100, digits = 2)

# Calculate the overlap of SV BPs with hotspots
sv_hotspot_overlap <- gr.findoverlaps(query = hq_total_sv_bp_gr,
                                   subject = commpass_sv_hotspots_hg38_gr,
                                   qcol = c("class","patient","sample","sv_id","bp_order"),
                                   scol = "hotspot.id.hg19")
sv_hotspot_overlap_dt <- gr2dt(sv_hotspot_overlap)

message("Total occupancy of SV hotspots: ", length(unique(sv_hotspot_overlap$hotspot.id.hg19)))
message("Fraction of all SV hotspots are occupied: ", length(unique(sv_hotspot_overlap$hotspot.id.hg19)) / length(commpass_sv_hotspots_hg38_gr %Q% (seqnames != "chrX")))

# Hotspots with no SVs in our dataset
commpass_sv_hotspots_hg38_gr %Q% (hotspot.id.hg19 == "down_chr1_92.8Mb")

# Compare the pct of patients with SVs in hotspots
sv_hotspot_overlap_comp <- sv_hotspot_overlap_dt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(hotspot.id.hg19) %>%
  dplyr::select(hotspot.id.hg19,patient) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(hotspot.id.hg19) %>%
  dplyr::count(name = "patients_with_SV") %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate("pct_patients_with_SV" = round(patients_with_SV / 294 * 100, digits = 2)) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gr2dt(commpass_sv_hotspots_hg38_gr) %>%
                        dplyr::select(hotspot.id.hg19,pct_patients_with_SV.hg19),
                   by = "hotspot.id.hg19") %>%
  dplyr::mutate("pct_delta" = pct_patients_with_SV.hg19 - pct_patients_with_SV)

# Metrics on correlation of pct patients
message("Median difference in % of patients with SV at hotspots: ", median(abs(sv_hotspot_overlap_comp$pct_delta)))


cor_test(data = sv_hotspot_overlap_comp, vars = c("pct_patients_with_SV", "pct_patients_with_SV.hg19"))

sv_hotspot_pct_corr <- ggplot(sv_hotspot_overlap_comp) +
  geom_point(aes(x = pct_patients_with_SV,
                 y = pct_patients_with_SV.hg19),
             na.rm = T, size = 3, color = "#606372") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = pct_patients_with_SV,
                  y = pct_patients_with_SV.hg19),
              method = "lm", na.rm = T, formula = y ~ x, linewidth = 1.5, color = "thistle1", alpha = 0.75)  +
  ggpubr::stat_regline_equation(aes(x = pct_patients_with_SV, y = pct_patients_with_SV.hg19), label.x = 0.5, label.y = 35, size = 4.5) +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(aes(x = pct_patients_with_SV, y = pct_patients_with_SV.hg19), label.x = 0.5, label.y = 32, size = 4.5, p.accuracy = 0.0001) +
  labs(x = "Query Dataset\nPatients with SVs at hotspots (%)",
       y = "CoMMpass Dataset\nPatients with SVs at hotspots (%)") +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent", linewidth = 1))

########################
# COMPLEX EVENT HOTSPOTS

# Calculate the percentage of patients with SVs within the hotspot
commpass_complex_hotspots_hg38_gr$pct_patients_with_SV.hg19 <- round(commpass_complex_hotspots_hg38_gr$no.samples / 752 * 100, digits = 2)

# Calculate the overlap of SV BPs with hotspots
complex_hotspot_overlap <- gr.findoverlaps(query = hq_total_sv_bp_gr,
                                           subject = commpass_complex_hotspots_hg38_gr,
                                           qcol = c("class","patient","sample","sv_id","bp_order"),
                                           scol = "complex.hotspot.id.hg19")
complex_hotspot_overlap_dt <- gr2dt(complex_hotspot_overlap)

message("Total occupancy of Complex hotspots: ", length(unique(complex_hotspot_overlap$complex.hotspot.id.hg19)))
message("Fraction of all Complex hotspots are occupied: ", length(unique(complex_hotspot_overlap$complex.hotspot.id.hg19)) / length(commpass_complex_hotspots_hg38_gr))

# Compare the pct of patients with SVs in hotspots
complex_hotspot_overlap_comp <- complex_hotspot_overlap_dt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(complex.hotspot.id.hg19) %>%
  dplyr::select(complex.hotspot.id.hg19,patient) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(complex.hotspot.id.hg19) %>%
  dplyr::count(name = "patients_with_SV") %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate("pct_patients_with_SV" = round(patients_with_SV / 294 * 100, digits = 2)) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gr2dt(commpass_complex_hotspots_hg38_gr) %>%
                        dplyr::select(complex.hotspot.id.hg19,pct_patients_with_SV.hg19),
                   by = "complex.hotspot.id.hg19") %>%
  dplyr::mutate("pct_delta" = pct_patients_with_SV.hg19 - pct_patients_with_SV)

# Metrics on correlation of pct patients
message("Median difference in % of patients at Complex hotspots: ", median(abs(complex_hotspot_overlap_comp$pct_delta)))

cor_test(data = complex_hotspot_overlap_comp, vars = c("pct_patients_with_SV", "pct_patients_with_SV.hg19"))

complex_hotspot_pct_corr <- ggplot(complex_hotspot_overlap_comp) +
  geom_point(aes(x = pct_patients_with_SV,
                 y = pct_patients_with_SV.hg19),
             na.rm = T, size = 3, color = "#B2AD8F") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = pct_patients_with_SV,
                  y = pct_patients_with_SV.hg19),
              method = "lm", na.rm = T, formula = y ~ x, linewidth = 1.5, color = "thistle1", alpha = 0.75)  +
  ggpubr::stat_regline_equation(aes(x = pct_patients_with_SV, y = pct_patients_with_SV.hg19), label.x = 3, label.y = 17, size = 4.5) +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(aes(x = pct_patients_with_SV, y = pct_patients_with_SV.hg19), label.x = 3, label.y = 15, size = 4.5, p.accuracy = 0.0001) +
  labs(x = "Query Dataset\nPatients with Complex SVs at hotspots (%)",
       y = "CoMMpass Dataset\nPatients with Complex SVs at hotspots (%)") +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent", linewidth = 1))
```

Overlap of SV hotspots and MERs
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Look at overlap of all MERs
all_mer_sv_hotspot_overlap <- gr.findoverlaps(
  query = dt_to_gr(mers_overlap),
  subject = commpass_sv_hotspots_hg38_gr,
  qcol = c("mer_id","mer_gene_label","pct_total_mut_patients","tissue","enhancer_type","cluster_label","driver_status"),
  scol = c("hotspot.id.hg19","chromoplexy","chromothripsis","complex","templated_insertion","DUP","DEL","TRA","INV","hotspot_class","genes_involved","pct_patients_with_SV.hg19"))
unique(all_mer_sv_hotspot_overlap$hotspot.id.hg19)
n_distinct(all_mer_sv_hotspot_overlap$hotspot.id.hg19)
unique(all_mer_sv_hotspot_overlap$mer_id)
unique(all_mer_sv_hotspot_overlap$mer_gene_label)
n_distinct(all_mer_sv_hotspot_overlap$mer_id)

# Add to MERs overlap
mers_overlap <- mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gr2dt(all_mer_sv_hotspot_overlap) %>%
                        dplyr::select(mer_id,hotspot.id.hg19,pct_patients_with_SV.hg19,hotspot_class,genes_involved),
                   by = "mer_id")

all_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap <- gr.findoverlaps(query = mers_gr,
                                                   subject = commpass_complex_hotspots_hg38_gr,
                                                   qcol = c("mer_id","mer_gene_label","pct_total_mut_patients"),
                                                   scol = c("complex.hotspot.id.hg19","no.samples"))
unique(all_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap$complex.hotspot.id.hg19)
n_distinct(all_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap$complex.hotspot.id.hg19)
unique(all_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap$mer_id)
n_distinct(all_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap$mer_id)

# Add to MERs overlap
mers_overlap <- mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = gr2dt(all_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap) %>%
                        dplyr::select(mer_id,complex.hotspot.id.hg19),
                   by = "mer_id")

# Look at overlap of E/SE-MERs
e_se_mer_hotspot_overlap <- gr.findoverlaps(query = e_se_mers_gr,
                                            subject = commpass_sv_hotspots_hg38_gr,
                                            qcol = c("mer_id","mer_gene_label","pct_total_mut_patients","tissue","enhancer_type","cluster_label"),
                                            scol = c("hotspot.id.hg19","chromoplexy","chromothripsis","complex","templated_insertion","DUP","DEL","TRA","INV","hotspot_class","genes_involved","driver_status","pct_patients_with_SV.hg19"))

e_se_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap <- gr.findoverlaps(query = e_se_mers_gr,
                                                   subject = commpass_complex_hotspots_hg38_gr,
                                                   qcol = c("mer_id","mer_gene_label","pct_total_mut_patients","tissue","enhancer_type","cluster_label"),
                                                   scol = c("complex.hotspot.id.hg19","no.samples","pct_patients_with_SV.hg19"))

unique(e_se_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap$complex.hotspot.id.hg19)
n_distinct(e_se_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap$complex.hotspot.id.hg19)
unique(e_se_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap$mer_id)
unique(e_se_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap$mer_gene_label)

table(e_se_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap$enhancer_type)
table(e_se_mer_complex_hotspot_overlap$tissue)
```

Assess the proximity relationship between kataegis and SV breakpoints at complex event hotspots
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Proximity profile of kataegis and omikli mutations to SV BPs
# will use non-clustered mutations as the background
# Correct for Ig region kataegis and SVs by removing them

#hq_sigpro_clusters_muts_gr %Q%
#  (mainclass == "Kataegis" & !seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY")) %_%
#  ig_region_mask_bed

#gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(hq_total_sv_bp_dt))  %_%
#  ig_region_mask_bed

kataegis_sv_prox_dist <- GenomicDistributions::calcFeatureDist(query = hq_sigpro_clusters_muts_gr %Q%
                                                                        (mainclass == "Kataegis" & !seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY")) %_%
                                                                        ig_region_mask_bed,
                                                               features = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(hq_total_sv_bp_dt)) %_%
                                                                           ig_region_mask_bed)

omikli_sv_prox_dist <- GenomicDistributions::calcFeatureDist(query = hq_sigpro_clusters_muts_gr %Q%
                                                                        (mainclass == "Omikli" & !seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY")) %_%
                                                                        ig_region_mask_bed,
                                                               features = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(hq_total_sv_bp_dt)) %_%
                                                                           ig_region_mask_bed)

non_clustered_background_dist <- GenomicDistributions::calcFeatureDist(query = hq_sigpro_clusters_non_clustered_gr %Q%
                                                                                (!seqnames %in% c("chrX","chrY")) %_%
                                                                                ig_region_mask_bed,
                                                                       features = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(hq_total_sv_bp_dt)) %_%
                                                                           ig_region_mask_bed)

# Plot proximity distros
proxi_distro_to_svs <- list("Kataegis" = kataegis_sv_prox_dist,
                            "Omikli" = omikli_sv_prox_dist,
                            "Non-Clustered" = non_clustered_background_dist)
proxi_distro_to_svs_plot <- GenomicDistributions::plotFeatureDist(dists = proxi_distro_to_svs, size = 1e5, nbins = 40) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#D55E00","#009E73","#000000")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#D55E00","#009E73","#000000")) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Distance to proximal SV breakpoint") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = unit(c(6,6,6,6),"mm"),
        panel.spacing.x = unit(3,"lines"))
# export 5 x 10 landscape

# quantify the distances and look at 5 Kb window around SV BPs
kataegis_binned_dists_around_bp <- GenomicDistributions:::cutDists(dists = kataegis_sv_prox_dist, size = 1e5, nbins = 40)
omikli_binned_dists_around_bp <- GenomicDistributions:::cutDists(dists = omikli_sv_prox_dist, size = 1e5, nbins = 40)
nonclustered_binned_dists_around_bp <- GenomicDistributions:::cutDists(dists = non_clustered_background_dist, size = 1e5, nbins = 40)

kataegis_5k_window_around_bp <- kataegis_binned_dists_around_bp %>%
  dplyr::filter(cuts %in% c("-2,500 to 0", "0 to 2,500")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("pct" = Freq / sum(!is.na(kataegis_sv_prox_dist)))
message("Percentage of kataegis muts in 5 Kb of SV BP:")
round(sum(kataegis_5k_window_around_bp$pct) * 100, digits = 1)

omikli_5k_window_around_bp <- omikli_binned_dists_around_bp %>%
  dplyr::filter(cuts %in% c("-2,500 to 0", "0 to 2,500")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("pct" = Freq / sum(!is.na(omikli_sv_prox_dist)))
message("Percentage of omikli muts in 5 Kb of SV BP:")
round(sum(omikli_5k_window_around_bp$pct) * 100, digits = 1)

nonclustered_5k_window_around_bp <- nonclustered_binned_dists_around_bp %>%
  dplyr::filter(cuts %in% c("-2,500 to 0", "0 to 2,500")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("pct" = Freq / sum(!is.na(non_clustered_background_dist)))
message("Percentage of non-clustered muts in 5 Kb of SV BP:")
round(sum(nonclustered_5k_window_around_bp$pct) * 100, digits = 1)

# Fisher test of 5kb vs other distances
kataegis_5k_window_fish_tbl <- data.table("Kataegis" = c(sum(kataegis_5k_window_around_bp$Freq),
                                                         kataegis_binned_dists_around_bp %>%
                                                          dplyr::filter(!cuts %in% c("-2,500 to 0", "0 to 2,500")) %>%
                                                           dplyr::select(Freq) %>%
                                                           purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                                           sum()),
                                          "Non-Clustered" = c(sum(nonclustered_5k_window_around_bp$Freq),
                                                              nonclustered_binned_dists_around_bp %>%
                                                                dplyr::filter(!cuts %in% c("-2,500 to 0", "0 to 2,500")) %>%
                                                                dplyr::select(Freq) %>%
                                                                purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                                                sum()))
rownames(kataegis_5k_window_fish_tbl) <- c("+/- 2.5 Kb", "Beyond +/- 2.5 Kb")
glance(fisher.test(x = kataegis_5k_window_fish_tbl))


omikli_5k_window_fish_tbl <- data.table("Omikli" = c(sum(omikli_5k_window_around_bp$Freq),
                                                         omikli_binned_dists_around_bp %>%
                                                          dplyr::filter(!cuts %in% c("-2,500 to 0", "0 to 2,500")) %>%
                                                           dplyr::select(Freq) %>%
                                                           purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                                           sum()),
                                          "Non-Clustered" = c(sum(nonclustered_5k_window_around_bp$Freq),
                                                              nonclustered_binned_dists_around_bp %>%
                                                                dplyr::filter(!cuts %in% c("-2,500 to 0", "0 to 2,500")) %>%
                                                                dplyr::select(Freq) %>%
                                                                purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                                                sum()))
rownames(omikli_5k_window_fish_tbl) <- c("+/- 2.5 Kb", "Beyond +/- 2.5 Kb")
glance(fisher.test(x = omikli_5k_window_fish_tbl))
```

Build barplots of clustered event composition and signature contribution for E/SE-MERs in GCB, dual, and PC samples
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

clust_comp_barplot_data <- rbind(gcb_e_se_mers_cluster_composition,
                                 dual_e_se_mers_cluster_composition,
                                 pc_e_se_mers_cluster_composition)

clust_comp_barplot_data$tissue <- factor(clust_comp_barplot_data$tissue,
                                         levels = c("GCB", "GCB,PC", "PC"))


clust_comp_barplot <- ggplot(clust_comp_barplot_data) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8,
           aes(x = tissue, y = pct_per_class / 100, fill = mainclass), width = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Relative Contribution") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Clustered\nEvent\nSubclass", values = clustered_events_colors[c(1:2,4:6)]) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0.95, family = "sans", size = 14),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

clust_sigs_barplot_data <- rbind(clust_gcb_e_se_mer_sig_t,
                                 clust_dual_e_se_mer_sig_t,
                                 clust_pc_e_se_mer_sig_t)

clust_sigs_barplot_data$sample <- factor(clust_sigs_barplot_data$sample,
                                         levels = c("GCB", "GCB,PC", "PC"))

clust_sigs_barplot <- ggplot(data = clust_sigs_barplot_data,
       aes(x = sample, y = rel_contrib, fill = signature)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Signature", values = mmsig_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
  labs(y = "Relative Contribution") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0.95, family = "sans", size = 14),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))
```

Pair the query proximal transloation partner junction with the distal (other chromosomes) partner for analysis
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Grab all distal and proximal interchromosomal breakpoints
interchrom_juncs <- hq_total_sv_bp_dt %>%
                      dplyr::filter(class == "TRA")
interchrom_juncs$nearest_gene <- genes$gene_name[nearest(x = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(interchrom_juncs)), subject = gr.stripstrand(genes))]

# Need to remove all the MM canonical TRX BPs to extract true signal
# first find all BP that fall within the expected IGH range + 50 kbp pad
igh_trx_expected_range <- parse.gr("chr14:105586858-106879851") + 2.5e4

igh_trx_bp <- gr.findoverlaps(query = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(interchrom_juncs)),
                              subject = igh_trx_expected_range,
                              qcol = c("patient", "sample", "sv_id", "nearest_gene"))

# now that we have the IDs of any BP that occurs in IGH range, find all partners
igh_trx_partners <- interchrom_juncs %>%
                     dplyr::filter(sv_id %in% igh_trx_bp$sv_id) %>%
                     dplyr::filter(seqnames != "chr14")

# Next, find only those that are canonical partners
mm_igh_canon_expected_range <- read_bed_file(bed_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "canonicalSubtypePartnerTranslocation.hg38.bed"),
                                             has_header = F)

# grab the SV IDs as these will be excluded from counting
mm_igh_canon_partners <- gr.findoverlaps(query = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(igh_trx_partners)),
                                         subject = mm_igh_canon_expected_range,
                                         qcol = c("patient", "sample", "sv_id", "nearest_gene"))

canon_igh_trx_mask <- interchrom_juncs[interchrom_juncs$sv_id %in% mm_igh_canon_partners$sv_id]

# Mask the canonical IGH TRX from input
interchrom_juncs_igh_masked <- dplyr::setdiff(x = interchrom_juncs, y = canon_igh_trx_mask)

# Finally remove any IGK or IGL TRX
other_ig_region_mask <- GenomicRanges::reduce(ig_region_mask_bed + 2.5e4) %Q% (seqnames %in% c("chr2","chr22"))

other_ig_trx_bp <- gr.findoverlaps(query = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(interchrom_juncs)),
                              subject = other_ig_region_mask,
                              qcol = c("patient", "sample", "sv_id", "nearest_gene"))

# now that we have the IDs of any BP that occurs in IGK/IGL range, find all partners
other_ig_trx_partners <- interchrom_juncs %>%
                           dplyr::filter(sv_id %in% other_ig_trx_bp$sv_id) %>%
                           dplyr::filter(!seqnames %in% c("chr2","chr22"))

other_ig_trx_mask <- interchrom_juncs[interchrom_juncs$sv_id %in% other_ig_trx_partners$sv_id]

interchrom_juncs_fully_masked <- dplyr::setdiff(x = interchrom_juncs_igh_masked, y = other_ig_trx_mask)
```

Look at the density of breakpoints around mid of MERs and various comparisons 
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

#########################################################
# RUN DENSITY CALC

# PARAMETERS FOR DENSITY\
#  - Flank of MER: +/- 500 Kbp (5e5)
#  - bin size for density: 1 Kbp (1e3)
#  - canonical IGH TRX BPs are excluded

interchrom_juncs_igh_masked_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(interchrom_juncs_fully_masked))
#interchrom_juncs_igh_masked_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(interchrom_juncs_igh_masked))

# Look at the density of breakpoints from mid of MERs of: All MERs, each SE subset, and simulated non-MERs
# BCL6 should be negative control (i.e. should have none or very little TRX BP)
bcl6_mer_sv_bp_control <- e_se_mers %>% dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label == "BCL6") %>% dplyr::select(mer_id) %>% purrr::as_vector()
bcl6_control_sv_bp_dists <-  proximal_bp_dist(sv_bp_gr = interchrom_juncs_igh_masked_gr,
                                              gr_of_interest = dt2gr(e_se_mers[mer_id == bcl6_mer_sv_bp_control[1]]),
                                              proximal_dist_threshold = 5e5)
bcl6_control_sv_bp_dens <- window_density(data_to_count = bcl6_control_sv_bp_dists, window_size = 5e5 * 2, bin_size = 1e3)
bcl6_control_sv_bp_dens$mer <- "BCL6"

bcl6_control_sv_bp_dens$scaled_count <- bcl6_control_sv_bp_dens$count * (1 + (1 / sqrt(1)))

# FULL MER set
# loop through all
# mm_mer_dist <- data.table()
# for(i in 1:length(mers$mer_id)) {
#   
#   distances_to_add <- proximal_bp_dist(sv_bp_gr = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(interchrom_juncs)),
#                                        gr_of_interest = dt2gr(mers[mer_id == mers$mer_id[i]]),
#                                         proximal_dist_threshold = 1500000)
#   mm_mer_dist <- gUtils::rrbind(mm_mer_dist,
#                                 distances_to_add)
# }
# 
# mm_mer_dens <- window_density(data_to_count = mm_mer_dist, window_size = 10e6, bin_size = 1e4)
# mm_mer_dens$mer <- "MM"

# GC/DLBCL MER set
# need to exclude E/SE-MER with overlapping SNV/InDel MERs so same BP aren't counted twice
# Any E/SE-MERs within 500 kb of each other are combined
#gr.dist(gr1 = dt_to_gr(e_se_mers %>%
#              dplyr::filter(tissue == "GCB"))) / 5e5

gcb_mer_sv_bp_set <- fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "gcbMersForTrxDensity.txt"),
                                sep = "\t",
                                header = T)

#gcb_mer_sv_bp_set <- e_se_mers %>%
#                            dplyr::filter(tissue == "GCB") %>%
#                            dplyr::select(mer_id) %>%
#                            dplyr::filter(!mer_id %in% c("mer2","mer66","mer159","mer11","mer39","mer215",   "mer18","mer22")) %>% # BCL6, RPIA, LPP, ZCCHC7/PAX5 overlap
#                            purrr::as_vector()

gcb_mer_sv_bp_dists <- data.table()
for(i in 1:nrow(gcb_mer_sv_bp_set)) {
  
  distances_to_add <- proximal_bp_dist(sv_bp_gr = interchrom_juncs_igh_masked_gr,
                                       gr_of_interest = dt_to_gr(gcb_mer_sv_bp_set[i]),
                                       proximal_dist_threshold = 5e5)
  gcb_mer_sv_bp_dists <- gUtils::rrbind(gcb_mer_sv_bp_dists,
                                             distances_to_add)
}

# Remove any duplicated BPs as result of MERs in close proximity but not same gene (BCL6 and LPP, SERPINA9 and TCL1A, ZCCHC7 and PAX5)
#uniq_gcb_mer_sv_bp_dists <- gcb_mer_sv_bp_dists[!duplicated(gcb_mer_sv_bp_dists[,c(1:3,6:9)]),]

gcb_mer_sv_bp_dens <- window_density(data_to_count = gcb_mer_sv_bp_dists, window_size = 5e5 * 2, bin_size = 1e3)
gcb_mer_sv_bp_dens$mer <- "GCB"

# add prefactor to account for difference in size of MER groups (i.e. more MERs == more change to find BP)
# 1 / sqrt(# of MERs)
gcb_mer_sv_bp_dens$scaled_count <- gcb_mer_sv_bp_dens$count * (1 + (1 / sqrt(length(gcb_mer_sv_bp_set))))

# dual MER set
#gr.dist(gr1 = dt_to_gr(e_se_mers %>%
#              dplyr::filter(tissue == "GCB,PC"))) / 5e5

dual_mer_sv_bp_set <- e_se_mers %>%
                        dplyr::filter(tissue == "GCB,PC") %>%
                        dplyr::select(seqnames,start,end,mer_gene_label,mer_id) %>%
                        dplyr::rename("mer_gene_label_overlap" = mer_gene_label, "mer_id_overlap" = mer_id)

#dual_mer_sv_bp_set <- e_se_mers %>%
#                        dplyr::filter(tissue == "GCB,PC") %>%
#                        dplyr::select(mer_id) %>%
#                        purrr::as_vector()
dual_mer_sv_bp_dists <- data.table()
for(i in 1:nrow(dual_mer_sv_bp_set)) {
  
  distances_to_add <- proximal_bp_dist(sv_bp_gr = interchrom_juncs_igh_masked_gr,
                                       gr_of_interest = dt_to_gr(dual_mer_sv_bp_set[i]),
                                        proximal_dist_threshold = 5e5)
  dual_mer_sv_bp_dists <- gUtils::rrbind(dual_mer_sv_bp_dists,
                                             distances_to_add)
}

dual_mer_sv_bp_dens <- window_density(data_to_count = dual_mer_sv_bp_dists, window_size = 5e5 * 2, bin_size = 1e3)
dual_mer_sv_bp_dens$mer <- "GCB,PC"

dual_mer_sv_bp_dens$scaled_count <- dual_mer_sv_bp_dens$count * (1 + (1 / sqrt(length(dual_mer_sv_bp_set))))

# PC MER set
# need to exclude E/SE-MER with overlapping SNV/InDel MERs so same BP aren't counted twice
#gr.dist(gr1 = dt_to_gr(e_se_mers %>%
#              dplyr::filter(tissue == "PC"))) / 5e5

pc_mer_sv_bp_set <- fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "pcMersForTrxDensity.txt"),
                                sep = "\t",
                                header = T)

#pc_mer_sv_bp_set <- e_se_mers %>%
#                      dplyr::filter(tissue == "PC") %>%
#                      dplyr::select(mer_id) %>%
#                      dplyr::filter(!mer_id %in% c("mer37", "mer182")) %>% # TXNDC5 and TENT5C overlap
#                      purrr::as_vector()

pc_mer_sv_bp_dists <- data.table()
for(i in 1:nrow(pc_mer_sv_bp_set)) {
  
  distances_to_add <- proximal_bp_dist(sv_bp_gr = interchrom_juncs_igh_masked_gr,
                                       gr_of_interest = dt_to_gr(pc_mer_sv_bp_set[i]),
                                        proximal_dist_threshold = 5e5)
  pc_mer_sv_bp_dists <- gUtils::rrbind(pc_mer_sv_bp_dists,
                                             distances_to_add)
}

# Remove any duplicated BPs as result of MERs in close proximity but not same gene (TNK2 and RUBCN)
#uniq_pc_mer_sv_bp_dists <- pc_mer_sv_bp_dists[!duplicated(pc_mer_sv_bp_dists[,c(1:3,6:9)]),]

pc_mer_sv_bp_dens <- window_density(data_to_count = pc_mer_sv_bp_dists, window_size = 5e5 * 2, bin_size = 1e3)
pc_mer_sv_bp_dens$mer <- "PC"

pc_mer_sv_bp_dens$scaled_count <- pc_mer_sv_bp_dens$count * (1 + (1 / sqrt(length(pc_mer_sv_bp_set))))

# Set of Random non-MERs of similar size to grouped MERs (n=15)
# Run 5 tests and take median of density counts
# all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_set <- data.table()
# all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dists <- data.table()
# all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens <- data.table()

#   # randomize the non-MER for comparison to PC E/SE MERs, add to total set for record
```
