```{r}
#   rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dists <- data.table()
#   for(j in 1:nrow(rand_sim_non_mer_set)) {
#     
#     distances_to_add <- proximal_bp_dist(sv_bp_gr = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(interchrom_juncs_igh_masked)),
#                                          gr_of_interest = dt2gr(rand_sim_non_mer_set[j,]),
#                                          proximal_dist_threshold = 5e5)
#     rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dists <- gUtils::rrbind(rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dists,
#                                                    distances_to_add)
#   }
#   rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dists$test <- i
#   all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dists <- rrbind(all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dists,
#                                              rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dists)
#   
#   # Calculate the density of Tx BP across the window
#   rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens <- window_density(data_to_count = rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dists, window_size = 5e5 * 2, bin_size = 1e3)
#   rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens$mer <- "Simulated\nNon-MERs"
#   rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens$test <- i
#   
#   all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens <- rrbind(all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens,
#                                              rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens)
# }

# Save/load the simulation run data for reproducible runs
#saveRDS(object = all_rand_sim_non_mer_set, file = paste0(base_data_path, "nonMerSimulationTrxDistro.rds"))
#saveRDS(object = all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dists, file = paste0(base_data_path, "nonMerSimulationTrxDistances.rds"))
#saveRDS(object = all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens, file = paste0(base_data_path, "nonMerSimulationTrxDistanceDensity.rds"))
all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_set <- readRDS(file = paste0(base_data_path, "nonMerSimulationTrxDistro.rds"))
all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dists <- readRDS(file = paste0(base_data_path, "nonMerSimulationTrxDistances.rds"))
all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens <- readRDS(file = paste0(base_data_path, "nonMerSimulationTrxDistanceDensity.rds"))

# Build final rand sim non-MER density per bin 
median_all_rand_sim_non_mer_dens <- all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens %>%
                                      dplyr::group_by(bin) %>%
                                      dplyr::reframe("median_count" = median(count)) %>%
                                      dplyr::ungroup()

final_rand_sim_non_mer_sv_bp_dens <- all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens %>%
                                       dplyr::select(bin, midpoint_for_plot, mer) %>%
                                       dplyr::left_join(y = median_all_rand_sim_non_mer_dens, by = "bin") %>%
                                       dplyr::rename("count" = median_count)

final_rand_sim_non_mer_sv_bp_dens$scaled_count <- final_rand_sim_non_mer_sv_bp_dens$count * (1 + (1 / sqrt(nrow(all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_set))))

# # BOTH MER set
#pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_set <- e_se_mers %>%
#                        dplyr::filter(tissue %in% c("GCB,PC", "PC")) %>%
#                        dplyr::select(mer_id) %>%
#                        purrr::as_vector()
#pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_dists <- data.table()
#for(i in 1:length(pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_set)) {
#  
#  distances_to_add <- proximal_bp_dist(sv_bp_gr = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(interchrom_juncs_igh_masked)),
#                                       gr_of_interest = dt2gr(mers[mer_id == pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_set[i]]),
#                                        proximal_dist_threshold = 5e5)
#  pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_dists <- gUtils::rrbind(pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_dists,
#                                             distances_to_add)
#}
#
#pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_dens <- window_density(data_to_count = pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_dists, window_size = 5e5 * 2, bin_size = 1e3)
#pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_dens$mer <- "All PC E/SE"
#
#pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_dens$scaled_count <- pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_dens$count * (1 + (1 / sqrt(length(pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_set))))
#
# Let's plot the SV BP density
# rough window-step count
#ggplot(data = gUtils::rrbind(gcb_mer_sv_bp_dens, both_mer_sv_bp_dens, pc_mer_sv_bp_dens, final_rand_sim_non_mer_sv_bp_dens)) +
#  geom_line(aes(x = midpoint_for_plot, y = count, color = mer))

# Smoothed density
bp_density_for_plot <- gUtils::rrbind(gcb_mer_sv_bp_dens, dual_mer_sv_bp_dens, pc_mer_sv_bp_dens, final_rand_sim_non_mer_sv_bp_dens, bcl6_control_sv_bp_dens)
bp_density_for_plot$mer <- factor(bp_density_for_plot$mer,
                                  levels = c("GCB", "GCB,PC", "PC", "Simulated\nNon-MERs", "BCL6"))
mer_trx_bp_density <- ggplot(data = bp_density_for_plot) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgray", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = midpoint_for_plot, y = count, color = mer), method = "loess", formula = y ~ x, se = F, span = 0.17, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.5e6,0.5e6), expand = c(0.02,0.02), labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1,scale = 1e-3)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "MER Set", values = c("royalblue3","#540046","orangered3","#91D1C2","black")) +
  labs(x = "Interval around midpoint (kb)",
       y = "Breakpoint density") +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 1, fill = NA))
# export at 5 x 7 landscape

# Alt plot of all PC SE vs others
#alt_bp_density_for_plot <- gUtils::rrbind(gcb_mer_sv_bp_dens, pc_e_se_mer_sv_bp_dens, rand_sim_non_mer_sv_bp_dens, bcl6_control_sv_bp_dens)
#alt_bp_density_for_plot$mer <- factor(alt_bp_density_for_plot$mer,
#                                      levels = c("All PC E/SE", "GCB", "Simulated\nNon-MERs", "BCL6"))
#ggplot(data = alt_bp_density_for_plot) +
#  geom_smooth(aes(x = midpoint_for_plot, y = count, color = mer), method = "loess", formula = y ~ x, se = F, span = 0.17, linewidth = 1.25) +
#  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgray", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 2) +
#  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.5e6,0.5e6), expand = c(0.02,0.02), labels = scales::label_bytes(accuracy = 0.1)) +
#  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.01,0.01)) +
#  scale_color_manual(name = "MER Group", values = c("orangered","blue","#540046","black")) +
#  labs(x = "Interval around Midpoint of MERs (bp)",
#       y = "BP count density") +
#  theme(panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 1, fill = NA))

# Put some stats on the enrichment of BPs in PC MERs vs. simulated Non-MERs
# To do this, will emulate the process done in SigProfilerTopography
# 1. Calculate the mean of the loess density of SV BP for real data (i.e. PC MERs)
# 2. Calculate the mean of the loess density of simulated non-MER sets (iterations=10)
# 3. Z-test one mean (real) with means of n simulations
loess_dens_pc_bp <- loess(data = bp_density_for_plot %>% dplyr::filter(mer == "PC"), formula = scaled_count ~ midpoint_for_plot, span = 0.17)
real_mean_loess_dens_pc_mer_bp <- mean(loess_dens_pc_bp$fitted)

#alt_loess_dens_pc_bp <- loess(data = alt_bp_density_for_plot %>% dplyr::filter(mer == "All PC E/SE"), formula = scaled_count ~ midpoint_for_plot, span = 0.17)
#alt_real_mean_loess_dens_pc_mer_bp <- mean(alt_loess_dens_pc_bp$fitted)

# run simulation to get the means to compare observed value to
#sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer <- data.table()
#for(i in 1:n_distinct(all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens$test)) {
#  message(paste("Simulation", i, "...", sep = " "))
#  sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens <- all_rand_sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens %>%
#                              dplyr::filter(test == i)
#  
#  sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens$scaled_count <- sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens$count * (1 + (1 / sqrt(nrow(sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens))))
#  sim_non_mer_trx_bp_loess_density <- loess(data = sim_non_mer_trx_bp_dens, formula = scaled_count ~ midpoint_for_plot, span = 0.17)
#  sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer <- rrbind(sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer,
#                                            data.table("simulation" = i,
#                                                       "mean_loess_density" = mean(sim_non_mer_trx_bp_loess_density$fitted)))
#}

#saveRDS(object = sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer, file = paste0(base_data_path, "nonMerSimulationTrxLoessDensity.rds"))
sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer <- readRDS(file = paste0(base_data_path, "nonMerSimulationTrxLoessDensity.rds"))

###### From SigProfilerTopography ##########
###### Author: Burcak Otlu
# Always ztest
# one sample or two_sample?
# I decided to use one sample because for simulations I will get vertical vector and average of that vertical vector  must be equal to avg_simulated_signal, there is a way to self verification
# Comparing one mean with means of n simulations gives a more realistic p-value.
# In case of comparison of two samples, ztest and ttest gives either 0 or very low p-values.
# zstat, pvalue = ztest(expectedValues, value=observedValue) results in very small p-values therefore we are not calling in this way.
# if there is only one simulation mean in simulationsHorizontalMeans, then pvalue is nan

# also use BOTH, GCB group and BCL6 as comparative
loess_dens_dual_bp <- loess(data = bp_density_for_plot %>% dplyr::filter(mer == "GCB,PC"), formula = scaled_count ~ midpoint_for_plot, span = 0.17)
real_mean_loess_dens_dual_mer_bp <- mean(loess_dens_dual_bp$fitted)

loess_dens_gcb_bp <- loess(data = bp_density_for_plot %>% dplyr::filter(mer == "GCB"), formula = scaled_count ~ midpoint_for_plot, span = 0.17)
real_mean_loess_dens_gcb_mer_bp <- mean(loess_dens_gcb_bp$fitted)

loess_dens_bcl6_bp <- loess(data = bp_density_for_plot %>% dplyr::filter(mer == "BCL6"), formula = scaled_count ~ midpoint_for_plot, span = 0.17)
real_mean_loess_dens_bcl6_mer_bp <- mean(loess_dens_bcl6_bp$fitted)

# now run Z-test of real obs mean vs simulated means
pc_sptbo_ztest_trx_bp_density <- BSDA::z.test(x = sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer$mean_loess_density,
                                           mu = real_mean_loess_dens_pc_mer_bp,
                                           alternative = "two.sided",
                                           sigma.x = sd(sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer$mean_loess_density))

dual_sptbo_ztest_trx_bp_density <- BSDA::z.test(x = sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer$mean_loess_density,
                                           mu = real_mean_loess_dens_dual_mer_bp,
                                           alternative = "two.sided",
                                           sigma.x = sd(sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer$mean_loess_density))

gcb_sptbo_ztest_trx_bp_density <- BSDA::z.test(x = sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer$mean_loess_density,
                                           mu = real_mean_loess_dens_gcb_mer_bp,
                                           alternative = "two.sided",
                                           sigma.x = sd(sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer$mean_loess_density))
# Fold change of means
message("Fold-change BP density at PC E/SE-MERs compared to simulated Non-MER background: ",
        round(real_mean_loess_dens_pc_mer_bp / mean(sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer$mean_loess_density), digits = 2))

message("Fold-change BP density at Dual GCB/PC E/SE-MERs compared to simulated Non-MER background: ",
        round(real_mean_loess_dens_dual_mer_bp / mean(sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer$mean_loess_density), digits = 2))

message("Fold-change BP density at GCB E/SE-MERs compared to simulated Non-MER background: ",
        round(real_mean_loess_dens_gcb_mer_bp / mean(sim_mean_loess_trx_dens_non_mer$mean_loess_density), digits = 2))
```

Look at all intrachromosomal breakpoints
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

intrachrom_juncs <- hq_total_sv_bp_dt %>%
                      dplyr::filter(class != "TRA")
intrachrom_juncs$nearest_gene <- genes$gene_name[nearest(x = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(intrachrom_juncs)), subject = gr.stripstrand(genes))]

# Convert to GR obj for assessment of overlap with MERs
intrachrom_ranges <- dt_to_gr(intrachrom_juncs)

# find E/SE-MER simple SVs by class
# GCB
gcb_mer_simple_sv <- data.table()
for(i in 1:nrow(gcb_mer_sv_bp_set)) {
  
  simple_sv_to_add <- gr.findoverlaps(query = dt_to_gr(intrachrom_juncs),
                                      subject = dt_to_gr(gcb_mer_sv_bp_set[i]),
                                      qcol = c("class","support","patient","sample","sv_id","nearest_gene"),
                                      scol = c("mer_gene_label_overlap","mer_id_overlap"))
  
  gcb_mer_simple_sv_per_mer <- data.table("mer_gene_label_overlap" = rep(gcb_mer_sv_bp_set$mer_gene_label_overlap[i], 3),
                                          "mer_id_overlap" = rep(gcb_mer_sv_bp_set$mer_id_overlap[i], 3),
                                          "class" = c("DEL","INV","DUP"),
                                          "count" = c(0,0,0))
  
  if(length(simple_sv_to_add) > 0) {
    
    if(length(simple_sv_to_add$class == "DEL") > 0) {
      gcb_mer_simple_sv_per_mer$count[1] <- gr2dt(simple_sv_to_add) %>%
                                              dplyr::filter(class == "DEL") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(sv_id) %>%
                                              dplyr::n_distinct()
    }
    if(length(simple_sv_to_add$class == "INV") > 0) {
      gcb_mer_simple_sv_per_mer$count[2] <- gr2dt(simple_sv_to_add) %>%
                                              dplyr::filter(class == "INV") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(sv_id) %>%
                                              dplyr::n_distinct()
    }
    if(length(simple_sv_to_add$class == "DUP") > 0) {
      gcb_mer_simple_sv_per_mer$count[3] <- gr2dt(simple_sv_to_add) %>%
                                              dplyr::filter(class == "DUP") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(sv_id) %>%
                                              dplyr::n_distinct()
    }
  }
  
  gcb_mer_simple_sv <- gUtils::rrbind(gcb_mer_simple_sv,
                                      gcb_mer_simple_sv_per_mer)
}

# PC
pc_mer_simple_sv <- data.table()
for(i in 1:nrow(pc_mer_sv_bp_set)) {
  
  simple_sv_to_add <- gr.findoverlaps(query = dt_to_gr(intrachrom_juncs),
                                      subject = dt_to_gr(pc_mer_sv_bp_set[i]),
                                      qcol = c("class","support","patient","sample","sv_id","nearest_gene"),
                                      scol = c("mer_gene_label_overlap","mer_id_overlap"))
  
  pc_mer_simple_sv_per_mer <- data.table("mer_gene_label_overlap" = rep(pc_mer_sv_bp_set$mer_gene_label_overlap[i], 3),
                                          "mer_id_overlap" = rep(pc_mer_sv_bp_set$mer_id_overlap[i], 3),
                                          "class" = c("DEL","INV","DUP"),
                                          "count" = c(0,0,0))
  
  if(length(simple_sv_to_add) > 0) {
    
    if(length(simple_sv_to_add$class == "DEL") > 0) {
      pc_mer_simple_sv_per_mer$count[1] <- gr2dt(simple_sv_to_add) %>%
                                              dplyr::filter(class == "DEL") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(sv_id) %>%
                                              dplyr::n_distinct()
    }
    if(length(simple_sv_to_add$class == "INV") > 0) {
      pc_mer_simple_sv_per_mer$count[2] <- gr2dt(simple_sv_to_add) %>%
                                              dplyr::filter(class == "INV") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(sv_id) %>%
                                              dplyr::n_distinct()
    }
    if(length(simple_sv_to_add$class == "DUP") > 0) {
      pc_mer_simple_sv_per_mer$count[3] <- gr2dt(simple_sv_to_add) %>%
                                              dplyr::filter(class == "DUP") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(sv_id) %>%
                                              dplyr::n_distinct()
    }
  }
  
  pc_mer_simple_sv <- gUtils::rrbind(pc_mer_simple_sv,
                                      pc_mer_simple_sv_per_mer)
}

# Dual
dual_mer_simple_sv <- data.table()
for(i in 1:nrow(dual_mer_sv_bp_set)) {
  
  simple_sv_to_add <- gr.findoverlaps(query = dt_to_gr(intrachrom_juncs),
                                      subject = dt_to_gr(dual_mer_sv_bp_set[i]),
                                      qcol = c("class","support","patient","sample","sv_id","nearest_gene"),
                                      scol = c("mer_gene_label_overlap","mer_id_overlap"))
  
  dual_mer_simple_sv_per_mer <- data.table("mer_gene_label_overlap" = rep(dual_mer_sv_bp_set$mer_gene_label_overlap[i], 3),
                                          "mer_id_overlap" = rep(dual_mer_sv_bp_set$mer_id_overlap[i], 3),
                                          "class" = c("DEL","INV","DUP"),
                                          "count" = c(0,0,0))
  
  if(length(simple_sv_to_add) > 0) {
    
    if(length(simple_sv_to_add$class == "DEL") > 0) {
      dual_mer_simple_sv_per_mer$count[1] <- gr2dt(simple_sv_to_add) %>%
                                              dplyr::filter(class == "DEL") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(sv_id) %>%
                                              dplyr::n_distinct()
    }
    if(length(simple_sv_to_add$class == "INV") > 0) {
      dual_mer_simple_sv_per_mer$count[2] <- gr2dt(simple_sv_to_add) %>%
                                              dplyr::filter(class == "INV") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(sv_id) %>%
                                              dplyr::n_distinct()
    }
    if(length(simple_sv_to_add$class == "DUP") > 0) {
      dual_mer_simple_sv_per_mer$count[3] <- gr2dt(simple_sv_to_add) %>%
                                              dplyr::filter(class == "DUP") %>%
                                              dplyr::select(sv_id) %>%
                                              dplyr::n_distinct()
    }
  }
  
  dual_mer_simple_sv <- gUtils::rrbind(dual_mer_simple_sv,
                                      dual_mer_simple_sv_per_mer)
}
```

## Chromosomal rearrangement of E/SE-MERs recurrently involves MYC

Find the partners of all grouped MERs
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

###############################################
# Find the partners of all grouped MERs

# first grab all the non-overlapping MER IDs
all_se_mer_query_set <- rbind(gcb_mer_sv_bp_set, dual_mer_sv_bp_set, pc_mer_sv_bp_set)
mer_prox_bp_dist <- data.table()
for(i in 1:nrow(all_se_mer_query_set)) {
  moi_prox_bp_dist <- proximal_bp_dist(sv_bp_gr = interchrom_juncs_igh_masked_gr,
                                          gr_of_interest = dt_to_gr(all_se_mer_query_set[i]),
                                          proximal_dist_threshold = 5e5)
  
  if(nrow(moi_prox_bp_dist) > 0) {
    mer_prox_bp_dist <- rrbind(mer_prox_bp_dist,
                               cbind(moi_prox_bp_dist,
                                     e_se_mers %>%
                                       dplyr::filter(mer_id %in% as.character(str_split(string = all_se_mer_query_set$mer_id_overlap[i], pattern = ";", simplify = T)[1])) %>%
                                       dplyr::select(mer_gene_label,mer_id,enhancer_id,tissue,enhancer_type)))
  }
}

# There are SV BP that are likely counted twice as some MERs are in within the same +/- 1.5 Mbp window
# Remove duplicated pair IDs so each is only counted once per gene
mer_trx_partners_nodup <- mer_prox_bp_dist %>%
                            dplyr::group_by(nearest_gene_distal_partner) %>%
                            dplyr::filter(!duplicated(pair_id)) %>%
                            dplyr::ungroup()

top_mer_trx_partners <- mer_trx_partners_nodup %>%
                          dplyr::group_by(nearest_gene_distal_partner) %>%
                          dplyr::count() %>%
                          dplyr::ungroup() %>%
                          dplyr::arrange(desc(n)) %>%
                          dplyr::mutate("pct_of_mer_trx_bp" = round((n / nrow(mer_trx_partners_nodup))*100, digits = 2))

top_mer_trx_partners_by_se <- mer_trx_partners_nodup %>%
                               dplyr::group_by(nearest_gene_distal_partner,tissue) %>%
                               dplyr::count() %>%
                               dplyr::arrange(desc(n))

# How many MER TRX
message("Total translocations at E/SE-MERs: ")
print(mer_trx_partners_nodup %>%
        dplyr::group_by(tissue) %>%
        dplyr::count() %>%
        dplyr::ungroup())

# What percentage of all TRX BP are linked to partners of interest MYC / POU5F1B
# this is pct of all SE-MER TRX BPs
myc_pou51b_pct_grouped_mers <- mer_trx_partners_nodup %>%
   dplyr::filter(nearest_gene_distal_partner %in% c("MYC", "POU5F1B")) %>%
   dplyr::group_by(nearest_gene_distal_partner) %>%
   dplyr::count() %>%
   dplyr::ungroup() %>%
   dplyr::arrange(desc(n)) %>%
   dplyr::mutate("cumulative_pct_of_mer_trx_bp" = round((sum(n) / nrow(mer_trx_partners_nodup))*100, digits = 2))

top_mer_trx_partners_by_se %>%
  dplyr::filter(nearest_gene_distal_partner %in% c("MYC","POU5F1B"))

# find SV IDs
myc_pou51b_trx_ids <- mer_trx_partners_nodup %>%
                        dplyr::filter(nearest_gene_distal_partner %in% c("MYC", "POU5F1B")) %>%
                        dplyr::select(pair_id) %>%
                        purrr::as_vector()

# to correctly calculate the pct, need to count single SV events not each BP for an SV (i.e. use total BP divided by 2)
message("Total TRX BP in E/SE MERs to MYC: ",length(myc_pou51b_trx_ids))
message("Percentage of all TRX BP have junction from E/SE MER to MYC: ",
        round((length(myc_pou51b_trx_ids) / n_distinct(interchrom_juncs_fully_masked$sv_id)) * 100, digits = 2))

# how many patients have these TRX
myc_pou51b_partners <- interchrom_juncs_fully_masked %>%
                        dplyr::filter(sv_id %in% myc_pou51b_trx_ids)

message("Number of patients with E/SE MER to MYC junction: ", n_distinct(myc_pou51b_partners$patient))
message("Percentage of patients with E/SE MER to MYC junction: ",
        round((n_distinct(myc_pou51b_partners$patient) / 294) * 100, digits = 2))

# MYC to PC E/SE-MERs
myc_pou51b_partners %>%
  dplyr::filter(!nearest_gene %in% c("MYC","POU5F1B")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(seqnames) %>%
  dplyr::select(nearest_gene) %>%
  table()

# GCB E/SE MER to MYC junctions
print("Number of TRX junctions from GCB E/SE-MERs from RPIA to MYC")
myc_pou51b_partners %>%
  dplyr::filter(nearest_gene == "RPIA") %>%
  dplyr::select(seqnames,start,end,strand,class,support,patient,sample,nearest_gene,sv_id) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = mer_trx_partners_nodup %>%
                         dplyr::select(pair_id,distance_proximal,chrom_distal_partner,nearest_gene_distal_partner) %>%
                         dplyr::rename("sv_id" = pair_id),
                   by = "sv_id")

# All MYC to PC E/SE-MERs
message("Number of MYC TRX junctions from PC E/SE-MERs: ",
       myc_pou51b_partners %>%
         dplyr::filter(nearest_gene %in% c("BLOC1S5-TXNDC5","EEF1E1-BLOC1S5","BMP6","TENT5C")) %>%
         dplyr::count())

# TXNDC5 BPs by patients
myc_pou51b_partners %>%
  dplyr::filter(nearest_gene %in% c("BLOC1S5-TXNDC5","EEF1E1-BLOC1S5","BMP6")) %>%
  dplyr::select(patient) %>%
  dplyr::n_distinct()

myc_pou51b_partners %>%
  dplyr::filter(nearest_gene == "TENT5C") %>%
  dplyr::select(patient) %>%
  dplyr::n_distinct()

interchrom_juncs_fully_masked %>%
  dplyr::filter(sv_id %in% (mer_trx_partners_nodup %>%
                            dplyr::filter(nearest_gene_distal_partner == "IGHV3OR16-17") %>%
                            dplyr::select(pair_id) %>%
                            purrr::as_vector() %>%
                            as.numeric()))


interchrom_juncs_fully_masked %>%
  dplyr::filter(sv_id %in% (mer_trx_partners_nodup %>%
                            dplyr::filter(nearest_gene_distal_partner == "MTA1") %>%
                            dplyr::select(pair_id) %>%
                            purrr::as_vector() %>%
                            as.numeric()))

interchrom_juncs_fully_masked %>%
  dplyr::filter(sv_id %in% (mer_trx_partners_nodup %>%
                            dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label == "TENT5C") %>%
                            dplyr::select(pair_id) %>%
                            purrr::as_vector() %>%
                            as.numeric()))
```

Look at BCL6 partner TRX
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

bcl6_trx_sv_id <- mer_trx_partners_nodup %>%
                    dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label == "BCL6") %>%
                    dplyr::select(pair_id) %>%
                    purrr::as_vector()

bcl6_trx_sv_pair <- hq_total_sv_bp_dt %>%
  dplyr::filter(sv_id == bcl6_trx_sv_id)
print("BCL6 TRX pair:")
bcl6_trx_sv_pair %>%
  dplyr::select(seqnames,start,end,strand,class,support,patient,sample,bp_order)

print("BCL6 junction partner distance from MAFB (in bp):")
as.numeric((bcl6_trx_sv_pair %>%
              dplyr::filter(seqnames == "chr20") %>%
              dplyr::select(start) %>%
              purrr::as_vector()) - gr2dt(complete_gene_segments_gr %Q% (gene_name == "MAFB" & segment == "five_prime_utr"))$start)
```

Is TXNDC5 and TENT5C expressed in normal plasma cells and myeloma cells?
```{r}
# Read in normal immune cell RNA data from Monaco
rna_immune_cell_monaco <- data.table::fread(paste0(base_data_path, "rna_immune_cell_monaco.tsv.gz"),
                                            sep = "\t",
                                            header = T,
                                            stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

rna_immune_cell_monaco$`Immune cell` <- factor(rna_immune_cell_monaco$`Immune cell`,
                                               levels = rna_immune_cell_monaco %>%
                                                          dplyr::filter(`Gene name` == "TXNDC5") %>%
                                                          dplyr::arrange(desc(nTPM)) %>%
                                                          dplyr::select(`Immune cell`) %>%
                                                          purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                                          as.character())

txndc5_rna_immune_cells <- rna_immune_cell_monaco %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Gene name` == "TXNDC5") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `Immune cell`, y = nTPM, fill = `Immune cell`)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "TXNDC5",
       x = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.02,0.02)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = paletteer_c("grDevices::rainbow", 30)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1))

tent5c_rna_immune_cells <- rna_immune_cell_monaco %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Gene name` == "TENT5C") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `Immune cell`, y = nTPM, fill = `Immune cell`)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "TENT5C",
       x = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.02,0.02)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = paletteer_c("grDevices::rainbow", 30)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# Combine both immune expression plots
immune_expression_plots <- txndc5_rna_immune_cells / tent5c_rna_immune_cells +
  plot_layout(ncol = 1, axes = "collect_x", axis_titles = "collect_y")
# export 6 x 8 landscape

# Read in cell line RNA data from 
rna_cancer_cell_line <- data.table::fread(paste0(base_data_path, "rna_cell_line_cancer.tsv.gz"),
                                            sep = "\t",
                                            header = T,
                                            stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

rna_cancer_cell_line$Cancer <- factor(rna_cancer_cell_line$Cancer,
                                               levels = rna_cancer_cell_line %>%
                                                          dplyr::filter(`Gene name` == "TXNDC5") %>%
                                                          dplyr::arrange(desc(nTPM)) %>%
                                                          dplyr::select(Cancer) %>%
                                                          purrr::as_vector() %>%
                                                          as.character())

txndc5_rna_cancer_cell_lines <- rna_cancer_cell_line %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Gene name` == "TXNDC5") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Cancer, y = nTPM, fill = Cancer)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "TXNDC5",
       x = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.02,0.02)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1))

tent5c_rna_cancer_cell_lines <- rna_cancer_cell_line %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Gene name` == "TENT5C") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Cancer, y = nTPM, fill = Cancer)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "TENT5C",
       x = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.02,0.02)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# Combine both cancer cell line expression plots
cancer_cell_line_expression_plots <- txndc5_rna_cancer_cell_lines / tent5c_rna_cancer_cell_lines +
  plot_layout(ncol = 1, axes = "collect_x", axis_titles = "collect_y")
```

Look at CoMMpass paired WGS/RNA/Survival for analysis of TXNDC5 and TENT5C E/SE-MERs effect
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

txndc5_myc_trx_patients <- myc_pou51b_partners %>%
  dplyr::filter(nearest_gene %in% c("BLOC1S5-TXNDC5","EEF1E1-BLOC1S5","BMP6")) %>%
  dplyr::select(patient) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  as.character()

muts_txndc5_myc_trx_partner_mer <- muts_per_grouped_mer_for_plot %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label == "TXNDC5" &
                  patient %in% txndc5_myc_trx_patients)


tent5c_myc_trx_patients <- myc_pou51b_partners %>%
  dplyr::filter(nearest_gene == "TENT5C") %>%
  dplyr::select(patient) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  purrr::as_vector() %>%
  as.character()

muts_tent5c_myc_trx_partner_mer <- muts_per_grouped_mer_for_plot %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label %in% c("TXNDC5","TENT5C") &
                  patient %in% c(txndc5_myc_trx_patients, tent5c_myc_trx_patients))

# Read in CoMMpass MER muts
commpass_mer_bed <- read_bed_file(bed_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "DEPRECIATEDfunSeqAnalysis/commpass.funseq.anno.bed.gz"),
                                     has_header = F,
                                     additional_col_names = c("ref", "alt", "ID", "non_coding_score"))

commpass_mer_muts <- gr.findoverlaps(query = commpass_mer_bed,
                                     subject = mers_gr,
                                     qcol = c("ID","ref","alt"),
                                     scol = c("mer_id","mer_gene_label"))

commpass_mer_muts_dt <- gr2dt(commpass_mer_muts) %>%
                            dplyr::mutate("Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode" = str_remove(string = ID, pattern = ".*--"),
                                          "Tumor_Sample_Barcode" = str_remove(string = ID, pattern = "--.*")) %>%
                            dplyr::rename("Reference_Allele"= ref, "Tumor_Seq_Allele2" = alt)

# CoMMpass MYC events from Even's paper
commpass_sv_hg19 <- data.table::fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "mmrf_delly_mapq_60_filtered_baseline.txt")) %>%
                      dplyr::mutate("sample_short_id" = paste0(sample, "_CD138pos"))

# expected ranges from Aneta's paper
commpass_myc_txndc5_events <- commpass_sv_hg19 %>%
  dplyr::filter(chrom1 == 8 &
                  SVTYPE == "TRA" &
                  pos1 > 126000000 &
                  pos1 < 131000000 &
                  chrom2 == 6 &
                  pos2 > 7600000 &
                  pos2 < 8400000)

commpass_myc_tent5c_events <- commpass_sv_hg19 %>%
  dplyr::filter(chrom1 == 8 &
                  SVTYPE == "TRA" &
                  pos1 > 126000000 &
                  pos1 < 131000000 &
                  chrom2 == 1 &
                  pos2 > 118100000 &
                  pos2 < 118500000)

commpass_myc_igh_events <- commpass_sv_hg19 %>%
  dplyr::filter(chrom1 == 14 &
                  SVTYPE == "TRA" &
                  pos1 > 105000000 &
                  pos1 < 107500000 &
                  chrom2 == 8 &
                  pos2 > 126000000 &
                  pos2 < 131000000)

commpass_myc_igk_events <- commpass_sv_hg19 %>%
  dplyr::filter(chrom1 == 8 &
                  SVTYPE == "TRA" &
                  pos1 > 126000000 &
                  pos1 < 131000000 &
                  chrom2 == 2 &
                  pos2 > 88800000 &
                  pos2 < 90200000)

commpass_myc_igl_events <- commpass_sv_hg19 %>%
  dplyr::filter(chrom1 == 22 &
                  SVTYPE == "TRA" &
                  pos1 > 22500000 &
                  pos1 < 24500000 &
                  chrom2 == 8 &
                  pos2 > 126000000 &
                  pos2 < 131000000)

commpass_myc_other_events1 <- commpass_sv_hg19 %>%
  dplyr::filter(chrom1 == 8 &
                  SVTYPE == "TRA" &
                  pos1 > 126000000 &
                  pos1 < 131000000)

commpass_myc_other_events2 <- commpass_sv_hg19 %>%
  dplyr::filter(chrom2 == 8 &
                  SVTYPE == "TRA" &
                  pos2 > 126000000 &
                  pos2 < 131000000)
```

Survival analysis with CoMMpass
```{r}
# Read in the survival data
commpass_survival_data <- fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "DEPRECIATEDcommpassSurvival/commpass_OS_PFS_20221207.txt")) %>%
                    dplyr::rename("patient_short_id" = Patient)
message("Number of patients with survival data: ", length(commpass_survival_data$patient_short_id))

# Read in WGS cases
commpass_wgs_cases <- fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "DEPRECIATEDcommpassSurvival/extendedMetadata.txt")) %>%
               dplyr::filter(cohort == "CoMMpass") %>%
               dplyr::mutate("patient_short_id" = str_remove(string = patient, pattern = "_\\d_.*_[LK].*$"),
                             "sample_short_id" = str_remove(string = sample, pattern = "_T\\d+_.*_[LK].*$")) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(sample_short_id) & !duplicated(sample_short_id))
message("Number of patients with WGS data: ",length(commpass_wgs_cases$patient_short_id))

# Find intersection of survival and WGS data
commpass_surv_wgs_pairs <- commpass_wgs_cases[which(commpass_wgs_cases$patient_short_id %in% commpass_survival_data$patient_short_id)] %>%
                    dplyr::left_join(y = commpass_survival_data, by = "patient_short_id") %>%
                    dplyr::filter(!is.na(PFS_status) & !duplicated(patient_short_id))
message("Number of patients with paired survival / WGS data: ", length(unique(commpass_surv_wgs_pairs$patient_short_id)))

# Read in bulk RNA counts data
commpass_rna_counts <- fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "DEPRECIATEDgramAnalysis/MMRF_CoMMpass_IA21.featurecounts.counts.unstr.txt"),
                             sep = "\t",
                             header = T)

# Grab short notation of RNA sample names to match with normal sample names
commpass_rna_samples <- colnames(commpass_rna_counts)[-1]
message("Number of samples with bulk RNA-seq data: ", length(commpass_rna_samples))

# Find intersection of survival / WGS pairs and bulk RNA-seq counts data
wgs_rna_pairs <- commpass_wgs_cases %>%
                        dplyr::filter(sample_short_id %in% commpass_rna_samples[which(commpass_rna_samples %in% commpass_wgs_cases$sample_short_id)])
paired_wgs_rna_counts <- data.table(commpass_rna_counts[,1],
                                         commpass_rna_counts[,-1] %>%
                                           dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(commpass_rna_samples[which(commpass_rna_samples %in% wgs_rna_pairs$sample_short_id)])))
message("Final number of paired WGS / RNA cases: ", length(wgs_rna_pairs$patient))
```

Subset the data into MYC events to TXNDC5 / TENT5C and Ig loci
```{r}
myc_event_test <- commpass_surv_wgs_pairs %>%
  dplyr::mutate("myc_trx" = case_when(
    sample_short_id %in% unique(c(commpass_myc_txndc5_events$sample_short_id, commpass_myc_tent5c_events$sample_short_id)) ~ "TXNDC5/TENT5C",
    sample_short_id %in% unique(c(commpass_myc_igh_events$sample_short_id, commpass_myc_igk_events$sample_short_id, commpass_myc_igl_events$sample_short_id)) ~ "IGH/IGK/IGL",
    !sample_short_id %in% unique(c(commpass_myc_txndc5_events$sample_short_id,commpass_myc_tent5c_events$sample_short_id,
                                   commpass_myc_igh_events$sample_short_id,commpass_myc_igk_events$sample_short_id,commpass_myc_igl_events$sample_short_id,
                                   commpass_myc_other_events1$sample_short_id, commpass_myc_other_events2$sample_short_id)) ~ "No event"),
                "all_v_none" = case_when(myc_trx %in% c("TXNDC5/TENT5C","IGH/IGK/IGL") ~ "myc",
                                         myc_trx == "No event" ~ "none"))

myc_event_test$myc_trx <- factor(myc_event_test$myc_trx,
                                 levels = c("TXNDC5/TENT5C","IGH/IGK/IGL","No event"))

myc_event_test$all_v_none <- factor(myc_event_test$all_v_none,
                                    levels = c("myc","none"))

# OS - ANY MYC EVENT
#ggsurvfit::survfit2(Surv(OS_months, OS_status) ~ all_v_none,
#                    data = myc_event_test) %>%
#    ggsurvfit::ggsurvfit() +
#    ggsurvfit::add_risktable(theme = ggsurvfit::theme_risktable_boxed(),
#                             risktable_height = 0.2,
#                             risktable_group = "risktable_stats") +
#    ggsurvfit::add_risktable_strata_symbol() +
#    ggsurvfit::add_censor_mark()

#survival::survdiff(Surv(OS_months, OS_status) ~ all_v_none,
#                   data = myc_event_test)


# OS - Specific MYC events
myc_os_curves <- ggsurvfit::survfit2(Surv(OS_months, OS_status) ~ myc_trx,
                    data = myc_event_test) %>%
    ggsurvfit::ggsurvfit() +
    ggsurvfit::add_risktable(theme = ggsurvfit::theme_risktable_boxed(),
                             risktable_height = 0.2,
                             risktable_group = "risktable_stats") +
    ggsurvfit::add_risktable_strata_symbol() +
    ggsurvfit::add_censor_mark()
# export 6 x 7 portrait

survival::survdiff(Surv(OS_months, OS_status) ~ myc_trx,
                   data = myc_event_test)

# PFS
#survival::survdiff(Surv(PFS_months, PFS_status) ~ myc_trx,

#survival::coxph(Surv(PFS_months, PFS_status) ~ myc_trx,

#ggsurvfit::survfit2(Surv(PFS_months, PFS_status) ~ myc_trx,
```

RNA analysis of TXNDC5/TENT5C E/SE-MER events compared to no event in CoMMpass
```{r}
commpass_wgs_rna_pairs_myc_anno <- wgs_rna_pairs %>%
  dplyr::mutate("myc_trx" = case_when(
    sample_short_id %in% unique(c(commpass_myc_txndc5_events$sample_short_id, commpass_myc_tent5c_events$sample_short_id)) ~ "TXNDC5/TENT5C",
    sample_short_id %in% unique(c(commpass_myc_igh_events$sample_short_id, commpass_myc_igk_events$sample_short_id, commpass_myc_igl_events$sample_short_id)) ~ "IGH/IGK/IGL",
    !sample_short_id %in% unique(c(commpass_myc_txndc5_events$sample_short_id,commpass_myc_tent5c_events$sample_short_id,
                                   commpass_myc_igh_events$sample_short_id,commpass_myc_igk_events$sample_short_id,commpass_myc_igl_events$sample_short_id,
                                   commpass_myc_other_events1$sample_short_id, commpass_myc_other_events2$sample_short_id)) ~ "No event"),
                "all_v_none" = case_when(myc_trx %in% c("TXNDC5/TENT5C","IGH/IGK/IGL") ~ "myc",
                                         myc_trx == "No event" ~ "none"))

# Remove unused placeholders in the genes
paired_wgs_rna_counts <- paired_wgs_rna_counts %>%
                           dplyr::filter(!Gene %in% c("N_ambiguous","N_multimapping","N_noFeature","N_unmapped"))

# Write out the data.table of counts needed for DESeq2 workflow
#fwrite(x = paired_wgs_rna_counts,
#       file = paste0(base_data_path, "commpass_paired_wgs_rna_raw_counts.txt"),
#       sep = "\t",
#       col.names = T)

# Build the conditions file for DESeq2 workflow
# Split by MYC event
commpass_rna_wgs_pairs_myc_conditions <- data.table("sample" = commpass_wgs_rna_pairs_myc_anno$sample_short_id,
                                                    "condition" = commpass_wgs_rna_pairs_myc_anno$all_v_none)

#fwrite(x = commpass_rna_wgs_pairs_myc_conditions,
#       file = paste0(base_data_path, "commpass_paired_wgs_rna_conditions.txt"),
#       sep = "\t",
#       col.names = T)

# Run the DESeq2 workflow
#myc_vs_none <- get_deseq2_diff_expr(counts_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "commpass_paired_wgs_rna_raw_counts.txt"),
#                                     condition_file_path = paste0(base_data_path, "commpass_paired_wgs_rna_conditions.txt"),
#                                     gene_universe = gene_body_hg38,
#                                     gene_symbol_column = NULL,
#                                     ensembl_id_column = "Gene",
#                                     formula_string = "myc ~ none",
#                                     min_transcripts = 10)
#saveRDS(object = myc_vs_none, file = paste0(base_data_path, "commpass_paired_wgs_rna_myc_deg.rds"))
myc_vs_none <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "commpass_paired_wgs_rna_myc_deg.rds"))


myc_expr_dt <- myc_vs_none$deseq2_tpm_dt %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene == "MYC") %>%
  reshape2::melt(id.vars = "gene",
                 variable.name = "sample_short_id",
                 value.name = "expr") %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y = commpass_wgs_rna_pairs_myc_anno %>%
                         dplyr::select(sample_short_id, myc_trx, all_v_none),
                   by = "sample_short_id")

myc_expr_dt$myc_trx <- factor(myc_expr_dt$myc_trx,
                              levels = c("TXNDC5/TENT5C","IGH/IGK/IGL","No event"))

myc_expr_dt$all_v_none <- factor(myc_expr_dt$myc_trx,
                              levels = c("myc","none"))

myc_expr_wilcox_output <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = myc_expr_dt,
                                                             formula = expr ~ myc_trx,
                                                             p.adjust.method = "fdr")
myc_expr_wilcox_output$p_string <- scales::scientific(myc_expr_wilcox_output$p.adj)

myc_expr_medians <- myc_expr_dt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(myc_trx) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("median_expr" = median(log2(expr + 1)))

myc_expr_boxplots <- ggplot(myc_expr_dt) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = myc_trx, y = log2(expr + 1), fill = myc_trx)) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Log2(TPM + 1)") +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = myc_expr_wilcox_output[2:3,],
                             label = "P={p_string}",
                             y.position = c(12,11),
                             bracket.nudge.y = 0.01,
                             size = 4.5,
                             tip.length = 0.015) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

Epilogos in MERs to quantify the % make-up for chromatin state
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Epilogo top class
# Read in Epilogo output
#mm_epilogos <- aggregate_these(path_to_files = paste0(base_data_path, "epiLogoAnalysis/results/"),
#                               pattern_to_grab = "*_mm_epilogos.*.txt.gz",
#                               delim = "\t",
#                               has_header = F)
chromhmm_metadata <- fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "epiLogoAnalysis/metadata.tsv"),
                           sep = "\t",
                           header = T)
#colnames(mm_epilogos) <- c("chrom", "start", "end", chromhmm_metadata$long_name)

#saveRDS(object = mm_epilogos, file = paste0(base_data_path, "epiLogoAnalysis/mm_epilogos.rds"))
mm_epilogos <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "epiLogoAnalysis/mm_epilogos.rds"))

# Subset the epilogos to overlap with MERs
# find epilogo proportion for example MERs
bcl6_control_epilogos <- epilogo_prop_per_region(roi = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(e_se_mers %>% dplyr::filter(mer_id == "mer1"))),
                                                 roi_id = "BCL6-1")
bcl6_alt_control_epilogos <- epilogo_prop_per_region(roi = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(e_se_mers %>% dplyr::filter(mer_id == "mer2"))),
                                                     roi_id = "BCL6-2")

# Get the mean of the whole set of MERs per group similar to breakpoint density
# GC/DLBCL MER set
gcb_mer_epilogo_set <- gcb_mer_sv_bp_set
#gcb_mer_epilogo_set <- e_se_mers %>%
#                              dplyr::filter(tissue == "GCB" & mer_id != "mer159") %>%  # Don't count the same region more than once
#                              dplyr::select(mer_id) %>%
#                              purrr::as_vector()
gcb_mer_epilogo_props <- data.table()
for(i in 1:nrow(gcb_mer_epilogo_set)) {
  moi <- as.character(str_split(string = gcb_mer_epilogo_set$mer_id_overlap[i], pattern = ";", simplify = T)[1])
  
  epilogos_to_add <- epilogo_prop_per_region(roi = mers_gr %Q% (mer_id == moi),
                                             roi_id = moi)
  gcb_mer_epilogo_props <- gUtils::rrbind(gcb_mer_epilogo_props,
                                               epilogos_to_add)
}
gcb_mer_epilogo_props$e_se_group <- "GCB"
mean_gcb_mer_epilogo_props <- gcb_mer_epilogo_props %>%
                                    dplyr::group_by(state,e_se_group) %>%
                                    dplyr::reframe("mean_prop" = mean(prop))

# Dual GCB,PC MER set
dual_mer_epilogo_set <- dual_mer_sv_bp_set
#dual_mer_epilogo_set <- e_se_mers %>%
#                          dplyr::filter(tissue == "GCB,PC") %>%
#                          dplyr::select(mer_id) %>%
#                          purrr::as_vector()
dual_mer_epilogo_props <- data.table()
for(i in 1:nrow(dual_mer_epilogo_set)) {
  moi <- as.character(str_split(string = dual_mer_epilogo_set$mer_id_overlap[i], pattern = ";", simplify = T)[1])
  
  epilogos_to_add <- epilogo_prop_per_region(roi = mers_gr %Q% (mer_id == moi),
                                             roi_id = moi)
  dual_mer_epilogo_props <- gUtils::rrbind(dual_mer_epilogo_props,
                                               epilogos_to_add)
}
dual_mer_epilogo_props$e_se_group <- "GCB,PC"
mean_dual_mer_epilogo_props <- dual_mer_epilogo_props %>%
                                  dplyr::group_by(state,e_se_group) %>%
                                  dplyr::reframe("mean_prop" = mean(prop))

# PC MER set
pc_mer_epilogo_set <- pc_mer_sv_bp_set
#pc_mer_epilogo_set <- e_se_mers %>%
#                        dplyr::filter(tissue == "PC" & !mer_id %in% c("mer36","mer182")) %>%
#                        dplyr::select(mer_id) %>%
#                        purrr::as_vector()
pc_mer_epilogo_props <- data.table()
for(i in 1:nrow(pc_mer_epilogo_set)) {
  moi <- as.character(str_split(string = pc_mer_epilogo_set$mer_id_overlap[i], pattern = ";", simplify = T)[1])
  
  epilogos_to_add <- epilogo_prop_per_region(roi = mers_gr %Q% (mer_id == moi), 
                                             roi_id = moi)
  pc_mer_epilogo_props <- gUtils::rrbind(pc_mer_epilogo_props,
                                          epilogos_to_add)
}
pc_mer_epilogo_props$e_se_group <- "PC"
mean_pc_mer_epilogo_props <- pc_mer_epilogo_props %>%
                                dplyr::group_by(state,e_se_group) %>%
                                dplyr::reframe("mean_prop" = mean(prop))

e_se_mer_epilogos_props <- rrbind(gcb_mer_epilogo_props,
                                  dual_mer_epilogo_props,
                                  pc_mer_epilogo_props)
e_se_mer_epilogos_props$state <- stringr::str_replace_all(string = e_se_mer_epilogos_props$state, pattern = "_", replacement = " ")



mean_e_se_mer_epilogos_props <- rrbind(mean_gcb_mer_epilogo_props,
                                       mean_dual_mer_epilogo_props,
                                       mean_pc_mer_epilogo_props)
mean_e_se_mer_epilogos_props$state <- stringr::str_replace_all(string = mean_e_se_mer_epilogos_props$state, pattern = "_", replacement = " ")
mean_e_se_mer_epilogos_props$state <- factor(mean_e_se_mer_epilogos_props$state,
                                             levels = c("Heterochromatin Low Signal","H3K27me3 Repressed","H3K9me3 Repressed",
                                                        "Weak Transcription","Transcription Elongation","Transcription Transition",
                                                        "Weak Enhancer","Strong Enhancer2","Strong Enhancer1",
                                                        "Poised Promoter","Weak Promoter","Active Promoter"))
chromhmm_state_colors <- c("#260F99","#6551CC","#BFB2FF",
                           "#0F6B99","#51A3CC","#B2E5FF",
                           "#6B990F","#A3CC51","#E5FFB2",
                           "#99540F","#CC8E51","#FFD8B2")

# Plot the mean Epilogos per E/SE-MER gropu
e_se_mer_chromstate_composition <- ggplot2::ggplot(mean_e_se_mer_epilogos_props,
                                          aes(x = state, y = mean_prop, label = round(mean_prop, digits = 2), fill = state)) +
                                    ggplot2::geom_col() +
                                    ggfittext::geom_bar_text() +
                                    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(name = "ChromHMM\nStates", values = rev(chromhmm_state_colors)) +
                                    ggplot2::coord_flip() +
                                    ggplot2::facet_wrap(facets = ~ e_se_group) +
                                    ggplot2::labs(y = "Mean Proportion",
                                         x = "ChromHMM States") +
                                    ggplot2::theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
                                          legend.position = "none",
                                          panel.spacing.x = unit(1.5,"lines"))
```

Epigenomic analysis of TXNDC5 MERs
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label == "TXNDC5") %>%
  dplyr::select(intron_overlap_pct, three_prime_utr_overlap_pct) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_intron" = mean(intron_overlap_pct),
                   "mean_three_prime" = mean(three_prime_utr_overlap_pct))
  
# TRX Junctions
txndc5_starburst_dists <- proximal_bp_dist(sv_bp_gr = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(interchrom_juncs_fully_masked)),
                                          gr_of_interest = dt2gr(e_se_mers[mer_id == "mer36"]),
                                          proximal_dist_threshold = 5e5)

#message("Total TRX BP at E/SE MER associated with TXNDC5:")
#nrow(txndc5_starburst_dists)
#message("Partners of TXNDC5 MER TRX junctions:")
#table(txndc5_starburst_dists$nearest_gene_distal_partner)


# Epilogos
txndc5_epilogos <- epilogo_prop_per_region(roi = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(e_se_mers %>% dplyr::filter(mer_id == "mer37"))),
                                           roi_id = "TXNDC5")
message("Chromatin state composition of TXNDC5: ")
txndc5_epilogos

message("Percentatge of Transcription chromatin states (Transcription_Transition + Transcription_Elongation): ",
        txndc5_epilogos %>%
          dplyr::filter(state %in% c("Transcription_Transition", "Transcription_Elongation")) %>%
          dplyr::reframe(combined_prop = round(sum(prop) * 100, digits = 1)))

message("Percentatge of Enhancer chromatin states (Strong_Enhancer1 + Strong_Enhancer2): ",
        txndc5_epilogos %>%
          dplyr::filter(state %in% c("Strong_Enhancer1", "Strong_Enhancer2")) %>%
          dplyr::reframe(combined_prop = round(sum(prop) * 100, digits = 1)))

# Mutation VAF
txndc5_muts <- muts_per_mer %>%
                dplyr::filter(mut_uniq_id %in% c("snv_er72","indel_er9"))

message("Percentage of Subclonal (VAF <0.25) mutations (SNVs + InDels) at TXNDC5 MERs: ",
        round(as.numeric(txndc5_muts %>%
          dplyr::filter(VAF < 0.25) %>%
          dplyr::count() / nrow(txndc5_muts)) * 100, digits = 1))
message("Min subclonal VAF: ", round(min(txndc5_muts$VAF), digits = 3))

message("Percentage of highly Clonal (VAF >=0.5) mutations (SNVs + InDels) at TXNDC5 MERs: ",
        round(as.numeric(txndc5_muts %>%
          dplyr::filter(VAF >= 0.5) %>%
          dplyr::count() / nrow(txndc5_muts)) * 100, digits = 1))
message("Max Clonal VAF: ", round(max(txndc5_muts$VAF), digits = 3))
```

Epigenomic analysis of TENT5C MERs
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label == "TENT5C") %>%
  dplyr::select(,cds_overlap_pct,intron_overlap_pct, three_prime_utr_overlap_pct) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_cds" = mean(cds_overlap_pct),
                   "mean_intron" = mean(intron_overlap_pct),
                   "mean_three_prime" = mean(three_prime_utr_overlap_pct))

# TENT5C
tent5c_starburst_dists <- proximal_bp_dist(sv_bp_gr = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(interchrom_juncs_fully_masked)),
                                          gr_of_interest = dt2gr(e_se_mers[mer_id == "mer70"]),
                                          proximal_dist_threshold = 5e5)

#print("Total TRX BP at E/SE MER associated with TENT5C:")
#nrow(tent5c_starburst_dists)
#print("Partners of TENT5C MER TRX junctions:")
#table(tent5c_starburst_dists$nearest_gene_distal_partner)

# Epilogos
tent5c_epilogos <- epilogo_prop_per_region(roi = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(e_se_mers %>% dplyr::filter(mer_id == "mer70"))),
                                           roi_id = "TENT5C")
message("Chromatin state composition of TENT5C: ")
tent5c_epilogos

message("Percentatge of Enhancer chromatin states (Strong_Enhancer1 + Strong_Enhancer2): ",
        tent5c_epilogos %>%
          dplyr::filter(state %in% c("Strong_Enhancer1", "Strong_Enhancer2")) %>%
          dplyr::reframe(combined_prop = round(sum(prop) * 100, digits = 1)))


message("Percentatge of Transcription Transition chromatin state: ",
        tent5c_epilogos %>%
          dplyr::filter(state == "Transcription_Transition") %>%
          dplyr::reframe(combined_prop = round(sum(prop) * 100, digits = 1)))


# Mutation VAF
tent5c_muts <- muts_per_mer %>%
                dplyr::filter(mut_uniq_id %in% c("indel_er2","snv_er16"))
```

**Supplementary Figure 12**

Epigenomic analysis of ZFP36L1 MER
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

mers_overlap %>%
  dplyr::filter(mer_gene_label == "ZFP36L1") %>%
  dplyr::select(,cds_overlap_pct,intron_overlap_pct, three_prime_utr_overlap_pct) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("mean_cds" = mean(cds_overlap_pct),
                   "mean_intron" = mean(intron_overlap_pct),
                   "mean_three_prime" = mean(three_prime_utr_overlap_pct))

# Intra-chromosomal deletions or inversions for chr14 MERs
# Get only the intra-chromosomal events
intrachrom_juncs <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(hq_total_sv_bp_dt %>%
                                             dplyr::filter(class != "TRA")))
# Annotate each partner junction by nearest coding gene
intrachrom_juncs$nearest_gene <- genes$gene_name[nearest(x = intrachrom_juncs, subject = gr.stripstrand(genes))]

# deletions/inversions that occur between ZFP36L1 / SERPINA9 / TCL1A and IGH locus
# Let's grab all DELs / INVs on chr14q
intrachrom_chr14q <- intrachrom_juncs %Q% (seqnames == "chr14" &
                                             start > chr_arm_lengths$q_start[14] &
                                             class %in% c("DEL", "INV"))

# workflow is to find all BP that are within the 'effective' range from the gene/MER of interest
# This range is slightly different for DELs vs INVs
# For DELs, first BP must be just outside gene/MER on centromeric side but can be variable on the IGH locus side due to number of SEs at that region
# For INVs, fist BP can be on either side of gene/MER 

# start of IGH region (using beginning of IGHA2) chr14:105583731
# ZFP36L1   chr14:68787662-68793067
# SERPINA9  chr14:94462721-94476197
# TCL1A     chr14:95709947-95714125

#################### D E L s ####################
# ZFP36L1
zfp36l1_final_dels <- data.table()
zfp36l1_dels_end1 <- gr.findoverlaps(query = parse.gr(paste0("chr14:68793067-", 68793067 + 2500000)),
                                     subject = intrachrom_chr14q %Q% (class == "DEL"),
                                     scol = c("class", "patient", "sample", "sv_id", "bp_order", "nearest_gene"))

# loop through all the deletion BPs that fall in the effective range
# use these to find the corresponding BP and check if in the IGH region
for(i in seq(along = zfp36l1_dels_end1$sv_id)) {
  zfp36l1_dels_end2 <- intrachrom_juncs %Q% (sv_id == zfp36l1_dels_end1$sv_id[i]) %Q% (bp_order != zfp36l1_dels_end1$bp_order[i])
  
  # If in the IGH range, keep the SV ID
  if(length(zfp36l1_dels_end2) > 0) {
    if(gr.in(query = zfp36l1_dels_end2, igh_trx_expected_range)) {
      zfp36l1_final_dels <- rrbind(zfp36l1_final_dels,
                                 gr2dt(intrachrom_juncs %Q% (sv_id == zfp36l1_dels_end1$sv_id[i])))
    }
  }
}
message("Intra-chromosomal deletions downstream of ZFP36L1 to near IGH region:")
zfp36l1_final_dels %>%
  dplyr::select(seqnames,start,end,strand,class,support,patient,sample,bp_order)

#################### I N V s ####################
# ZFP36L1
zfp36l1_final_invs <- data.table()
zfp36l1_invs_end1 <- gr.findoverlaps(query = grbind(parse.gr(paste0("chr14:68793067-", 68793067 + 2500000)),
                                                    parse.gr(paste0("chr14:", 68787662 - 2500000, "-68787662"))),
                                     subject = intrachrom_chr14q %Q% (class == "INV"),
                                     scol = c("class", "patient", "sample", "sv_id", "bp_order", "nearest_gene"))

for(i in seq(along = zfp36l1_invs_end1$sv_id)) {
  zfp36l1_invs_end2 <- intrachrom_juncs %Q% (sv_id == zfp36l1_invs_end1$sv_id[i]) %Q% (bp_order != zfp36l1_invs_end1$bp_order[i])
  
  # If in the IGH range, keep the SV ID
  if(length(zfp36l1_invs_end2) > 0) {
    
    if(gr.in(query = zfp36l1_invs_end2, igh_trx_expected_range)) {
      zfp36l1_final_invs <- rrbind(zfp36l1_final_invs,
                                   gr2dt(intrachrom_juncs %Q% (sv_id == zfp36l1_invs_end1$sv_id[i])))
    }
  }
}
message("Intra-chromosomal inversions downstream of ZFP36L1 to near IGH region")
zfp36l1_final_dels %>%
  dplyr::select(seqnames,start,end,strand,class,support,patient,sample,bp_order)

# Highly recurrent SNV sites
# first check if their are duplicated mutations patients
muts_per_mer %>%
  dplyr::filter(mut_uniq_id == "snv_er177") %>%
  dplyr::select(seqnames, start, Reference_Allele, Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode) %>%
  duplicated() %>%
  sum()

zfp36l1_snv_dups <- duplicated(muts_per_mer %>%
                                 dplyr::filter(mut_uniq_id == "snv_er177") %>%
                                 dplyr::select(seqnames, start, Reference_Allele))
zfp36l1_snv_dup_sites_start <- muts_per_mer[mut_uniq_id == "snv_er177"][zfp36l1_snv_dups, .(start)]
zfp36l1_snv_foci_counts <- muts_per_mer %>%
  dplyr::filter(start %in% zfp36l1_snv_dup_sites_start$start) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(seqnames,start) %>%
  dplyr::count() %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(n))

zfp36l1_snv_foci_counts %>%
  dplyr::filter(n >= 3)

# Epilogos
zfp36l1_epilogos <- epilogo_prop_per_region(roi = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(e_se_mers %>% dplyr::filter(mer_id == "mer5"))),
                                            roi_id = "ZFP36L1")

message("Chromatin state composition of ZFP36L1: ")
zfp36l1_epilogos

message("Percentatge of Enhancer chromatin states (Strong_Enhancer1 + Strong_Enhancer2): ",
        zfp36l1_epilogos %>%
          dplyr::filter(state %in% c("Strong_Enhancer1", "Strong_Enhancer2")) %>%
          dplyr::reframe(combined_prop = round(sum(prop) * 100, digits = 1)))

message("Percentatge of Promoter chromatin state: ",
        zfp36l1_epilogos %>%
          dplyr::filter(state %in% c("Active_Promoter", "Weak_Promoter","Poised_Promoter")) %>%
          dplyr::reframe(combined_prop = round(sum(prop) * 100, digits = 1)))
```

ZFP36L1 locus view
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

zfp36l1_window <- "chr14:68784501-68797000"

ideogram_track_zfp36l1 <- geom_single_chrom_ideogrom(window_of_interest = zfp36l1_window,
                                                    flank = 0)

scale_track_zfp36l1 <- geom_locus_scale(window_of_interest = zfp36l1_window,
                                                    flank = 0)

gene_track_zfp36l1 <- geom_gene_track(window_of_interest = zfp36l1_window,
                                           flank = 0,
                                           genes_of_interest = "ZFP36L1",
                                           gene_name_side = "five_prime",
                                           gene_label_nudge = 2500,
                                           gene_label_size = 3.5) +
  labs(y = "ZFP36L1")

enhancer_track_zfp36l1 <- geom_bed_track(data = complete_ee,
                                        window_of_interest = zfp36l1_window,
                                        flank = 0,
                                        aes_y_column = "tissue",
                                        aes_fill_column = "enhancer_type",
                                        x_axis_theme = "blank",
                                        legend_title = "Element",
                                        aes_fill_colors = c("#3DA873","#DC9445")) +
                                  labs(y = "Enhancers")

mer_track_zfp36l1 <- geom_bed_track(data = mers_gr,
                                         window_of_interest = zfp36l1_window,
                                         flank = 0,
                                         aes_y_column = "mer_type",
                                         aes_fill_column = "mer_type",
                                         x_axis_theme = "blank",
                                    aes_fill_colors = "#FB832D") +
                           labs(y = "MERs") +
                           theme(legend.position = "none")

snv_track_zfp36l1  <- geom_count_mutations(data = snv_muts_hq_dt,
                                               window_of_interest = zfp36l1_window,
                                               flank = 0,
                                               aes_y_column = "Reference_Allele",
                                               aes_fill_color = "#191970",
                                               x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                         ylab("Myeloma\nSNVs")+
                            ggplot2::scale_color_gradientn(name = "Density", colours = rev(paletteer_c("grDevices::GnBu", 15)))

snv_vaf_track_zfp36l1  <- geom_vaf_landscape(data = snv_muts_hq_dt,
                                                    window_of_interest = zfp36l1_window,
                                                    flank = 0,
                                                    contrast = F,
                                                    x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                            ggplot2::scale_color_gradientn(name = "Density", colours = paletteer_c("grDevices::GnBu", 15)[1:12])


normal_snv_track_zfp36l1 <- geom_count_mutations(data = gr2dt(normal_lymphocyte_muts_for_model) %>% dplyr::filter(VARIANT_CLASS == "SNV"),
                                               window_of_interest = zfp36l1_window,
                                               flank = 0,
                                               aes_y_column = "Reference_Allele",
                                               aes_fill_color = "gray",
                                               x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                                         ylab("Lymphocyte\nSNVs")

epilogos_track_zfp36l1 <- geom_epilogo_col(data = mm_epilogos,
                                                      window_of_interest = zfp36l1_window,
                                                      flank = 0,
                                                      x_axis_theme = "blank",
                                           contrast = F)

breakpoint_track_zfp36l1 <- geom_sv_breakpoints(data = hq_total_sv_bp_dt,
                                                            window_of_interest = zfp36l1_window,
                                                            flank = 0,
                                                            aes_y_column = "patient",
                                                            aes_fill_column = "class",
                                                            aes_shape_column = "class",
                                                            x_axis_theme = "blank")

zfp36l1_locus_view <- patchwork::wrap_plots(list(ideogram_track_zfp36l1,
                           scale_track_zfp36l1,
                           breakpoint_track_zfp36l1,
                           normal_snv_track_zfp36l1,
                           snv_track_zfp36l1,
                           snv_vaf_track_zfp36l1,
                           epilogos_track_zfp36l1,
                           enhancer_track_zfp36l1,
                           mer_track_zfp36l1,
                           gene_track_zfp36l1),
                      ncol = 1,
                      guides = "collect",
                      heights = c(0.1,0.1,0.15,0.2,0.2,0.2,0.15,0.1,0.1,0.1))
```

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-12
#| fig-cap: "Locus view of ZFP36L1 E/SE-MER. The mutation spectrum at this locus is similar between myeloma and normal lymphocytes From the top down the locus view shows the ideogram chromosome, cytoband, genomic window, and scale for reference, SV breakpoints per patient colored by the class of SV, the count of SNVs and InDels in myeloma samples and normal lymphocytes from Machado et al., the site of MERs with type of mutation enrichment on the y-axis, the site of enhancer elements colored by type and tissue of origin on the y-axis, and lastly the gene body dUTRs are solid black segments, and introns are thin black lines."
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 7
#| out-width: "70%"

supp_fig12 <- zfp36l1_locus_view
#supp_fig12
```
