Compare Chromatin states between the E/SE groups
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# Look at Enhancer signal
enhancer_epilogo_group <- e_se_mer_epilogos_props %>%
  dplyr::filter(state %in% c("Strong Enhancer1", "Strong Enhancer2", "Weak Enhancer")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("state_group" = "Enhancer") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(e_se_group,state_group,roi) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("group_state_sum_prop" = sum(prop))

enhancer_epilogo_group_mean <- enhancer_epilogo_group %>%
                                 dplyr::group_by(e_se_group,state_group) %>%
                                 dplyr::reframe("mean_group_state_sum_prop" = mean(group_state_sum_prop))
print("Enhancer states proportion")
enhancer_epilogo_group_mean

# Use Dunn test to perform pairwise Kruskal-Wallis test of means
enhancer_epilogo_group_pval <- rstatix::dunn_test(data = enhancer_epilogo_group, formula = group_state_sum_prop ~ e_se_group)
enhancer_epilogo_group_pval$p.adj <- round(x = enhancer_epilogo_group_pval$p.adj, digits = 3)

enhancer_epilogo_group_plot <- ggplot(enhancer_epilogo_group_mean) +
  geom_col(aes(x = e_se_group, y = mean_group_state_sum_prop, fill = e_se_group)) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Mean Proportion") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "E/SE-MER\nGroup",values = c("royalblue3","#540046","orangered3")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,0.73)) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = ggplot2::alpha(colour = "#ffcd17", alpha = 0.15)),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none") +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = enhancer_epilogo_group_pval[c(1,3),],
                             label = "P={p.adj}",
                             y.position = c(0.62,0.65),
                             bracket.nudge.y = 0.01,
                             size = 4.5,
                             tip.length = 0.015) +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = enhancer_epilogo_group_pval[2,],
                             label = "{p.adj.signif}",
                             y.position = 0.57,
                             bracket.nudge.y = 0.01,
                             size = 4.5,
                             tip.length = 0.015)

# Look at Transcription signal
transcription_epilogo_group <- e_se_mer_epilogos_props %>%
  dplyr::filter(state %in% c("Transcription Transition", "Transcription Elongation", "Weak Transcription")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("state_group" = "Transcription") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(e_se_group,state_group,roi) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("group_state_sum_prop" = sum(prop))

transcription_epilogo_group_mean <- transcription_epilogo_group %>%
                                     dplyr::group_by(e_se_group,state_group) %>%
                                     dplyr::reframe("mean_group_state_sum_prop" = mean(group_state_sum_prop))

print("Transcription states proportion")
transcription_epilogo_group_mean

# Use Dunn test to perform pairwise Kruskal-Wallis test of means
transcription_epilogo_group_pval <- rstatix::dunn_test(data = transcription_epilogo_group, formula = group_state_sum_prop ~ e_se_group)
transcription_epilogo_group_pval$p.adj <- round(x = transcription_epilogo_group_pval$p.adj, digits = 3)

transcription_epilogo_group_plot <- ggplot(transcription_epilogo_group_mean) +
  geom_col(aes(x = e_se_group, y = mean_group_state_sum_prop, fill = e_se_group)) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Mean Proportion") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "E/SE-MER\nGroup",values = c("royalblue3","#540046","orangered3")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,0.53)) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = ggplot2::alpha(colour = "#4fe609", alpha = 0.15)),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none") +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = transcription_epilogo_group_pval[2,],
                             label = "P={p.adj}",
                             y.position = 0.40,
                             bracket.nudge.y = 0.01,
                             size = 4.5,
                             tip.length = 0.015) +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = transcription_epilogo_group_pval[c(1,3),],
                             label = "{p.adj.signif}",
                             y.position = c(0.45,0.48),
                             bracket.nudge.y = 0.01,
                             size = 4.5,
                             tip.length = 0.015)

# Look at Repressed / Heterochromatin signal
repressed_epilogo_group <- e_se_mer_epilogos_props %>%
  dplyr::filter(state %in% c("H3K9me3 Repressed", "H3K27me3 Repressed", "Heterochromatin Low Signal")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("state_group" = "Transcription") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(e_se_group,state_group,roi) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("group_state_sum_prop" = sum(prop))

repressed_epilogo_group_mean <- repressed_epilogo_group %>%
                                  dplyr::group_by(e_se_group,state_group) %>%
                                  dplyr::reframe("mean_group_state_sum_prop" = mean(group_state_sum_prop))

repressed_epilogo_group_pval <- rstatix::dunn_test(data = repressed_epilogo_group, formula = group_state_sum_prop ~ e_se_group)
repressed_epilogo_group_pval$p.adj <- round(x = repressed_epilogo_group_pval$p.adj, digits = 3)

repressed_epilogo_group_plot <- ggplot(repressed_epilogo_group_mean) +
  geom_col(aes(x = e_se_group, y = mean_group_state_sum_prop, fill = e_se_group)) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Mean Proportion") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "E/SE-MER\nGroup",values = c("royalblue3","#540046","orangered3")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,0.73)) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = ggplot2::alpha(colour = "gray40", alpha = 0.15)),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none") +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = repressed_epilogo_group_pval[1,],
                             label = "P={p.adj}",
                             y.position = 0.62,
                             bracket.nudge.y = 0.01,
                             size = 4.5,
                             tip.length = 0.015) +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = repressed_epilogo_group_pval[c(2,3),],
                             label = "{p.adj.signif}",
                             y.position = c(0.57,0.67),
                             bracket.nudge.y = 0.01,
                             size = 4.5,
                             tip.length = 0.015)

# Look at Promoter signal
promoter_epilogo_group <- e_se_mer_epilogos_props %>%
  dplyr::filter(state %in% c("Active Promoter", "Weak Promoter", "Poised Promoter")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate("state_group" = "Promoter") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(e_se_group,state_group,roi) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("group_state_sum_prop" = sum(prop))

promoter_epilogo_group_mean <- promoter_epilogo_group %>%
                                 dplyr::group_by(e_se_group,state_group) %>%
                                 dplyr::reframe("mean_group_state_sum_prop" = mean(group_state_sum_prop))

promoter_epilogo_group_pval <- rstatix::dunn_test(data = promoter_epilogo_group, formula = group_state_sum_prop ~ e_se_group)

promoter_epilogo_group_plot <- ggplot(promoter_epilogo_group_mean) +
  geom_col(aes(x = e_se_group, y = mean_group_state_sum_prop, fill = e_se_group)) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Mean Proportion") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "E/SE-MER\nGroup",values = c("royalblue3","#540046","orangered3")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,0.23)) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = ggplot2::alpha(colour = "#d13885", alpha = 0.15)),
        panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = promoter_epilogo_group_pval,
                             label = "{p.adj.signif}",
                             y.position = c(0.17,0.15,0.19),
                             bracket.nudge.y = 0.01,
                             size = 4.5,
                             tip.length = 0.015)
```

**Figure 7**

TXNDC5 locus view
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

# GRO-seq track
# plus
#lp1_gro_seq_plus_hg19 <- rtracklayer::import(BigWigFile(paste0(base_data_path,"GSM1755012_LP1_GROseq_plus_hg19.bigWig")), as = "GRanges")

#lp1_gro_seq_plus_hg38 <- gr_refactor_seqs(grl.unlist(rtracklayer::liftOver(x = lp1_gro_seq_plus_hg19, chain = liftchain_hg19)))

#saveRDS(object = lp1_gro_seq_plus_hg38, file = paste0(base_data_path,"GSM1755012_LP1_GROseq_plus_hg38.rds"))
lp1_gro_seq_plus_hg38 <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path,"GSM1755012_LP1_GROseq_plus_hg38.rds"))

# minus
#lp1_gro_seq_minus_hg19 <- rtracklayer::import(BigWigFile(paste0(base_data_path,"GSM1755012_LP1_GROseq_minus_hg19.bigWig")), as = "GRanges")

#lp1_gro_seq_minus_hg38 <- grl.unlist(rtracklayer::liftOver(x = lp1_gro_seq_minus_hg19, chain = liftchain_hg19))
#lp1_gro_seq_minus_hg38$score <- -lp1_gro_seq_minus_hg38$score

#saveRDS(object = lp1_gro_seq_minus_hg38, file = paste0(base_data_path,"GSM1755012_LP1_GROseq_minus_hg38.rds"))
lp1_gro_seq_minus_hg38 <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path,"GSM1755012_LP1_GROseq_minus_hg38.rds"))

# More focused on gene 
txndc5_window <- "chr6:7850000-8000000"

ideogram_track_txndc5 <- geom_single_chrom_ideogrom(window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                                                 flank = 0)

scale_track_txndc5 <- geom_locus_scale(window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                                    flank = 0)

gene_track_txndc5 <- geom_gene_track(window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                           flank = 0,
                                           genes_of_interest = c("TXNDC5","BMP6","BLOC1S5-TXNDC5"),
                                           gene_name_side = "three_prime",
                                           gene_label_nudge = 1000000,
                                           gene_label_size = 3)

enhancer_track_txndc5 <- geom_bed_track(data = complete_ee,
                                        window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                        flank = 0,
                                        aes_y_column = "tissue",
                                        aes_fill_column = "enhancer_type",
                                        x_axis_theme = "blank",
                                        aes_fill_colors = c("#3DA873","#DC9445"),
                                        legend_title = "Element") +
                                  labs(y = "Enhancers") +
                                  theme(legend.position = "none")

mer_track_txndc5 <- geom_bed_track(data = mers_gr,
                                   window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                   flank = 0,
                                   aes_y_column = "mer_type",
                                   aes_fill_column = "mer_type",
                                   aes_fill_colors = c("black","#FB832D"),
                                   x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                           labs(y = "MERs") +
                           theme(legend.position = "none") +
                                  theme(legend.position = "none")

gro_seq_antisense_track_txndc5 <- geom_ridge_track(data = lp1_gro_seq_plus_hg38,
                                                    window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                                    flank = 0,
                                                    aes_y_column = "score",
                                                    fill_color = "darkred",
                                                    x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                              ylab(" \n \nGRO-Seq") + 
                              scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_minus_one)

gro_seq_sense_track_txndc5 <- geom_ridge_track(data = lp1_gro_seq_minus_hg38,
                                               window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                               flank = 0,
                                               aes_y_column = "score",
                                               fill_color = "dodgerblue",
                                               x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                              ylab(NULL) +
                              scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_minus_one)

snv_track_txndc5  <- geom_count_mutations(data = snv_muts_hq_dt,
                                               window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                               flank = 0,
                                               aes_y_column = "Reference_Allele",
                                               aes_fill_color = "#191970",
                                               x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                         ylab("SNVs") +
                         scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_minus_one)

snv_vaf_track_txndc5  <- geom_vaf_landscape(data = snv_muts_hq_dt,
                                                    window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                                    flank = 0,
                                                    contrast = F,
                                                    x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                            ylab("SNV\nVAF") +
                            ggplot2::scale_color_gradientn(name = "Density", colours = paletteer_c("grDevices::GnBu", 15)[1:12]) +
                            theme(legend.position = "none") +
                            scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_minus_one)

indel_track_txndc5  <- geom_count_mutations(data = indel_muts_hq_dt,
                                               window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                               flank = 0,
                                               aes_y_column = "Reference_Allele",
                                               aes_fill_color = "#EEA9B8",
                                               x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                                      ylab("InDels") +
                                      scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_minus_one)

indel_vaf_track_txndc5  <- geom_vaf_landscape(data = indel_muts_hq_dt,
                                                    window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                                    flank = 0,
                                                    contrast = F,
                                                    x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                                  ggplot2::scale_color_gradientn(name = "Density", colours = rev(paletteer_c("grDevices::Lajolla", 15)[3:14])) +
                                  ylab("InDel\nVAF") +
                                  theme(legend.position = "none") +
                                  scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_minus_one)

epilogos_track_txndc5 <- geom_epilogo_col(data = mm_epilogos,
                                                      window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                                      flank = 0,
                                                      x_axis_theme = "blank",
                                          contrast = F) +
                                  theme(legend.position = "none")

breakpoint_track_txndc5 <- geom_sv_breakpoints(data = hq_total_sv_bp_dt,
                                                            window_of_interest = txndc5_window,
                                                            flank = 0,
                                                            aes_y_column = "patient",
                                                            aes_fill_column = "class",
                                                            aes_shape_column = "class",
                                                            x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                                  theme(legend.position = "none")

txndc5_locus_view <- patchwork::wrap_plots(list(ideogram_track_txndc5,
                           scale_track_txndc5,
                           breakpoint_track_txndc5,
                           indel_track_txndc5,
                           indel_vaf_track_txndc5,
                           snv_track_txndc5,
                           snv_vaf_track_txndc5,
                           epilogos_track_txndc5,
                           gro_seq_antisense_track_txndc5,
                           gro_seq_sense_track_txndc5,
                           enhancer_track_txndc5,
                           mer_track_txndc5,
                           gene_track_txndc5),
                      ncol = 1,
                      heights = c(0.01,0.015,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.015,0.015,0.025))
```

TENT5C locus view
```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true

tent5c_window <- "chr1:117585000-117675000"

gene_track_tent5c <- geom_gene_track(window_of_interest = tent5c_window,
                                           flank = 0,
                                           genes_of_interest = c("TENT5C","TENT5C-DT"),
                                           gene_name_side = "three_prime",
                                           gene_label_nudge = 12000,

  labs(y = " ")

                                                    flank = 0)

                                                    flank = 0)

                                        window_of_interest = tent5c_window,

                                   aes_y_column = "mer_type",
                                   aes_fill_column = "mer_type",
                                   aes_fill_colors = c("black","#FB832D"),

                           theme(legend.position = "none")

gro_seq_sense_track_tent5c <- geom_ridge_track(data = lp1_gro_seq_plus_hg38,
                                               window_of_interest = tent5c_window,
                                               flank = 0,
                                               aes_y_column = "score",
                                               fill_color = "dodgerblue",
                                               x_axis_theme = "blank")+
                                      labs(y = " ")

gro_seq_antisense_track_tent5c <- geom_ridge_track(data = lp1_gro_seq_minus_hg38,
                                                   window_of_interest = tent5c_window,
                                                   flank = 0,
                                                   aes_y_column = "score",
                                                   fill_color = "darkred",
                                                   x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                                         labs(y = " ")

snv_track_tent5c  <- geom_count_mutations(data = snv_muts_hq_dt,
                                               window_of_interest = tent5c_window,
                                               flank = 0,
                                               aes_y_column = "Reference_Allele",
                                               aes_fill_color = "#191970",
                                               x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                         labs(y = " ")

snv_vaf_track_tent5c  <- geom_vaf_landscape(data = snv_muts_hq_dt,
                                            window_of_interest = tent5c_window,
                                            flank = 0,
                                            contrast = F,
                                            x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                            ggplot2::scale_color_gradientn(name = "Density", colours = paletteer_c("grDevices::GnBu", 15)[1:12]) +
  labs(y = " ")

indel_track_tent5c  <- geom_count_mutations(data = indel_muts_hq_dt,
                                            window_of_interest = tent5c_window,
                                            flank = 0,
                                            aes_y_column = "Reference_Allele",
                                            aes_fill_color = "#EEA9B8",
                                            x_axis_theme = "blank") +
                                      labs(y = " ")

indel_vaf_track_tent5c  <- geom_vaf_landscape(data = indel_muts_hq_dt,
                                              window_of_interest = tent5c_window,
                                              flank = 0,
                                              contrast = F,
                                              x_axis_theme = "blank") +
  ggplot2::scale_color_gradientn(name = "Density", colours = rev(paletteer_c("grDevices::Lajolla", 15)[3:14])) +
  labs(y = " ")

epilogos_track_tent5c <- geom_epilogo_col(data = mm_epilogos,
                                          window_of_interest = tent5c_window,
                                          flank = 0,
                                          x_axis_theme = "blank",
                                          contrast = F) +
  labs(y = " ")

breakpoint_track_tent5c <- geom_sv_breakpoints(data = hq_total_sv_bp_dt,
                                               window_of_interest = tent5c_window,
                                               flank = 0,
                                               aes_y_column = "patient",
                                               aes_fill_column = "class",
                                               aes_shape_column = "class",
                                               x_axis_theme = "blank") +
  labs(y = " ")

tent5c_locus_view <- patchwork::wrap_plots(list(ideogram_track_tent5c,
                           scale_track_tent5c,
                           breakpoint_track_tent5c,
                           indel_track_tent5c,
                           indel_vaf_track_tent5c,
                           snv_track_tent5c,
                           snv_vaf_track_tent5c,
                           epilogos_track_tent5c,
                           gro_seq_sense_track_tent5c,
                           gro_seq_antisense_track_tent5c,
                           enhancer_track_tent5c,
                           mer_track_tent5c,
                           gene_track_tent5c),
                      ncol = 1,
                      guides = "collect",
                      heights = c(0.01,0.015,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.02,0.015,0.02,0.02))
```

```{r}
#| label: main-fig-7a
#| fig-cap: "Locus view of TXNDC5 E/SE-MERs. For each view, starting from the bottom, there are tracks for the gene of interest in view, the site of all MERs with type of mutation enrichment on the y-axis, the site of enhancer elements colored by type and tissue of origin on the y-axis, transcriptionally engaged RNA polymerase signal in the global run-on sequencing (GRO-seq) data from the LP-1 myeloma cell line (GSE70449) with the signal colored based on the sense (blue) and antisense (red) strands of each gene, the epilogo composite of MM patient-derived ChromHMM states per 200 bp bins, the variant allele frequency (VAF) and count of mutations per reference base for SNVs and InDels, and the site of structural variant (SV) breakpoints per patient colored by the class of SV. The top two tracks display the ideogram of the chromosome, cytoband, genomic window, and scale for reference. PC, plasma cell; E/SE, enhancer/super-enhancer."
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 7
#| out-width: "70%"

fig7a <- txndc5_locus_view
#fig7a
```

```{r}
#| label: main-fig-7b
#| fig-cap: "Locus view of TENT5C E/SE-MERs. For each view, starting from the bottom, there are tracks for the gene of interest in view, the site of all MERs with type of mutation enrichment on the y-axis, the site of enhancer elements colored by type and tissue of origin on the y-axis, transcriptionally engaged RNA polymerase signal in the global run-on sequencing (GRO-seq) data from the LP-1 myeloma cell line (GSE70449) with the signal colored based on the sense (blue) and antisense (red) strands of each gene, the epilogo composite of MM patient-derived ChromHMM states per 200 bp bins, the variant allele frequency (VAF) and count of mutations per reference base for SNVs and InDels, and the site of structural variant (SV) breakpoints per patient colored by the class of SV. The top two tracks display the ideogram of the chromosome, cytoband, genomic window, and scale for reference. PC, plasma cell; E/SE, enhancer/super-enhancer."
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 7
#| out-width: "70%"

fig7b <- tent5c_locus_view
#fig7b
```

## Supplementary Tables

**Table S1: Mutationally enriched regions (MERs)**

```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

table_s1 <- mers %>%
   dplyr::select(-start_abs_linear,-end_abs_linear,-midpoint_abs_linear) %>%
   dplyr::select(seqnames,start,end,width,mer_id,mer_gene_label,mer_type,k_tiles,
                 q_value,effect_size_mean,count_density_mean,pred_count_density_mean,
                 eligible_size_mean,mut_uniq_id,overlapping_genes,total_mut_patients,
                 pct_total_mut_patients,mut_mgus_patients,pct_mut_mgus_patients,
                 mut_smm_patients,pct_mut_smm_patients,mut_mm_patients,pct_mut_mm_patients,
                 mut_rrmm_patients,pct_mut_rrmm_patients,mut_t11_14_patients,pct_mut_t11_14_patients,
                 mut_t4_14_patients,pct_mut_t4_14_patients,mut_t14_16_patients,pct_mut_t14_16_patients,
                 mut_t14_20_patients,pct_mut_t14_20_patients,mut_t6_14_patients,pct_mut_t6_14_patients,
                 mut_t8_14_patients,pct_mut_t8_14_patients,mut_trx_not_detected_patients,
                 pct_mut_trx_not_detected_patients,mut_EUR_patients,pct_mut_EUR_patients,
                 mut_AFR_patients,pct_mut_AFR_patients,mut_AMR_patients,pct_mut_AMR_patients,
                 mut_EAS_patients,pct_mut_EAS_patients,mut_SAS_patients,pct_mut_SAS_patients,
                 mut_highly_admixed_patients,pct_mut_highly_admixed_patients)
```

table_s2 <- mers_overlap %>%

                 five_prime_utr_overlap_pct,intron_overlap_pct,intergenic_pct,gene_body_pct,
                 cluster_label,lncrna_overlap_pct,mirna_overlap_pct,enhancer_overlap_pct,
                 enhancer_id,tissue,enhancer_type,promoter_overlap_pct,prom_id,lymphocyte_overlap_pct,
                 pct_patients_with_SV.hg19,hotspot.id.hg19,complex.hotspot.id.hg19,hotspot_class,
                 genes_involved,driver_status)

**Table S5: Sample Metadata**

```{r}
#| tidy: true
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| collapse: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| code-overflow: wrap

table_s4 <- hq_dataset_metadata %>%
   dplyr::select(patient,sample,study,dataset_id,disease_stage,age,sex,self_identified_race,
                 coverage_normal,coverage_tumor,contamination,concordance,igh_translocation,
                 hyperdiploidy,purity,ploidy,snv_count,indel_count,total_mutation_count,
                 EAS,SAS,EUR,AMR,AFR,super5_cluster_id) %>%
   dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_sig_96_out$estimate %>%
                         tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "sample") %>%
                         dplyr::select(-mutations),
                    by = "sample")
```
